MLS)\",\"dataSourceName\":\"MLSNOW\",\"dataSourceImage\":\"yesmls_small.png\",\"shouldShowLargerLogo\":false},\"priceDisplayLevel\":1,\"historyEventType\":2,\"eventDate\":1629788400000,\"marketingRemarks\":[{\"marketingRemark\":\"Everything is brand new in this 4 bedroom 2 full bath ranch in Streetsboro! Gorgeous updated kitchen with white cabinets, quartz counters and breakfast bar island! Vinyl wood flooring and open floor plan through kitchen, living room and great room. Three bedrooms with new carpet and ceiling fans down the original hallway. Master suite tucked away in the back of house with nice walk in closet and private full bathroom with quartz vanity. Doors off the great room lead to rear patio and expansive backyard (almost an acre)! Two car attached garage has oversized doors and is taller and deeper than usual. All big ticket items have been updated; roof, windows \\u0026amp; doors, furnace, A\u002FC, and hot water tank. Conveniently located close to I-480 and I-80. This is the one you have been waiting for! \",\"displayLevel\":1}],\"eventDateString\":\"Aug 24, 2021\"},{\"isEventAdminOnly\":false,\"eventDescription\":\"Pending\",\"mlsDescription\":\"Pending\",\"source\":\"MLSNOW\",\"sourceId\":\"4291312\",\"dataSourceDisplay\":{\"dataSourceId\":159,\"dataSourceDescription\":\"Northern Ohio Regional MLS (Yes MLS)\",\"dataSourceName\":\"MLSNOW\",\"dataSourceImage\":\"yesmls_small.png\",\"shouldShowLargerLogo\":false},\"historyEventType\":1,\"eventDate\":1629312929628,\"marketingRemarks\":[{\"marketingRemark\":\"Everything is brand new in this 4 bedroom 2 full bath ranch in Streetsboro! Kirby Ln, Streetsboro, OH 44241\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":3,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":14,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051314,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May The administration and teachers do an excellent job of communicating with the parents regarding the academic expectations of Campus. Homework assignments were always very clear. We moved here from Aurora and we have been much happier with our experience with Streetsboro schools than we were with Aurora Schools.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904092,\"maponicsId\":2102723,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4092-Campus-Intermediate-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8959600,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2008\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904092,\"maponicsId\":575023,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4092-Campus-Intermediate-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":175327,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"3\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":175325,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":9859,\"districtName\":\"Streetsboro City School The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":179690,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"9\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":9859,\"districtName\":\"Streetsboro City School District\",\"address\":\"9000 Kirby Lane\",\"city\":\"Streetsboro\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44241\",\"latitude\":41.236404,\"longitude\":-81.321419,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.streetsboroschools.com\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002Fstreetsboro-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4094-Streetsboro-Middle-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":false,\"middle\":true,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":true,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":2,\"distanceInMiles\":\"3.6\",\"gradeRanges\":\"9-12\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Streetsboro High School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F48004\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002FStreetsboro-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F48004\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002FStreetsboro-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":48004,\"numberOfStudents\":547,\"fullAddress\":\"8585 Ohio 14, Streetsboro, OH 44241\",\"numReviews\":3,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":16,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051312,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2022\",\"review\":\"I moved to Ohio and this is my first year in SHS. I really love this school so much, the only thing that is not good is the students would be racist to Asians or blacks. They would say slur words in the hallways during passing period. I used to be in a diverse school so I am not used to the racism. But other than that the teachers are really nice and the students are very social! I feel safer here than my other old school!\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":5681155,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740038,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2015\",\"review\":\"The district is striving towards technology but they are doing too little way to late. 3\u002F4 of the students have technology available to them while the rest have little or none or only what they get at school. Bullying is a huge problem and the principal in the high school is too quick to judge and even though a student reports problems time and time again, as stated something is only done when the victim retaliates and then the victim is punished and informed that the student that was doing the bullying has personal problems and essentially telling you that you have to tolerate them. Then they punish your child. The new principal up there just doesn\\u0027t get it. And his personality really just doesn\\u0027t fit the district. Superintendent is pretty tech savvy and is appears to be trying to move in that direction as fast as he can but the limited awareness of technology in those who make the decision is holding the forward movement back.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":642533,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740039,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2013\",\"review\":\"I feel that the high school does not appropriately deal with bullies. They wait until the victim retaliates and then they punish the victim. Academically they are not doing what they need to do. I have a child on a 504 plan and he is failing every subject so I would say that their accommodations are not working or not being followed. Also, they wait too long to call parents to let them know there is a problem. I was notified when my son had 11 hours of detention to serve but then it was too close to the end of the school year to serve them so they suspended him for 2 days. They treat the students like they are all from the same cookie cut out. I warned them that when my child started to get detentions that it was a sign that he was having trouble emotionally \\u0026 that I needed to notified but they failed to recognize it even after I made them aware.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":1320965,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":182585,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is about the same as the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182587,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182584,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182583,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"4\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. I really love this school so much, the only thing that is not good is the students would be racist to Asians or blacks. They would say slur words in the hallways during passing period. I used to be in a diverse school so I am not used to the racism. But other than that the teachers are really nice and the students are very social! I feel safer here than my other old school!\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":5681155,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740038,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2015\",\"review\":\"The district is striving towards technology but they are doing too little way to late. 3\u002F4 of the students have technology available to them while the rest have little or none or only what they get at school. Bullying is a huge problem and the principal in the high school is too quick to judge and even though a student reports problems time and time again, as stated something is only done when the victim retaliates and then the victim is punished and informed that the student that was doing the bullying has personal problems and essentially telling you that you have to tolerate them. Then they punish your child. The new principal up there just doesn\\u0027t get it. And his personality really just doesn\\u0027t fit the district. Superintendent is pretty tech savvy and is appears to be trying to move in that direction as fast as he can but the limited awareness of technology in those who make the decision is holding the forward movement back.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":642533,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740039,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2013\",\"review\":\"I feel that the high school does not appropriately deal with bullies. They wait until the victim retaliates and then they punish the victim. Academically they are not doing what they need to do. I have a child on a 504 plan and he is failing every subject so I would say that their accommodations are not working or not being followed. Also, they wait too long to call parents to let them know there is a problem. I was notified when my son had 11 hours of detention to serve but then it was too close to the end of the school year to serve them so they suspended him for 2 days. They treat the students like they are all from the same cookie cut out. I warned them that when my child started to get detentions that it was a sign that he was having trouble emotionally \\u0026 that I needed to notified but they failed to recognize it even after I made them aware.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":1320965,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":182585,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is about the same as the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182587,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182584,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182583,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"4\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F49714\u002FOH\u002FHudson\u002FHudson-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F49714\u002FOH\u002FHudson\u002FHudson-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fhudson\u002F4333-Hudson-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":49714,\"numberOfStudents\":1359,\"fullAddress\":\"2500 Hudson Aurora Rd, Hudson, OH 44236\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":11,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":16,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051602,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2020\",\"review\":\"Hudson City Schools offer so many pathways to success. And it\\u0027s not because of financial resources. The heart of these schools is a caring, considerate and thoughtful approach to community and learning. While undoubtedly there are things to work on, I know my child has benefited from the academically rigorous, yet socially diverse experiences of Hudson Schools. I would recommend this environment to anyone who wishes to have a great foundation of lifelong learning for his\u002Fher children.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904333,\"maponicsId\":4665611,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fhudson\u002F4333-Hudson-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051601,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2017\",\"review\":\"Parents with money control the schools. If you are average you are nobody. If you are extremely smart or have special needs then you get noticed. So much for meeting the needs of the \\\"standard bell curve\\\" of the student population.\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904333,\"maponicsId\":2875917,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fhudson\u002F4333-Hudson-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051600,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2015\",\"review\":\"This is the best public high school in the country. My children were more prepared than others during college.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904333,\"maponicsId\":1642111,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fhudson\u002F4333-Hudson-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8960241,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2014\",\"review\":\"A every good school filled with challenging courses that help the student prepare for college. A good amount of pressure is put on test scores and not the students overall understanding of the topic. There is also a fairly good drug problem which the administration fails to address, but as long as you send your child in with a good head on their shoulders you shouldn\\u0027t worry.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904333,\"maponicsId\":1431295,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fhudson\u002F4333-Hudson-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970469,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2013\",\"review\":\"Hudson High School is very friendly, open house night was incredibly informative and the princpal is approachable and willing to help.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904333,\"maponicsId\":1388370,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fhudson\u002F4333-Hudson-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970468,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2012\",\"review\":\"I graduated from Hudson High School and now I go to the university fo Akron. I can tell in my classes how much more hudson has taught me then other high schools that my peers were from. Hudson has an amazing school system and I would definately recomend it to any parents looking to give their child a boost up in life. Many of my general education courses at Akron were very easy for me because they were very simmilar to the classes I took in Hudson high school.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904333,\"maponicsId\":1270890,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fhudson\u002F4333-Hudson-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970467,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2012\",\"review\":\"Alot of reviews are biased based on how well the student does or how well parents think their child is doing. I get good grades, maybe not great grades but still good grades. Every teacher I\\u0027ve had is willing to help, but are waiting for the student to take responsibility in seeking the help. Honors\u002FAP courses are more difficult and alot more like a college course, (as in the student is expected to do the work themselves and the teacher delivers a 5 minute message) but gives help where needed as well when asked. Students have much social time on hand during breaks and it does get a little noisy (Teachers watching over study hall make everyone study and not have fun) but in the end you still learn alot. Teachers tend to be very interactive and all the bad ones ar most likely in an easier course (such as art). The high school has alot of freedom and alot is expected since the kids are young adults however the middle school is still worse. Everything is great and well balanced (in a good way) you just have to meet what is expected of you. Parents have alot of influence, they can either support them or ignore them or even baby them and the oppurtunities are great. Taxes \\u003d high as said.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904333,\"maponicsId\":1260010,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fhudson\u002F4333-Hudson-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":331717,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"10\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":171903,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"10\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. 44241\",\"isNearby\":true,\"isPrivate\":true,\"numReviews\":2,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.ccastreetsboro.com\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46056988,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2023\",\"review\":\"MY GRANDSON ATTENDED THIS SCHOOL FOR 2 YEARS. MY SON WITHDREW HIM AT THE BEGINNING OF HIS 3RD YEAR (2022-23) DUE TO THE LACK OF COMPASSION AND HONESTY FROM THE ADMINISTRATION AND STAFF. THE TOP PRIORITY IT SEEMS HAD BECOME TO MAKE MONEY. DECISIONS WERE BEING MADE THAT WERE NOT AT ALL IN THE BEST INTEREST OF THE CHILDREN HOWEVER, HELPED THE SCHOOL MAKE MORE MONEY. AS A RESULT OF THE LACK OF TRANSPARENCY AND HONESTY MY SON FELT IT BEST TO WITHDRAW OUR SWEET GRANDSON. IT IS VERY SAD THAT THERE WERE LOTS OF LIES AND DECEPTION TAKING PLACE. SINCE THEN, MANY FAMILIES AND STAFF HAVE LEFT. NOW THEY HAVE CHANGED THEIR NAME TO CENTRAL CHRISTIAN ACADEMY, I WONDER WHY???? BE CAREFUL WITH YOUR LITTLE ONES!!\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3911681,\"maponicsId\":5982219,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F11681-Crossroads-Christian-Academy\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46056987,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"February 2016\",\"review\":\"The faculty is very professional and loving. Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street National Wind Model, which forecasts how hurricanes and costs from resulting wind damages to structures will change over time due to climate change.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Wind Factor indicates its likelihood to experience extreme winds over the next 30 years, from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Wind Factor scores are more likely to experience higher winds more frequently today and in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fwind?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on the likelihood and speed of hurricane, tornado, or severe storm winds reaching this property, it has minimal wind risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s wind risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows this property\\u0027s likelihood of being in a tropical storm event with 3-second wind gusts exceeding 50 mph (39 mph for 1-minute sustained winds) over the next 30 years.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{},\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390412945\u002F390412945_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#wind\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all wind data on firststreet.org\"}},\"floodDataV2\":{\"fsid\":390412945,\"climateId\":\"flood\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Flood Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Minimal risk of a flood reaching the building in the next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor® is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street Flood Model, a nationwide, probabilistic flood model that shows a location’s risk of flooding from rain, rivers, tides, and storm surge. It builds off of decades of peer-reviewed research and forecasts how flood risks will change over time due to changes in the environment. Flood Factor is not intended to include all possible risks of flood.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Flood Factor is an indicator of its comprehensive flood risk, ranging from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Flood Factors are more likely to have flooded in the past, and are more likely to flood in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fflood?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on this property’s projected likelihood and depth of flooding, it has minimal flood risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s flood risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Flood risk accumulates over time. Cumulative risk is calculated to the largest building or center of an empty lot. Raised or elevated buildings may not be as vulnerable as ground-level buildings or buildings with basements.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is unlikely to flood in the next 30 years.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":0.0,\"yMax0\":0,\"yMax5\":0,\"yMax10\":0,\"yMax15\":0,\"yMax20\":0,\"yMax25\":0,\"yMax30\":0,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390412945\u002F390412945_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#flood\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all flood data on firststreet.org\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionTitle\":{\"value\":\"FEMA zone X (unshaded)\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout\":{\"value\":\"The FEMA flood zone shown is the most probable estimated zone.\\n\\nThe Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) is a government agency that maps flood zones in communities across the US, identifying areas of varying flood risk on Flood Insurance Rate Maps (FIRMs). FEMA creates FIRMs to inform flood insurance pricing in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) and to guide floodplain management regulations for NFIP-participating communities.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"http:\u002F\u002Ffloodsmart.gov\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on floodsmart.gov\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout2\":{\"value\":\"The FEMA flood zone shown is the most probable zone as estimated by MassiveCert, Inc.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrl2\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.massivecert.com\u002F\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrlText2\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on massivecert.com\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is estimated to be in FEMA Zone X (unshaded), which is designated as a low-to-moderate risk flood area. In this zone, the risk of flooding is reduced, but not completely removed.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.floodsmart.gov\u002Fflood-map-zone\u002Ffind-yours\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on floodsmart.gov\"},\"insuranceTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood insurance\"},\"insuranceFlyout\":{\"value\":\"To help you understand what it costs to protect this home with flood insurance we\\u0027ve partnered with Neptune Flood. Redfin may receive a commission if you purchase a policy through this link. There may be other flood insurance providers in your area.\"},\"insuranceDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on your estimated FEMA zone, flood insurance is not required. However, FEMA always recommends considering insurance.\\n\\nFlood insurance for this home ranges from $507 to $1088 per year, based on information from 4 providers.\"},\"insuranceLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002F1str.ee\u002Ft\u002Fhippo\u002Fflood\u002F390412945?source\\u003dredfin\"},\"insuranceLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Get an instant quote\"}},\"fireDataV2\":{\"fsid\":390412945,\"climateId\":\"fire\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Fire Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Unlikely to be in a wildfire in next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street National Wildfire Model\\u0027s nationwide, behavioral wildfire model that shows a specific location\\u0027s probabilistic risk of wildfire based on the vegetation, topography, and fire weather in the surrounding area. Fire Factor is not intended to include all possible risks of fire.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Fire Factor indicates its cumulative wildfire risk, ranging from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Fire Factors are more likely to be in a wildfire in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Ffire?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on this property\\u0027s distance to wildfire risk areas and burnable vegetation, it has minimal wildfire risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s fire risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire risk accumulates over time, so a property with a 0.1% chance of wildfire this year would have at least a 3% chance of being affected by wildfire at least once within 30 years. Being affected by wildfire refers to any actively burning fuels coming into contact with the largest building on the property.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"Unlikely to be in a wildfire in next 30 years.\"},\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390412945\u002F390412945_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#fire\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all fire data on firststreet.org\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionTitle\":{\"value\":\"USFS relative risk rank\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout\":{\"value\":\"The Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) is a government agency that maps flood zones in communities across the US, identifying areas of varying flood risk on Flood Insurance Rate Maps (FIRMs). FEMA creates FIRMs to inform flood insurance pricing in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) and to guide floodplain management regulations for NFIP-participating communities.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is located in a county with an average wildfire risk greater than 4.70% of counties in the United States.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwildfirerisk.org\u002F\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on wildfirerisk.org\"},\"insuranceTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire insurance\"},\"insuranceFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Most homeowners insurance typically includes fire coverage but in some areas, this will need to be purchased separately. Investing in fire insurance is one way to offset the cost of wildfire damage, and can help reduce your financial risk.\"},\"insuranceDescription\":{\"value\":\"Fire insurance for this home ranges from $713 to $1323 per year, based on information from 6 providers.\"},\"insuranceLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002F1str.ee\u002Ft\u002Fhippo\u002Ffire\u002F390412945?source\\u003dredfin\"},\"insuranceLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Get a quote\"}},\"heatDataV2\":{\"fsid\":390412945,\"climateId\":\"heat\",\"expandableHeading\":\"3\u002F10 Heat Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"7 days above 96° expected this year, 17 days in 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Hot days over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. Heat Factor™ uses the First Street Extreme Heat Model to determine property-specific heat risk across the United States. The model is a spatial temperature model that determines a specific location’s exposure to extreme heat events based on the surface temperature, topography, land cover, and humidity in the surrounding area.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Heat Factor indicates its risk of extreme heat exposure over the next thirty years, ranging from 1 (minimal risk) to 10 (extreme risk). Heat Factors are based on the current average daily high temperature and humidity of a property’s specific location during the hottest month of the year, and considers how it’s expected to grow over the next 30 years.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fheat?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on current and future temperature and humidity in the area and at this specific location, this property has moderate heat risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":3,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s heat risk is increasing as weather patterns change.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Hot days over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows the number of days exceeding what is considered a hot day at this property. This is defined by using the 98th percentile “feels like” temperature in this area, or the hottest 7 days in the 4km area surrounding this property for a given year and using the lowest “high” temperature from those 7 days as a base. A property may have more or less hot days than the surrounding area depending on its individual exposure to heat.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"A “hot day” in this area is considered to be any day with a “feels like” temperature of 96º. Over the next 30 years, this property is expected to see a 10% increase in the number of hot days per year.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":7.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":9.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":10.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":12.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":14.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":15.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":17.0,\"yMax0\":39,\"yMax5\":48,\"yMax10\":58,\"yMax15\":67,\"yMax20\":76,\"yMax25\":86,\"yMax30\":95,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390412945\u002F390412945_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#heat\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all heat data on firststreet.org\"}},\"airData\":{\"fsid\":390412945,\"climateId\":\"air\",\"expandableHeading\":\"3\u002F10 Air Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"2 unhealthy days expected this year, 3 days in 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Air Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Air Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Poor air quality days over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"A property\\u0027s Air Factor indicates the number of poor air quality days it will experience over the next 30 years, from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Air Factor scores are more likely to experience poor air quality days today and in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.redfin.com\u002Fguides\u002Fclimate-change-housing-impact\u002Fair-risk\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more about air quality\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on the expected number of poor air quality days where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100, this area has moderate air quality risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":3,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s air risk is increasing as weather patterns change.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Poor air quality days over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows the change in the number of poor air quality days over time, where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100. These are the expected number of poor air quality days in a bad year, which is defined as a year with higher than average wildfire activity. This increases the amount of particulate matter (PM2.5) in the air and therefore worsens air quality.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"Over the next 30 years, this area will experience a 50.0% increase in the number of poor air quality days, i.e. where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":3.0,\"yMax0\":63,\"yMax5\":63,\"yMax10\":63,\"yMax15\":95,\"yMax20\":95,\"yMax25\":95,\"yMax30\":95,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390412945\u002F390412945_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#air\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all air data on firststreet.org\"}}},\"homeHighlightsTagsInfo\":[\"STAMPED CONCRETE PATIO\",\"STAINLESS APPLIANCES\",\"RECESSED LIGHTING\",\"FENCED YARD\",\"OPEN KITCHEN\",\"QUARTZ COUNTERTOPS\"],\"buyingPowerInfo\":{\"formHeaderDisclaimerTitle\":\"Disclaimer\",\"formHeaderDisclaimer\":\"This tool is for general informational purposes only. Learn more at \\u003ca href\\u003d\\\"https:\u002F\u002Fredfin.com\u002Fafba\\\" target\\u003d\\\"_blank\\\"\\u003eredfin.com\u002Fafba\\u003c\u002Fa\\u003e.\\n\",\"affordabilityDisclaimerTitle\":\"How buying power is calculated\",\"affordabilityDisclaimer\":\"We use your income and monthly debt to come up with your debt-to-income ratio, or DTI. We base your buying power on your DTI. We calculate your buying power based on a DTI of 36%, which is the general rule around how much of your income should go toward debt.\\n\\nThe ranges below will help you understand if you have enough income to live comfortably for the selected home price. A general guide is to budget around 28% of your pre-tax income for your mortgage payment, and another 8% for other debts.\\n\\nAffordable: 0%-36%\\nStretch: 37%-50%\\nAmbitious: Above 50%\",\"regionName\":\"Streetsboro\",\"regionTypeId\":2,\"regionId\":19019}}}","type":"application\u002Fjson","status":200,"statusType":2,"info":false,"ok":true,"clientError":false,"serverError":false,"error":false,"accepted":false,"noContent":false,"badRequest":false,"unauthorized":false,"notAcceptable":false,"notFound":false,"forbidden":false}},"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo":{"url":"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo","requestData":{"urlPath":"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo","method":"GET","queryParams":[{"propertyId":66441197,"accessLevel":1,"listingId":208554209,"pageType":1}],"postParams":null,"type":"json"},"requesters":1,"loaded":true,"res":{"_hasBody":true,"text":"{}&&{\"version\":631,\"errorMessage\":\"Success\",\"resultCode\":0,\"payload\":{\"mainHouseInfo\":{\"listingId\":208554209,\"openHousesDisplayLevel\":1,\"videoOpenHouses\":[],\"hotnessInfo\":{\"isHot\":false,\"hotnessMessageInfoWithTourLink\":{\"hotnessMessageAction\":\"go tour it now\"}},\"source\":{\"dataSourceId\":159,\"dataSourceDescription\":\"Northern Ohio Regional MLS (Yes MLS)\",\"dataSourceName\":\"MLSNOW\",\"shouldShowLargerLogo\":false},\"listingAgents\":[{\"agentInfo\":{\"agentName\":\"Debbie Wolff\",\"isAgentNameBlank\":false,\"isRedfinAgent\":false,\"isPartnerAgent\":false,\"isExternalAgent\":false},\"brokerName\":\"Siracki Realty, LTD.\",\"isOpendoor\":false}],\"buyingAgents\":[],\"lastCheckedDate\":1773174870028,\"lastUpdatedDate\":1773168910500,\"remarksDisplayLevel\":1,\"marketingRemarks\":[{\"marketingRemark\":\"Nice refreshed home on one level. Grab this house now. There is one step up into the primary suite and one step up to the rear stamped concrete patio in the fenced yard. Be sure to notice that the yard extends in the rear to the tree line beyond the fenced yard. The rooms around the open kitchen give you the freedom to set up the way your furniture feels right. All the stainless appliances are approx. 3-4 years old and the Quartz countertops and recessed lighting make the place shine. 2023 brand new rear slider, garage doors and smart garage door openers were installed. The sump pump and drainage were also done to complete things. The washer and dryer are included in the utility room off of the hall full bath. The roof is about 5 years old the appliances are 4 or less years old. The 4th bedroom will still hold a queen bed even if you use the craft counter\u002Fcabinets. Come add some plantings in the front for a bit more curb appeal, move right in. Room sizes are approx. Home is \\u0026quot;as is\\u0026quot; and ready for move in. lovely, cozy home located on a quiet cul-de-sac in Camelot Village is a must see!!!! The well-kept 2-bedroom, 2 full bath mobile\u002Fmanufactured home offers fresh paint, new furnace, a family room, nicely sized kitchen, laundry room, large deck, two off street parking spaces, and a shed for lawn equipment\u002Fstorage. Community amenities include a park\u002Fplayground, basketball court, pavilion, activities for families throughout the year, and convenient location close to shopping and main roads!\",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5188399\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":41000,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"level\":1},\"beds\":2,\"baths\":2.0,\"fullBaths\":2,\"stories\":1.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"1517 Lady Anne\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"value\":\" \",\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Streetsboro\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44241\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44241\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":66405982,\"listingId\":212432253,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":15,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":1282611034,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-21:0\",\"level\":1},\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002F1517-Lady-Anne-44241\u002Fhome\u002F66405982\",\"sashes\":[],\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Welcome home! This 2 bedroom 2 full bath home is perfect for whether you\\u0027re looking for your first home or looking to downsize. Large eat in kitchen offers center island with stove and plenty of cabinets for storage that flows seamlessly into a spacious family room with vaulted ceilings. This lovely home offers a dedicated laundry room with cabinets and an exterior storage shed and a 1 car attached garage. Lot rent includes water and trash. Being sold AS IS\",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5185129\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":329900,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":1200,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":275,\"level\":1},\"beds\":3,\"baths\":2.0,\"fullBaths\":2,\"stories\":1.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"2353 W Hale Dr\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"value\":\" \",\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Hudson\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44236\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44236\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"soldDate\":1756882800000,\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":66186622,\"listingId\":212441535,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":15,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":1225632078,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-14:0\",\"level\":1},\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FHudson\u002F2353-W-Hale-Dr-44236\u002Fhome\u002F66186622\",\"sashes\":[],\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Welcome to your dream RANCH home, a haven of modern comfort and style, ideally situated on almost an acre of land in the highly rated Hudson School district. This stunning residence boasts three bedrooms with new carpet and two fully updated bathrooms, featuring all brand-new fixtures that shine with contemporary elegance. These updates include the vanities, showers, tile, toilets and flooring! As you step inside, be embraced by the warmth of fresh paint and brand-new flooring that extends throughout the house, setting the stage for your family\\u0027s cherished memories. The heart of the home, a fully updated kitchen, is equipped with a suite of new appliances, including a dishwasher, microwav\",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5189732\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":625000,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":2615,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":239,\"level\":1},\"beds\":5,\"baths\":4.0,\"fullBaths\":4,\"stories\":2.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"970 S Chillicothe Rd\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"value\":\" \",\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Aurora\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44202\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44202\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":75379922,\"listingId\":212564718,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":12,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":951833314,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-49:0\",\"level\":1},\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FAurora\u002F970-S-Chillicothe-Rd-44202\u002Fhome\u002F75379922\",\"sashes\":[],\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Set on 2.76 acres, this expansive and versatile property offers over 2,600 square feet of living space with exceptional flexibility and a wide range of potential uses. A circular gravel driveway provides ample parking, complemented by a new roof in 2025 and multiple access points throughout the property. The main residence features a large living room with a wood burning fireplace, two first floor bedrooms, a full bathroom, and a fully applianced updated kitchen. A rear first floor entrance adds convenience and accessibility. The second level offers a spacious living or entertaining area, a bedroom with a full bathroom, its own private entrance, and a dedicated furnace. Now offering this fantastic opportunity in the heart of Streetsboro! This spacious 1 floor twin plex totals 1944 sq ft! Two units with 2 bedrooms and 1 full bath each and sharing a laundry room. Conveniently located just in from the intersection of 14\u002F303 and 43. Providing tenants walkable access to Giant Eagle, Target, restaurants and public transit! Starting with the left side unit, you enter through the eat-in kitchen. Yes, those are granite countertops! Quality cabinetry, breakfast bar peninsula and gas range, microwave and refrigerator that remain. Follow the LVT flooring through the beautiful french doors into the very large living room. Tucked away on a premium wooded lot in one of Streetsboro’s most sought-after neighborhoods, this newer 2022-built home blends modern comfort with peaceful, family-friendly living. From there, the open-concept layout unfolds into a spacious living room and stunning kitchen that’s made for gathering. Outside you will enjoy a large corner lot, on a quiet street that features a fenced in yard and a spacious 2 car garage with shelving for additional storage. a rare opportunity just minutes from Kent State University. This 4 bedroom home is perfectly suited for a savvy investor looking for high rental demand or a primary resident seeking a home that can pay for itself. The spacious layout offers flexible living options, whether used as a generous single-family residence or leveraged for student housing income. A convenient two car garage is also a bonus with this home. This property is a standout in the Kent market. Don\\u0027t miss out on this turnkey investment with long-term growth potential.\",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5186196\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":429000,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":2564,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":167,\"level\":1},\"beds\":4,\"baths\":2.5,\"fullBaths\":2,\"partialBaths\":1,\"stories\":2.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"3313 Crown Pointe Dr\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Stow\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44224\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44224\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":66280601,\"listingId\":211872732,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":28,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":2422366636,\"level\":1},\"originalTimeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":2422366637,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-2:2,3-5:1\",\"level\":1},\"additionalPhotosInfo\":[],\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FStow\u002F3313-Crown-Pointe-Dr-44224\u002Fhome\u002F66280601\",\"sashes\":[],\"newConstructionCommunityInfo\":{},\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Welcome to this move-in-ready home in the heart of Stow! The main floor features an inviting layout with hardwood floors in the entry and dining room, fresh flooring in the kitchen and living room, and a convenient main-floor laundry. The living room boasts like-new carpeting. All bedrooms are located on the second floor, including a spacious master suite featuring a large attached bonus room. With 2 full baths upstairs and a half-bath on the main level, the layout is perfectly balanced. Prepare meals in a functional kitchen equipped with stainless steel and black appliances. The exterior offers great curb appeal with well-maintained vinyl siding and a solid roof. Special highlights Team\",\"agentType\":2,\"photoUrl74x110\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F65469\u002F500x500\u002Fgen74x110\u002F8_32.jpg\",\"photoUrl120x120\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F65469\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_32.jpg\",\"gender\":4,\"hasPhotos\":true,\"jobTitle\":\"Partner Agent\",\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F65469\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_32.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+12169731402\",\"quote\":\"As an experienced REALTOR and Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist with an intimate knowledge of the Chagrin Valley and Cleveland\\u0027s suburbs, Mike enjoys putting his knowledge and professionalism to work for his clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nAs one of the areas top producing REALTORS, Mike’s driving purpose is to help you reach your real estate goals. Whether that means outperforming the market in the sale of your home or getting you into a new one, he is ready to become your trusted adviser, negotiate on your behalf, and reach a win-win agreement as quickly and painlessly as possible.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe mission of Advantage Group is first and foremost, to help clients buy low and sell high, and to exceed their expectations on every level along the way. Their belief that long-term client relationships built on integrity and trust are the key to success. The Advantage Group\\u0027s customized approach is tailored to the clients\\u0027 needs, but it always includes an unwavering commitment to accountability and superior customer service.\\r\\n\\r\\nMike holds a B.A. in Economics from John Carroll University and lives in South Russell with his wife, Michaela, and their three children.\",\"__g_id\":\"1057425955\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772485500621,true,\"advantage-group-exp\",null,2,true,\"Westlake\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As an experienced REALTOR and Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist with an intimate knowledge of the Chagrin Valley and Cleveland\\u0027s suburbs, Mike enjoys putting his knowledge and professionalism to work for his clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nAs one of the areas top producing REALTORS, Mike’s driving purpose is to help you reach your real estate goals. Whether that means outperforming the market in the sale of your home or getting you into a new one, he is ready to become your trusted adviser, negotiate on your behalf, and reach a win-win agreement as quickly and painlessly as possible.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe mission of Advantage Group is first and foremost, to help clients buy low and sell high, and to exceed their expectations on every level along the way. Their belief that long-term client relationships built on integrity and trust are the key to success. The Advantage Group\\u0027s customized approach is tailored to the clients\\u0027 needs, but it always includes an unwavering commitment to accountability and superior customer service.\\r\\n\\r\\nMike holds a B.A. in Economics from John Carroll University and lives in South Russell with his wife, Michaela, and their three children.\",\"Rural East Team\",\"lastName\":\"Schikowski\",\"agentType\":2,\"photoUrl74x110\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen74x110\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"photoUrl120x120\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"gender\":1,\"hasPhotos\":true,\"jobTitle\":\"Partner Agent\",\"numReviews\":1,\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+14402797309\",\"quote\":\"Kayla Schikowski began her real estate career in 2019 and has been a dedicated agent ever since. Initially, the complexities of real estate transactions presented a challenge, but through diligent self-education, she has developed an exceptional understanding of the industry, successfully navigating over 100 transactions totaling over $20,000,000. Her six years of experience enable her to provide clients with expert-level service. She remains keenly aware of the initial uncertainties that often accompany real estate transactions, ensuring clients feel comfortable and confident throughout the process. Building strong client relationships is of paramount importance to Kayla. She is committed to providing the best possible experience and takes great pride in the high percentage of her business generated through referrals. For those seeking a knowledgeable, personable agent who prioritizes their interests and offers comprehensive real estate education, Kayla Schikowski is an ideal choice.\",\"__g_id\":\"1316504554\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772578707152,true,\"kayla-schikowski\",null,2,true,\"Mason\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"Kayla Schikowski began her real estate career in 2019 and has been a dedicated agent ever since. She remains keenly aware of the initial uncertainties that often accompany real estate transactions, ensuring clients feel comfortable and confident throughout the process. Building strong client relationships is of paramount importance to Kayla. She is committed to providing the best possible experience and takes great pride in the high percentage of her business generated through referrals. Whether you\\u0026rsquo;re an investor looking for strong rental potential or an owner-occupant wanting to offset your mortgage, this property checks every box. The Front house is a 2 bed 1 bath and the rear house is a 3 bed 1 bath with a fenced in back yard. Both homes have been completely remodeled and offer a turnkey experience. Major updates include roofs within the last five years, newer furnaces, and newer hot water tanks. New vinyl windows and new exterior doors provide efficiency and curb appeal. Inside, both homes feature fully renovated kitchens with soft-close cabinetry, Tucked away on a premium wooded lot in one of Streetsboro’s most sought-after neighborhoods, this newer 2022-built home blends modern comfort with peaceful, family-friendly living. Outside you will enjoy a large corner lot, on a quiet street that features a fenced in yard and a spacious 2 car garage with shelving for additional storage. },\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":1350,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":148,\"level\":1},\"beds\":4,\"baths\":1.5,\"fullBaths\":1,\"partialBaths\":1,\"stories\":2.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"3550 Sanford Ave\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Stow\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44224\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44224\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"soldDate\":1658473200000,\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":66238941,\"listingId\":212734075,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":5,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":447050358,\"level\":1},\"originalTimeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":447050359,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-16:0\",\"level\":1},\"additionalPhotosInfo\":[],\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FStow\u002F3550-Sanford-Ave-44224\u002Fhome\u002F66238941\",\"sashes\":[],\"newConstructionCommunityInfo\":{},\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Discover a rare opportunity just minutes from Kent State University. This 4 bedroom home is perfectly suited for a savvy investor looking for high rental demand or a primary resident seeking a home that can pay for itself. The spacious layout offers flexible living options, whether used as a generous single-family residence or leveraged for student housing income. A convenient two car garage is also a bonus with this home. This property is a standout in the Kent market. Don\\u0027t miss out on this turnkey investment with long-term growth potential.\",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5186196\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":429000,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":2564,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":167,\"level\":1},\"beds\":4,\"baths\":2.5,\"fullBaths\":2,\"partialBaths\":1,\"stories\":2.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"3313 Crown Pointe Dr\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Stow\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44224\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44224\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":66280601,\"listingId\":211872732,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":28,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":2422458553,\"level\":1},\"originalTimeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":2422458554,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-2:2,3-5:1\",\"level\":1},\"additionalPhotosInfo\":[],\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FStow\u002F3313-Crown-Pointe-Dr-44224\u002Fhome\u002F66280601\",\"sashes\":[],\"newConstructionCommunityInfo\":{},\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Welcome to this move-in-ready home in the heart of Stow! The main floor features an inviting layout with hardwood floors in the entry and dining room, fresh flooring in the kitchen and living room, and a convenient main-floor laundry. The living room boasts like-new carpeting. All bedrooms are located on the second floor, including a spacious master suite featuring a large attached bonus room. With 2 full baths upstairs and a half-bath on the main level, the layout is perfectly balanced. Prepare meals in a functional kitchen equipped with stainless steel and black appliances. The exterior offers great curb appeal with well-maintained vinyl siding and a solid roof. Special highlights Our mission is to make your real estate dreams a reality, providing exceptional service and expertise every step of the way.\\r\\nWhy Choose Us?\\r\\n\\r\\nLocal Expertise: Born and raised in Northeastern Ohio, our team has an in-depth understanding of the local market trends, neighborhoods, and hidden gems. We leverage this knowledge to help our clients make informed decisions.\\r\\n\\r\\nClient-Centric Approach: Your satisfaction is our top priority. We take the time to understand your unique needs and tailor our services to exceed your expectations. For buyers, we stay ahead of the curve to identify the best opportunities in the market.\\r\\n\\r\\nReady to embark on your real estate journey with the Jones Group? Contact us anytime as we look forward to helping you achieve your real estate goals! an experienced REALTOR and Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist with an intimate knowledge of the Chagrin Valley and Cleveland\\u0027s suburbs, Mike enjoys putting his knowledge and professionalism to work for his clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nAs one of the areas top producing REALTORS, Mike’s driving purpose is to help you reach your real estate goals. Whether that means outperforming the market in the sale of your home or getting you into a new one, he is ready to become your trusted adviser, negotiate on your behalf, and reach a win-win agreement as quickly and painlessly as possible.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe mission of Advantage Group is first and foremost, to help clients buy low and sell high, and to exceed their expectations on every level along the way. Their belief that long-term client relationships built on integrity and trust are the key to success. The Advantage Group\\u0027s customized approach is tailored to the clients\\u0027 needs, but it always includes an unwavering commitment to accountability and superior customer service.\\r\\n\\r\\nMike holds a B.A. in Economics from John Carroll University and lives in South Russell with his wife, Michaela, and their three children.\",\"__g_id\":\"1812672100\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772485500621,true,\"advantage-group-exp\",null,2,true,\"Westlake\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As an experienced REALTOR and Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist with an intimate knowledge of the Chagrin Valley and Cleveland\\u0027s suburbs, Mike enjoys putting his knowledge and professionalism to work for his clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nAs one of the areas top producing REALTORS, Mike’s driving purpose is to help you reach your real estate goals. Whether that means outperforming the market in the sale of your home or getting you into a new one, he is ready to become your trusted adviser, negotiate on your behalf, and reach a win-win agreement as quickly and painlessly as possible.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe mission of Advantage Group is first and foremost, to help clients buy low and sell high, and to exceed their expectations on every level along the way. Their belief that long-term client relationships built on integrity and trust are the key to success. The Advantage Group\\u0027s customized approach is tailored to the clients\\u0027 needs, but it always includes an unwavering commitment to accountability and superior customer service.\\r\\n\\r\\nMike holds a B.A. in Economics from John Carroll University and lives in South Russell with his wife, Michaela, and their three children.\",\"Rural East e\":1,\"algorithmType\":0,\"boilerPlateLDPExperimentsToRun\":[],\"boilerPlateSDPExperimentsToRun\":[],\"isUserLoggedIn\":false,\"canCominglePartnerAgents\":true,\"agentRequestAgents\":[{\"profileUrl\":\"\u002Freal-estate-agents\u002Fkayla-schikowski\",\"teamName\":\"Redfin Team\",\"lastName\":\"Schikowski\",\"agentType\":2,\"photoUrl74x110\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen74x110\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"photoUrl120x120\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"gender\":1,\"hasPhotos\":true,\"jobTitle\":\"Partner Agent\",\"numReviews\":1,\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+14402797309\",\"quote\":\"Kayla Schikowski began her real estate career in 2019 and has been a dedicated agent ever since. Initially, the complexities of real estate transactions presented a challenge, but through diligent self-education, she has developed an exceptional understanding of the industry, successfully navigating over 100 transactions totaling over $20,000,000. Her six years of experience enable her to provide clients with expert-level service. She remains keenly aware of the initial uncertainties that often accompany real estate transactions, ensuring clients feel comfortable and confident throughout the process. Building strong client relationships is of paramount importance to Kayla. She is committed to providing the best possible experience and takes great pride in the high percentage of her business generated through referrals. For those seeking a knowledgeable, personable agent who prioritizes their interests and offers comprehensive real estate education, Kayla Schikowski is an ideal choice.\",\"__g_id\":\"1640629982\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772578707152,true,\"kayla-schikowski\",null,2,true,\"Mason\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"Kayla Schikowski began her real estate career in 2019 and has been a dedicated agent ever since. Initially, the complexities of real estate transactions presented a challenge, but through diligent self-education, she has developed an exceptional understanding of the industry, successfully navigating over 100 transactions totaling over $20,000,000. Her six years of experience enable her to provide clients with expert-level service. She remains keenly aware of the initial uncertainties that often accompany real estate transactions, ensuring clients feel comfortable and confident throughout the process. Building strong client relationships is of paramount importance to Kayla. She is committed to providing the best possible experience and takes great pride in the high percentage of her business generated through referrals. For those seeking a knowledgeable, personable agent who prioritizes their interests and offers comprehensive real estate education, Kayla Schikowski is an ideal choice.\",\"East Side
