2026\",\"timelineDisplayLevel\":1},\"schoolsAndDistrictsInfo\":{\"servingThisHomeSchools\":[{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":3,\"distanceInMiles\":\"3.5\",\"gradeRanges\":\"PreK-5\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Davey Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F46294\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FDavey-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F46294\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FDavey-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":46294,\"numberOfStudents\":442,\"fullAddress\":\"196 N Prospect St, Kent, OH 44240\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":5,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":11,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fkent.k12.oh.us\u002Fkcs\u002Fcampus\u002Fdavey.php\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46046419,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2023\",\"review\":\"I did not like this school, It was sexist let girls do mostly what they want.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":5942654,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046418,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2022\",\"review\":\"My daughter has been attending Pre-K here for about a year and we\\u0027ve had zero problems. I like my daughter\\u0027s teacher, Mrs. Harvey. She seems very knowledgeable, attentive, down-to-earth, and compassionate. As a family, we\\u0027ve been having a pretty tough year, but the school has been so understanding and I haven\\u0027t had any issues. What I\\u0027m most impressed about is that the school has recognized my daughter has some physical problems. They jumped right on it and assigned her a physical therapist which she sees during class! Wow! Thank you! Also, I thought it was neat that they offer in-school dental care. I\\u0027ve been having the hardest time finding pediatric dentists around Kent that accept Medicaid, so this was a convenient way for my kiddo to get treated. My daughter doesn\\u0027t have behavioral problems, so it\\u0027s been a breeze. I\\u0027d recommend this school. I\\u0027m very happy so far!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":5688015,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046417,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2015\",\"review\":\"Whatever you do- do NOT send your children here. The principal is a joke and lacks empathy- she will dismiss all your concerns and side ALWAYS with the teachers. Kindergarten \\u0026 first grade teachers are awesome but a certain 2nd grade teacher will make a point to pick on your child... Completely disappointed in this school and I am looking to send my children else where. What a waste of our taxes.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1804033,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14735367,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2014\",\"review\":\"We moved my child to Davey this past year and could not be happier with how his year went. The faculty and teachers have all been great. I was worried how our son would transition to a new school but everyone was wonderful at making him feel welcome. It did not take him long at all to make friends and his grades and involvement improved noticeably. Would recommend to anyone moving into Kent.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1497840,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5955589,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2012\",\"review\":\"This school has horrible counseling, and does nothing to help with bullying. That is why my kids now go to private schools.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1152862,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":178564,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"2\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178565,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178566,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making average academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":7038,\"districtName\":\"Kent City School District\",\"address\":\"321 North Depeyster Street\",\"city\":\"Kent\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44240\",\"latitude\":41.156673,\"longitude\":-81.355675,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.kentschools.net\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002Fkent-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":true,\"middle\":false,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":true,\"greatSchoolsRating\":7,\"parentRating\":2,\"distanceInMiles\":\"3.0\",\"gradeRanges\":\"K-5\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Walls Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F47946\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FWalls-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F47946\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FWalls-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":47946,\"numberOfStudents\":359,\"fullAddress\":\"900 Doramor St, Kent, OH 44240\",\"numReviews\":6,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":16,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fkent.k12.oh.us\u002Fkcs\u002Fcampus\u002Fwalls.php\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46046555,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2023\",\"review\":\"We’re done with this school. Don’t buy a home in this community. The bullying was too much for my child, the curriculum wasn’t enough.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5810373,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046554,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2022\",\"review\":\"Excellent teaching staff in our experience with 2 children attending the school. Ms. Wilbur and Mr. Hawks are phenomenal just to name a couple. They will work with parents when children need support; my child has had so much success with the 504 we have created and with nothing but full support and dedication from the staff. I have heard other schools are terrible about this, Not Walls. This school seems quite progressive with curriculum and understanding of children’s behavioral health. The guidance counselor Whitney Slater is magnificent and kids are encouraged to check in with her any time they are struggling or just need support. The principal is not extraordinarily friendly and certainly has a tendency to be a bit harsh, but the structure and philosophy at Walls are terrific, so a lot is going right under her leadership. Other parents I know also have great things to say. Both my husband and I attended Walls as Children so it’s cool to see how the little school is growing and changing.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5633353,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046553,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2021\",\"review\":\"Very disappointed in how these past few years have gone, the parking lot is a mess pickup\u002Fdrop off. They have the walkers going through the grass to leave(absolute mess during rain and winter.) no sidewalks going around back. Principal Singer doesn’t seem to care. Been going to this school for years now and she isn’t friendly. Truly disappointed in how things are going, considering homeschooling.Haven’t heard anything good about her at all. Also recess monitors truly lack in their duties, overlook bullying and playground violence. They just don’t care.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5103726,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046552,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2021\",\"review\":\"From the top down, leadership is lacking. Deliberate absence of discipline and respect for staff is seen from the principal. The school has lost a great amount of quality students and teachers due to the overall absence of control at the administrative level.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5035007,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046551,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2019\",\"review\":\"I\\u0027ve never been impressed by this school, but it\\u0027s the school closest to where my family lives for now, so my children have to go here. I\\u0027m mostly unimpressed with the principal, Mrs. Singer.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":4213356,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046550,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2019\",\"review\":\"My oldest had Dr motley awesome. The next one was a room down from bb gun. The next Mrs. Singer went from best to worst.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":3946826,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":182489,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"7\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182488,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"4\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182486,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":7038,\"districtName\":\"Kent City School District\",\"address\":\"321 44240\",\"numReviews\":8,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":11,\"websiteUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.kentschools.net\u002Fstanton\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051128,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2025\",\"review\":\"This school is horrible the teaching is not helping at all The safety of the school just walk straight in and then people are getting their lunches stolen fights are breaking out and drama is going around the whole school this place needs to be shut down\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":7259097,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051127,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2025\",\"review\":\"No support for children with disabilities, not many options and staff seems to not specialize in children with disabilities. Their whole staff works together to protect each other even when wrong instead of protecting the parents and children. The teachers are mean to the children with disabilities and the black guy i believe is assistant principal is very mean rude and nasty. Teachers need to become more educated with children with disabilities and instead of implementing more knowledge or anything of the sort to inform teachers on how to deal with the behaviors of the children with disabilities. I give this school 0\u002F10. No compassion no nothing.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":7079162,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051126,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2023\",\"review\":\"The current administration is very \\\"woke\\\" and full of soft bigotry of low expectation toward certain identity groups. Turned our straight A student into straight F\\u0027s. Continuous danger of violence toward certain identity groups. This institution is currently failing, as you can see by its rating and comments from other concerned parents.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5904275,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051125,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2023\",\"review\":\"This school has bullying problems that the administration does not address not to mention the administration is also very rude and disrespectful with there they think they know it all attitude\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5752232,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051124,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2022\",\"review\":\"the assistant principal acts like she owns the place and is horrible\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5715415,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051123,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2022\",\"review\":\"This school has some really great teachers that teach here. The food is alright, and overall, it\\u0027s a good-ish school. Sure, you can make some really great friends here, most of the students here are very nice. But there are many students here that aren\\u0027t so nice. And when I reported to one of the teachers that my friend with a disability was getting bullied, the teacher simply didn\\u0027t care. I dislike it when I walk into the bathroom and there\\u0027s a cloud of smoke, or I walk into an inappropriate scene because a school shouldn\\u0027t have that sort of thing. But thankfully the principal has tried to \\\"fix\\\" the issue with the students. But all he\\u0027s done really is just ask them not to anymore. The counselors seem nice at first, but then all they do is nothing that\\u0027s actually helpful. (In my personal experience.) But, this isn\\u0027t the same as for all the teachers, most of them are very kind, friendly, and genuinely care about their job. But a lot of the eighth-graders aren\\u0027t nice though. But I would recommend it if you\\u0027re in the 6th or 7th grade. Because then again most of the people here are really nice and helpful. And the teaching methods they used I found to be extremely helpful, and useful. They go at a pace that helps me. Especially since I have some things mentally wrong with me, I find them to be extremely useful, and helpful. They also don\\u0027t give too much homework, which is nice.\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5250078,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051122,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2019\",\"review\":\"Highly disappointed with administrators who suggested I home school my child who has had many absences d\u002Ft chronic illness. No summer school is even available unless he’s failing core classes. School work he’s brought home is full of grammatical errors \\u0026 ambiguity. One PART TIME guidance counselor for the entire school. Bullying isn’t addressed or investigated. My son is miserable so we’re moving out of Kent.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":4179833,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":178571,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"4\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178570,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The amount of classes and opportunities offered to the students is extraordinary. This is the best school in North East Ohio by far.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":1446434,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949526,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2010\",\"review\":\"My daughter LOVES going to school! The teachers give 110% and the classes are challenging.\",\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":1014287,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949523,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"July 2007\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":329822,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949524,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2007\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":365068,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":184249,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is about the same as the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":184251,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"3\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":184248,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Don’t buy a home in this community. The bullying was too much for my child, the curriculum wasn’t enough.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5810373,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046554,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2022\",\"review\":\"Excellent teaching staff in our experience with 2 children attending the school. Ms. Wilbur and Mr. Hawks are phenomenal just to name a couple. They will work with parents when children need support; my child has had so much success with the 504 we have created and with nothing but full support and dedication from the staff. I have heard other schools are terrible about this, Not Walls. This school seems quite progressive with curriculum and understanding of children’s behavioral health. The guidance counselor Whitney Slater is magnificent and kids are encouraged to check in with her any time they are struggling or just need support. The principal is not extraordinarily friendly and certainly has a tendency to be a bit harsh, but the structure and philosophy at Walls are terrific, so a lot is going right under her leadership. Other parents I know also have great things to say. Both my husband and I attended Walls as Children so it’s cool to see how the little school is growing and changing.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5633353,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046553,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2021\",\"review\":\"Very disappointed in how these past few years have gone, the parking lot is a mess pickup\u002Fdrop off. They have the walkers going through the grass to leave(absolute mess during rain and winter.) no sidewalks going around back. Principal Singer doesn’t seem to care. Been going to this school for years now and she isn’t friendly. Truly disappointed in how things are going, considering homeschooling.Haven’t heard anything good about her at all. Also recess monitors truly lack in their duties, overlook bullying and playground violence. They just don’t care.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5103726,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046552,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2021\",\"review\":\"From the top down, leadership is lacking. Deliberate absence of discipline and respect for staff is seen from the principal. The school has lost a great amount of quality students and teachers due to the overall absence of control at the administrative level.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5035007,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046551,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2019\",\"review\":\"I\\u0027ve never been impressed by this school, but it\\u0027s the school closest to where my family lives for now, so my children have to go here. 44240\",\"numReviews\":8,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":11,\"websiteUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.kentschools.net\u002Fstanton\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051128,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2025\",\"review\":\"This school is horrible the teaching is not helping at all The safety of the school just walk straight in and then people are getting their lunches stolen fights are breaking out and drama is going around the whole school this place needs to be shut down\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":7259097,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051127,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2025\",\"review\":\"No support for children with disabilities, not many options and staff seems to not specialize in children with disabilities. Their whole staff works together to protect each other even when wrong instead of protecting the parents and children. The teachers are mean to the children with disabilities and the black guy i believe is assistant principal is very mean rude and nasty. Teachers need to become more educated with children with disabilities and instead of implementing more knowledge or anything of the sort to inform teachers on how to deal with the behaviors of the children with disabilities. I give this school 0\u002F10. No compassion no nothing.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":7079162,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051126,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2023\",\"review\":\"The current administration is very \\\"woke\\\" and full of soft bigotry of low expectation toward certain identity groups. Turned our straight A student into straight F\\u0027s. Continuous danger of violence toward certain identity groups. This institution is currently failing, as you can see by its rating and comments from other concerned parents.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5904275,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051125,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2023\",\"review\":\"This school has bullying problems that the administration does not address not to mention the administration is also very rude and disrespectful with there they think they know it all attitude\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5752232,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051124,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2022\",\"review\":\"the assistant principal acts like she owns the place and is horrible\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5715415,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051123,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2022\",\"review\":\"This school has some really great teachers that teach here. The food is alright, and overall, it\\u0027s a good-ish school. Sure, you can make some really great friends here, most of the students here are very nice. But there are many students here that aren\\u0027t so nice. And when I reported to one of the teachers that my friend with a disability was getting bullied, the teacher simply didn\\u0027t care. I dislike it when I walk into the bathroom and there\\u0027s a cloud of smoke, or I walk into an inappropriate scene because a school shouldn\\u0027t have that sort of thing. But thankfully the principal has tried to \\\"fix\\\" the issue with the students. But all he\\u0027s done really is just ask them not to anymore. The counselors seem nice at first, but then all they do is nothing that\\u0027s actually helpful. (In my personal experience.) But, this isn\\u0027t the same as for all the teachers, most of them are very kind, friendly, and genuinely care about their job. But a lot of the eighth-graders aren\\u0027t nice though. But I would recommend it if you\\u0027re in the 6th or 7th grade. Because then again most of the people here are really nice and helpful. And the teaching methods they used I found to be extremely helpful, and useful. They go at a pace that helps me. Especially since I have some things mentally wrong with me, I find them to be extremely useful, and helpful. They also don\\u0027t give too much homework, which is nice.\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5250078,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051122,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2019\",\"review\":\"Highly disappointed with administrators who suggested I home school my child who has had many absences d\u002Ft chronic illness. No summer school is even available unless he’s failing core classes. School work he’s brought home is full of grammatical errors \\u0026 ambiguity. One PART TIME guidance counselor for the entire school. Bullying isn’t addressed or investigated. My son is miserable so we’re moving out of Kent.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":4179833,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":178571,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"4\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178568,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178570,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":7038,\"districtName\":\"Kent City School District\",\"address\":\"321 North Depeyster Street\",\"city\":\"Kent\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44240\",\"latitude\":41.156673,\"longitude\":-81.355675,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.kentschools.net\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002Fkent-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":false,\"middle\":true,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":true,\"greatSchoolsRating\":7,\"parentRating\":5,\"distanceInMiles\":\"2.6\",\"gradeRanges\":\"9-12\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Theodore Roosevelt High School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F98115\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FTheodore-Roosevelt-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F98115\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FTheodore-Roosevelt-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":98115,\"numberOfStudents\":1101,\"fullAddress\":\"1400 N Mantua St, Kent, OH 44240\",\"numReviews\":3,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":12,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fkent.k12.oh.us\u002Fkcs\u002Fcampus\u002Froosevelt.php\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":8949527,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"February 2014\",\"review\":\"My daughter transfered into Roosevelt and she is beyond happy and we are as well. This is an amazing school with amazing staff. Teachers, and administration alike go way out of their way to help students with whatever they need. The amount of classes and opportunities offered to the students is extraordinary. This is the best school in North East Ohio by far.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":1446434,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949526,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2010\",\"review\":\"My daughter LOVES going to school! The teachers give 110% and the classes are challenging.\",\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":1014287,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949523,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"July 2007\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":329822,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949524,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2007\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":365068,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":184249,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is about the same as the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":184251,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"3\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":184248,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F46294\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FDavey-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F46294\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FDavey-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":46294,\"numberOfStudents\":442,\"fullAddress\":\"196 44240\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":5,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":11,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fkent.k12.oh.us\u002Fkcs\u002Fcampus\u002Fdavey.php\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46046419,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2023\",\"review\":\"I did not like this school, It was sexist let girls do mostly what they want.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":5942654,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046418,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2022\",\"review\":\"My daughter has been attending Pre-K here for about a year and we\\u0027ve had zero problems. I like my daughter\\u0027s teacher, Mrs. Harvey. She seems very knowledgeable, attentive, down-to-earth, and compassionate. As a family, we\\u0027ve been having a pretty tough year, but the school has been so understanding and I haven\\u0027t had any issues. What I\\u0027m most impressed about is that the school has recognized my daughter has some physical problems. They jumped right on it and assigned her a physical therapist which she sees during class! Wow! Thank you! Also, I thought it was neat that they offer in-school dental care. I\\u0027ve been having the hardest time finding pediatric dentists around Kent that accept Medicaid, so this was a convenient way for my kiddo to get treated. My daughter doesn\\u0027t have behavioral problems, so it\\u0027s been a breeze. I\\u0027d recommend this school. I\\u0027m very happy so far!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":5688015,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046417,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2015\",\"review\":\"Whatever you do- do NOT send your children here. The principal is a joke and lacks empathy- she will dismiss all your concerns and side ALWAYS with the teachers. Kindergarten \\u0026 first grade teachers are awesome but a certain 2nd grade teacher will make a point to pick on your child... Completely disappointed in this school and I am looking to send my children else where. What a waste of our taxes.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1804033,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14735367,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2014\",\"review\":\"We moved my child to Davey this past year and could not be happier with how his year went. The faculty and teachers have all been great. I was worried how our son would transition to a new school but everyone was wonderful at making him feel welcome. It did not take him long at all to make friends and his grades and involvement improved noticeably. Would recommend to anyone moving into Kent.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1497840,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5955589,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2012\",\"review\":\"This school has horrible counseling, and does nothing to help with bullying. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182594,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"7\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":9859,\"districtName\":\"Streetsboro City School District\",\"address\":\"9000 Kirby Lane\",\"city\":\"Streetsboro\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44241\",\"latitude\":41.236404,\"longitude\":-81.321419,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.streetsboroschools.com\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002Fstreetsboro-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4094-Streetsboro-Middle-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":false,\"middle\":true,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":2,\"distanceInMiles\":\"1.8\",\"gradeRanges\":\"9-12\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Streetsboro High School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F48004\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002FStreetsboro-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F48004\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002FStreetsboro-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":48004,\"numberOfStudents\":547,\"fullAddress\":\"8585 Ohio 14, Streetsboro, OH 44241\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":3,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":16,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051312,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2022\",\"review\":\"I moved to Ohio and this is my first year in SHS. I really love this school so much, the only thing that is not good is the students would be racist to Asians or blacks. They would say slur words in the hallways during passing period. I used to be in a diverse school so I am not used to the racism. But other than that the teachers are really nice and the students are very social! I feel safer here than my other old school!\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":5681155,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740038,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2015\",\"review\":\"The district is striving towards technology but they are doing too little way to late. 3\u002F4 of the students have technology available to them while the rest have little or none or only what they get at school. Bullying is a huge problem and the principal in the high school is too quick to judge and even though a student reports problems time and time again, as stated something is only done when the victim retaliates and then the victim is punished and informed that the student that was doing the bullying has personal problems and essentially telling you that you have to tolerate them. Then they punish your child. The new principal up there just doesn\\u0027t get it. And his personality really just doesn\\u0027t fit the district. Superintendent is pretty tech savvy and is appears to be trying to move in that direction as fast as he can but the limited awareness of technology in those who make the decision is holding the forward movement back.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":642533,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740039,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2013\",\"review\":\"I feel that the high school does not appropriately deal with bullies. They wait until the victim retaliates and then they punish the victim. Academically they are not doing what they need to do. I have a child on a 504 plan and he is failing every subject so I would say that their accommodations are not working or not being followed. Also, they wait too long to call parents to let them know there is a problem. I was notified when my son had 11 hours of detention to serve but then it was too close to the end of the school year to serve them so they suspended him for 2 days. They treat the students like they are all from the same cookie cut out. I warned them that when my child started to get detentions that it was a sign that he was having trouble emotionally \\u0026 that I needed to notified but they failed to recognize it even after I made them aware.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":1320965,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":182584,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182583,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"4\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182587,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182585,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is about the same as the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":9859,\"districtName\":\"Streetsboro City School District\",\"address\":\"9000 Kirby 2026\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":3,\"distanceInMiles\":\"4.0\",\"gradeRanges\":\"8-12\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Stow-Munroe Falls High School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F106774\u002FOH\u002FStow\u002FStow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F106774\u002FOH\u002FStow\u002FStow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":106774,\"numberOfStudents\":1445,\"fullAddress\":\"3227 Graham Rd, Stow, OH 44224\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":6,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":20,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46046966,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2025\",\"review\":\"The principal be mean to you and the police officers peak over your stall in the bathroom\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":7104781,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046965,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"February 2024\",\"review\":\"The administration is petty and biased as well as ableist. They clearly do not have the best interest of the kids at heart.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":6291390,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046964,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2022\",\"review\":\"This school leaves something to be desired. Teacher-wise there are some gems, for example, Mrs. Merrill, Mrs. Peterre, Mrs. Marcum, Mr. Hinman, and Mrs. Tichnell. I can\\u0027t speak on all of the guidance counselors, but if you have Mrs. Paul and she gets to know you, she is so incredibly helpful. Mr. Treen was the best principal, he built a great rapport with many students and you could really tell that he cared. He is now the principal at Tallmadge High School. Now for the some of the negatives of the school; a lot of their initiatives to help students felt very performative on the staff end of things, students have a good sense of who cares about them and their well-being. An incident that really stuck out was when the school did stuff for pride month. There was a student-led initiative to put up a pride flag and it was torn down. Although there were consequences for the student who tore it down, it was all very private which gave off the impression that the school was not discouraging students from doing such things. Additionally, when a gay teacher resigned from the school, the chalkboard in their classroom was vandalized with homophobic slurs and there were no messages sent out on remind to tell students that discriminatory and hateful behavior is not appropriate and that there will be repercussions for such behavior. There was nothing. That was incredibly disappointing coming from a school district that claims to be inclusive and that boasts slogans like \\\"see something, say something\\\" or that if you\\u0027re a bystander, then you\\u0027re just as bad as the people doing the wrong thing. The performative activism is something that is easy to come across in this world, but that does not mean that we should tolerate it and especially not from the place that is supposed to be modelling behavior for impressionable young students. If we allow it from our schools, then we allow it from our children. When I was a student here, I didn\\u0027t have a say in what school I attended, but I hope that we change this school into a place that students can feel safe, cared for, and that can shape them not only into educated people, but more importantly, good people.\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":5488286,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046963,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"July 2018\",\"review\":\"I\\u0027m an alumnus of SMFHS and can definitely say that I had a positive experience during my time here and was well-prepared for college. I took advantage of the many AP and Honors classes and found the teachers to be engaging and the courses challenging. Plenty of graduates matriculate at Ivy League and other competitive colleges (i.e., Northwestern, American, Carnegie Mellon) for undergraduate and graduate school, as well as excel at the local universities. The music and arts programs are excellent and the sports teams do well in the district. As long as you\\u0027re willing to work hard, take initiative with your education, and get involved, you will absolutely be successful here and prepared for college\u002Flife after high school.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":3500923,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046962,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2017\",\"review\":\"Amazing Clubs and music programs most staff are good and has a great sports team.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":2531111,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8950568,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2014\",\"review\":\"To make this short: For your kid\\u0027s benefit, move to the Hudson, Aurora, or Brecksville-Broadview Hts. school district instead, if possible. Stow-Munroe Falls high school is full of drugs and lowlifes. They rarely clean the school and the staff are extremely mean to the students, and the guidance counselors refuse to help you with any scheduling problems. This school is so fixated on being \\\"average\\\" that they lose sight of the purpose that we are there for: academics and a great education. The regular classes are extremely easy and they refused to let me take any of the AP classes that I requested. They could care less about your future, discouraging academics and encouraging laziness (Yes, the Latin teacher played entertainment movies 3\u002F5 of the days and the other classes rarely did any work). If you are content with your kid being an extremely lazy failure, then send them to SMFHS. I would never EVER send my children to such a rancid school district like Stow. However, there are still worse schools, such as the Akron and Cuyahoga Falls districts.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":1515256,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":171730,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"3\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":171731,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is about the same as the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":171729,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"7\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education.
