Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Minimal risk of severe winds over next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street National Wind Model, which forecasts how hurricanes and costs from resulting wind damages to structures will change over time due to climate change.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Wind Factor indicates its likelihood to experience extreme winds over the next 30 years, from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Wind Factor scores are more likely to experience higher winds more frequently today and in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fwind?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on the likelihood and speed of hurricane, tornado, or severe storm winds reaching this property, it has minimal wind risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s wind risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows this property\\u0027s likelihood of being in a tropical storm event with 3-second wind gusts exceeding 50 mph (39 mph for 1-minute sustained winds) over the next 30 years.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{},\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390430178\u002F390430178_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#wind\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all wind data on firststreet.org\"}},\"floodDataV2\":{\"fsid\":390430178,\"climateId\":\"flood\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Flood Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Minimal risk of a flood reaching the building in the next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor® is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street Flood Model, a nationwide, probabilistic flood model that shows a location’s risk of flooding from rain, rivers, tides, and storm surge. It builds off of decades of peer-reviewed research and forecasts how flood risks will change over time due to changes in the environment. Flood Factor is not intended to include all possible risks of flood.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Flood Factor is an indicator of its comprehensive flood risk, ranging from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Flood Factors are more likely to have flooded in the past, and are more likely to flood in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fflood?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on this property’s projected likelihood and depth of flooding, it has minimal flood risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s flood risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Flood risk accumulates over time. Cumulative risk is calculated to the largest building or center of an empty lot. Raised or elevated buildings may not be as vulnerable as ground-level buildings or buildings with basements.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is unlikely to flood in the next 30 years.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":0.0,\"yMax0\":0,\"yMax5\":0,\"yMax10\":0,\"yMax15\":0,\"yMax20\":0,\"yMax25\":0,\"yMax30\":0,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390430178\u002F390430178_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#flood\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all flood data on firststreet.org\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionTitle\":{\"value\":\"FEMA zone X (unshaded)\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout\":{\"value\":\"The FEMA flood zone shown is the most probable estimated zone.\\n\\nThe Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) is a government agency that maps flood zones in communities across the US, identifying areas of varying flood risk on Flood Insurance Rate Maps (FIRMs). FEMA creates FIRMs to inform flood insurance pricing in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) and to guide floodplain management regulations for NFIP-participating communities.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"http:\u002F\u002Ffloodsmart.gov\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on floodsmart.gov\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout2\":{\"value\":\"The FEMA flood zone shown is the most probable zone as estimated by MassiveCert, Inc.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrl2\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.massivecert.com\u002F\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrlText2\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on massivecert.com\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is estimated to be in FEMA Zone X (unshaded), which is designated as a low-to-moderate risk flood area. In this zone, the risk of flooding is reduced, but not completely removed.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.floodsmart.gov\u002Fflood-map-zone\u002Ffind-yours\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on floodsmart.gov\"},\"insuranceTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood insurance\"},\"insuranceFlyout\":{\"value\":\"To help you understand what it costs to protect this home with flood insurance we\\u0027ve partnered with Neptune Flood. Redfin may receive a commission if you purchase a policy through this link. There may be other flood insurance providers in your area.\"},\"insuranceDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on your estimated FEMA zone, flood insurance is not required. However, FEMA always recommends considering insurance.\\n\\nFlood insurance for this home ranges from $507 to $1088 per year, based on information from 4 providers.\"},\"insuranceLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002F1str.ee\u002Ft\u002Fhippo\u002Fflood\u002F390430178?source\\u003dredfin\"},\"insuranceLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Get an instant quote\"}},\"fireDataV2\":{\"fsid\":390430178,\"climateId\":\"fire\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Fire Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Unlikely to be in a wildfire in next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street National Wildfire Model\\u0027s nationwide, behavioral wildfire model that shows a specific location\\u0027s probabilistic risk of wildfire based on the vegetation, topography, and fire weather in the surrounding area. Fire Factor is not intended to include all possible risks of fire.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Fire Factor indicates its cumulative wildfire risk, ranging from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Fire Factors are more likely to be in a wildfire in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Ffire?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on this property\\u0027s distance to wildfire risk areas and burnable vegetation, it has minimal wildfire risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s fire risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire risk accumulates over time, so a property with a 0.1% chance of wildfire this year would have at least a 3% chance of being affected by wildfire at least once within 30 years. Being affected by wildfire refers to any actively burning fuels coming into contact with the largest building on the property.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"Unlikely to be in a wildfire in next 30 years.\"},\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390430178\u002F390430178_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#fire\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all fire data on firststreet.org\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionTitle\":{\"value\":\"USFS relative risk rank\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout\":{\"value\":\"The Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) is a government agency that maps flood zones in communities across the US, identifying areas of varying flood risk on Flood Insurance Rate Maps (FIRMs). FEMA creates FIRMs to inform flood insurance pricing in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) and to guide floodplain management regulations for NFIP-participating communities.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is located in a county with an average wildfire risk greater than 4.70% of counties in the United States.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwildfirerisk.org\u002F\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on wildfirerisk.org\"},\"insuranceTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire insurance\"},\"insuranceFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Most homeowners insurance typically includes fire coverage but in some areas, this will need to be purchased separately. Investing in fire insurance is one way to offset the cost of wildfire damage, and can help reduce your financial risk.\"},\"insuranceDescription\":{\"value\":\"Fire insurance for this home ranges from $713 to $1323 per year, based on information from 6 providers.\"},\"insuranceLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002F1str.ee\u002Ft\u002Fhippo\u002Ffire\u002F390430178?source\\u003dredfin\"},\"insuranceLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Get a quote\"}},\"heatDataV2\":{\"fsid\":390430178,\"climateId\":\"heat\",\"expandableHeading\":\"2\u002F10 Heat Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"7 days above 96° expected this year, 17 days in 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Hot days over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. Heat Factor™ uses the First Street Extreme Heat Model to determine property-specific heat risk across the United States. The model is a spatial temperature model that determines a specific location’s exposure to extreme heat events based on the surface temperature, topography, land cover, and humidity in the surrounding area.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Heat Factor indicates its risk of extreme heat exposure over the next thirty years, ranging from 1 (minimal risk) to 10 (extreme risk). Heat Factors are based on the current average daily high temperature and humidity of a property’s specific location during the hottest month of the year, and considers how it’s expected to grow over the next 30 years.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fheat?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on current and future temperature and humidity in the area and at this specific location, this property has minor heat risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":2,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s heat risk is increasing as weather patterns change.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Hot days over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows the number of days exceeding what is considered a hot day at this property. This is defined by using the 98th percentile “feels like” temperature in this area, or the hottest 7 days in the 4km area surrounding this property for a given year and using the lowest “high” temperature from those 7 days as a base. A property may have more or less hot days than the surrounding area depending on its individual exposure to heat.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"A “hot day” in this area is considered to be any day with a “feels like” temperature of 96º. Over the next 30 years, this property is expected to see a 10% increase in the number of hot days per year.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":7.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":9.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":10.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":12.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":14.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":15.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":17.0,\"yMax0\":39,\"yMax5\":48,\"yMax10\":58,\"yMax15\":67,\"yMax20\":76,\"yMax25\":86,\"yMax30\":95,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390430178\u002F390430178_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#heat\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all heat data on firststreet.org\"}},\"airData\":{\"fsid\":390430178,\"climateId\":\"air\",\"expandableHeading\":\"3\u002F10 Air Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"2 unhealthy days expected this year, 4 days in 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Air Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Air Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Poor air quality days over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"A property\\u0027s Air Factor indicates the number of poor air quality days it will experience over the next 30 years, from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Air Factor scores are more likely to experience poor air quality days today and in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.redfin.com\u002Fguides\u002Fclimate-change-housing-impact\u002Fair-risk\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more about air quality\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on the expected number of poor air quality days where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100, this area has moderate air quality risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":3,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s air risk is increasing as weather patterns change.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Poor air quality days over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows the change in the number of poor air quality days over time, where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100. These are the expected number of poor air quality days in a bad year, which is defined as a year with higher than average wildfire activity. This increases the amount of particulate matter (PM2.5) in the air and therefore worsens air quality.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"Over the next 30 years, this area will experience a 100.0% increase in the number of poor air quality days, i.e. where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":4.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":4.0,\"yMax0\":48,\"yMax5\":48,\"yMax10\":71,\"yMax15\":71,\"yMax20\":71,\"yMax25\":95,\"yMax30\":95,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390430178\u002F390430178_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#air\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all air data on firststreet.org\"}}},\"buyingPowerInfo\":{\"formHeaderDisclaimerTitle\":\"Disclaimer\",\"formHeaderDisclaimer\":\"This tool is for general informational purposes only. The mortgage you can afford depends on many factors, including your total monthly payment, income, debt obligations, creditworthiness, down payment amount and other factors your lender may consider. It\\u0027s not a substitute for the professional advice of a lender or financial planner. By using this tool, you\\u0027re agreeing to our \\u003ca href\\u003d\\\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.redfin.com\u002Fabout\u002Fterms-of-use\\\" target\\u003d\\\"_blank\\\"\\u003eTerms of Use\\u003c\u002Fa\\u003e and \\u003ca href\\u003d\\\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.redfin.com\u002Fabout\u002Fprivacy-policy\\\" target\\u003d\\\"_blank\\\"\\u003ePrivacy Policy\\u003c\u002Fa\\u003e.\",\"mortgageCTADisclaimerTitle\":\"Disclaimer\",\"mortgageCTADisclaimer\":\"Rocket Mortgage is an affiliate of Redfin. Learn more at \\u003ca href\\u003d\\\"https:\u002F\u002Fredfin.com\u002Fafba\\\" target\\u003d\\\"_blank\\\"\\u003eredfin.com\u002Fafba\\u003c\u002Fa\\u003e.\\n\",\"affordabilityDisclaimerTitle\":\"How buying power is calculated\",\"affordabilityDisclaimer\":\"We use your income and monthly debt to come up with your debt-to-income ratio, or DTI. We base your buying power on your DTI. We calculate your buying power based on a DTI of 36%, which is the general rule around how much of your income should go toward debt.\\n\\nThe ranges below will help you understand if you have enough income to live comfortably for the selected home price. A general guide is to budget around 28% of your pre-tax income for your mortgage payment, and another 8% for other debts.\\n\\nAffordable: 0%-36%\\nStretch: 37%-50%\\nAmbitious: Above 50%\",\"regionName\":\"Kent\",\"regionTypeId\":2,\"regionId\":10157}}}","type":"application\u002Fjson","status":200,"statusType":2,"info":false,"ok":true,"clientError":false,"serverError":false,"error":false,"accepted":false,"noContent":false,"badRequest":false,"unauthorized":false,"notAcceptable":false,"notFound":false,"forbidden":false}},"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo":{"url":"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo","requestData":{"urlPath":"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo","method":"GET","queryParams":[{"propertyId":75381555,"accessLevel":1,"listingId":209743429,"pageType":1}],"postParams":null,"type":"json"},"requesters":1,"loaded":true,"res":{"_hasBody":true,"text":"{}&&{\"version\":631,\"errorMessage\":\"Success\",\"resultCode\":0,\"payload\":{\"mainHouseInfo\":{\"listingId\":209743429,\"openHousesDisplayLevel\":1,\"videoOpenHouses\":[],\"hotnessInfo\":{\"isHot\":false,\"hotnessMessageInfoWithTourLink\":{\"hotnessMessageAction\":\"go tour it now\"}},\"source\":{\"dataSourceId\":159,\"dataSourceDescription\":\"Northern Ohio Regional MLS (Yes MLS)\",\"dataSourceName\":\"MLSNOW\",\"shouldShowLargerLogo\":false},\"listingAgents\":[{\"agentInfo\":{\"agentName\":\"Ben Gilbert\",\"isAgentNameBlank\":false,\"isRedfinAgent\":false,\"isPartnerAgent\":false,\"isExternalAgent\":false},\"brokerName\":\"Keller Williams Elevate\",\"isOpendoor\":false}],\"buyingAgents\":[],\"lastCheckedDate\":1773175237834,\"lastUpdatedDate\":1770730952593,\"remarksDisplayLevel\":1,\"marketingRemarks\":[{\"marketingRemark\":\"Welcome home to 1799 Oak Hill Dr. located in the highly desirable Twin Hills neighborhood in Kent, OH! Conveniently located within minutes of Kent City Schools and Kent State University, Summa Health Stow-Kent Medical Center, Raccoon Hill Golf Club, all of the fine dining and shopping downtown Kent has to offer, and in close proximity of State Routes 14, 43, 303, and I-80. Updates include newer HVAC (2023), Water softener (2024), Sump pump (2021), waterproofing with a 20-year transferrable warranty. This property includes 3 parcels totaling . 78 acres. This home is ready for you to bring your finishing touches and make it your own. Call you favorite Realtor to schedule your private showing today before it is too late! Three parcels totaling .78 acres in the Twin Hills neighborhood. \\n- Newer HVAC installed in 2023 and water softener added in 2024. \\n- Sump pump installed in 2021 with waterproofing and 20-year transferrable warranty. \\n- Two-car garage on a brick house with brick driveway and snowy surroundings. \\n- Open living areas feature skylights, exposed beams, brick fireplace, and blue kitchen to a rare opportunity in Kent- a spacious and airy 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath townhome offering over 2,200 square feet of living space in a peaceful, wooded setting. Tucked away on Pine Drive, this home welcomes you through a private courtyard entry into a bright and open main level designed for comfortable living and entertaining. The living, dining, and kitchen areas flow seamlessly together, highlighted by vaulted ceilings, skylights, and a stunning wall of sliding glass doors that bring in loads of natural light and connect the indoors to the surrounding nature. The main living area features a cozy wood-burning fireplace, while newer flooring and neutral finishes create a clean, move-in\",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5181388\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":475000,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":2424,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":196,\"level\":1},\"beds\":5,\"baths\":3.5,\"fullBaths\":3,\"partialBaths\":1,\"stories\":3.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"1616 Crescent Dr\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"value\":\" \",\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Streetsboro\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44241\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44241\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":146105496,\"listingId\":210864800,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":56,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":4754919992,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-47:1\",\"level\":1},\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002F1616-Crescent-Dr-44241\u002Fhome\u002F146105496\",\"sashes\":[],\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Seller is offering $3,000 toward buyer closing costs with an acceptable offer, making this stunning, newer-built colonial an even more attractive opportunity. Nestled in a desirable and safe neighborhood with conveniently quick access to major highways and nearby shopping complexes, this home is thoughtfully designed with builder upgrades throughout. Step inside to discover a beautiful private office with elegant French doors\\u0026mdash;perfect for remote work or quiet study. The stunning kitchen is a true centerpiece, showcasing an expansive granite island, abundant cabinetry for all your storage needs, and sleek stainless steel appliances\\u0026mdash;ideal for everyday living and entertaining. Slidin\",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5189537\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":258800,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":1092,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":237,\"level\":1},\"beds\":3,\"baths\":1.0,\"fullBaths\":1,\"stories\":1.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"9345 Briar Dr\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"value\":\" \",\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Streetsboro\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44241\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44241\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"soldDate\":1706169600000,\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":75385358,\"listingId\":212790980,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":5,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":357751298,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-23:1\",\"level\":1},\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002F9345-Briar-Dr-44241\u002Fhome\u002F75385358\",\"sashes\":[],\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Your new home awaits! Inside, you will find a perfect mix of modern updates and cozy vibes. All major items have been updated within the last 5 years, for worry free living for many years to come. Updates include, roof, furnace, AC, hot water tank, appliances, full kitchen remodel, all flooring, and paint. A large entry way is ready for your imagination. Great as a mud room, office space or additional living space. Outside you will enjoy a large corner lot, on a quiet street that features a fenced in yard and a spacious 2 car garage with shelving for additional storage. Conveniently located near shopping, restaurants, Ohio Turnpike, I-480, KSU, and NeoMed. Built in 2023 this conventional style home offers three bedrooms, and three and a half baths with 2424 square feet of above grade finished living space. to this fully renovated 3-bedroom Cape Cod in the desirable Twin Lakes Park community. This home has been completely updated inside and out and offers a rare advantage within the subdivision: exclusive access to both lakes in Twin Lakes Park, including the community’s stocked lake. Not all homes in the neighborhood receive this access, making this property uniquely positioned for owners who value recreational water amenities. The home features all-new drywall, new carpet, new lighting, and a fully updated kitchen with new cabinets, new appliances, and a breakfast bar. The spacious layout offers flexible living options, whether used as a generous single-family residence or leveraged for student housing income. A convenient two car garage is also a bonus with this home. This property is a standout in the Kent market. a native of Northeast Ohio, I have an extensive dedication and understanding of the place and people I’ve grown up with. With real estate being a family trait passed down to me I carry an abundance of energy and excitement in finding the perfect home for you. With there being so many agents out there I would like to be one you trust. Whether you’re buying, listing, or looking to rent I don’t hope to just be a realtor involved in a transaction but to be a lifelong friend you can rely on in the crazy world of real estate!\",\"__g_id\":\"766803624\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772240160765,true,\"vir-maharaj\",null,2,true,\"Wadsworth\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As a native of Northeast Ohio, I have an extensive dedication and understanding of the place and people I’ve grown up with. Agent\",\"numReviews\":12,\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F42292\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_67.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+13306900060\",\"quote\":\"As a third-generation Realtor, real estate is in my blood! Growing up in this industry has allowed me the opportunity to learn the many different facets of it. It has given me the skillset and experience it takes to guide my clients through the home selling and buying process at the highest level. Born and raised in Northeast Ohio, I specialize in Residential Real Estate in Medina and Summit Counties and surrounding areas. I understand that buying or selling a home can be a very emotional process. Whether you\\u0027re buying your very first home, or trying to avoid foreclosure, I\\u0027m here to help ease the emotional burden and advise you every step of the way. You can be confident in my ability to negotiate the most money for your home, and the most home for your money!\",\"__g_id\":\"845886679\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1773152850355,true,\"nicole-frantz\",null,2,true,\"Wadsworth\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As a third-generation Realtor, real estate is in my blood! Growing up in this industry has allowed me the opportunity to learn the many different facets of it. It has given me the skillset and experience it takes to guide my clients through the home selling and buying process at the highest level. Born and raised in Northeast Ohio, I specialize in Residential Real Estate in Medina and Summit Counties and surrounding areas. I understand that buying or selling a home can be a very emotional process. Whether you\\u0027re buying your very first home, or trying to avoid foreclosure, I\\u0027m here to help ease the emotional burden and advise you every step of the way. You can be confident in my ability to negotiate the most money for your home, and the most home for your money!\",\"OH - Wayne \\\"Powered By Holmes Group\\\" – a remarkable force in the world of real estate. Comprised of highly skilled and dedicated professionals with over 28 years of experience. Our team is committed to turning your real estate dreams into reality.\\r\\n\\r\\nWhat sets The Holmes Group apart is their unwavering passion for finding the perfect home for every client. With an extensive knowledge of the local market and a keen eye for detail, they excel in matching buyers with their ideal properties. Their commitment to excellence is not only reflected in their sales record but also in the long-lasting relationships they build with their clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe Holmes Group understands that selling a home is often an emotional journey, and they approach this process with empathy, expertise, and innovative marketing strategies. Their ability to showcase properties in the best light ensures that sellers receive top value for their investments.\\r\\n\\r\\nFurthermore, our team operates with the utmost integrity and professionalism, earning them the trust of both clients and industry peers. Whether you\\u0027re buying, selling, or investing in real estate, The Holmes Group is your dedicated partner, making the entire process seamless and successful. With their passion, knowledge, and commitment to excellence, The Holmes Group truly makes dreams come true in the world of real estate.\",\"__g_id\":\"1898257795\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1773145983967,true,\"powered-by-holmes-group\",null,2,true,\"Canton\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"Introducing \\\"Powered By Holmes Group\\\" – a remarkable force in the world of real estate. 2026\",\"timelineDisplayLevel\":1},\"schoolsAndDistrictsInfo\":{\"servingThisHomeSchools\":[{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":3,\"distanceInMiles\":\"3.5\",\"gradeRanges\":\"PreK-5\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Davey Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F46294\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FDavey-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F46294\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FDavey-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":46294,\"numberOfStudents\":442,\"fullAddress\":\"196 N Prospect St, Kent, OH 44240\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":5,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":11,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fkent.k12.oh.us\u002Fkcs\u002Fcampus\u002Fdavey.php\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46046419,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2023\",\"review\":\"I did not like this school, It was sexist let girls do mostly what they want.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":5942654,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046418,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2022\",\"review\":\"My daughter has been attending Pre-K here for about a year and we\\u0027ve had zero problems. I like my daughter\\u0027s teacher, Mrs. Harvey. She seems very knowledgeable, attentive, down-to-earth, and compassionate. As a family, we\\u0027ve been having a pretty tough year, but the school has been so understanding and I haven\\u0027t had any issues. What I\\u0027m most impressed about is that the school has recognized my daughter has some physical problems. They jumped right on it and assigned her a physical therapist which she sees during class! Wow! Thank you! Also, I thought it was neat that they offer in-school dental care. I\\u0027ve been having the hardest time finding pediatric dentists around Kent that accept Medicaid, so this was a convenient way for my kiddo to get treated. My daughter doesn\\u0027t have behavioral problems, so it\\u0027s been a breeze. I\\u0027d recommend this school. I\\u0027m very happy so far!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":5688015,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046417,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2015\",\"review\":\"Whatever you do- do NOT send your children here. The principal is a joke and lacks empathy- she will dismiss all your concerns and side ALWAYS with the teachers. Kindergarten \\u0026 first grade teachers are awesome but a certain 2nd grade teacher will make a point to pick on your child... Completely disappointed in this school and I am looking to send my children else where. What a waste of our taxes.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1804033,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14735367,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2014\",\"review\":\"We moved my child to Davey this past year and could not be happier with how his year went. The faculty and teachers have all been great. I was worried how our son would transition to a new school but everyone was wonderful at making him feel welcome. It did not take him long at all to make friends and his grades and involvement improved noticeably. Would recommend to anyone moving into Kent.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1497840,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5955589,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2012\",\"review\":\"This school has horrible counseling, and does nothing to help with bullying. That is why my kids now go to private schools.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1152862,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":178564,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"2\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178565,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178566,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making average academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":7038,\"districtName\":\"Kent City School District\",\"address\":\"321 North Depeyster Street\",\"city\":\"Kent\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44240\",\"latitude\":41.156673,\"longitude\":-81.355675,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.kentschools.net\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002Fkent-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":true,\"middle\":false,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":true,\"greatSchoolsRating\":7,\"parentRating\":2,\"distanceInMiles\":\"3.0\",\"gradeRanges\":\"K-5\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Walls Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F47946\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FWalls-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F47946\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FWalls-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":47946,\"numberOfStudents\":359,\"fullAddress\":\"900 Doramor St, Kent, OH 44240\",\"numReviews\":6,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":16,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fkent.k12.oh.us\u002Fkcs\u002Fcampus\u002Fwalls.php\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46046555,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2023\",\"review\":\"We’re done with this school. Don’t buy a home in this community. The bullying was too much for my child, the curriculum wasn’t enough.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5810373,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046554,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2022\",\"review\":\"Excellent teaching staff in our experience with 2 children attending the school. Ms. Wilbur and Mr. Hawks are phenomenal just to name a couple. They will work with parents when children need support; my child has had so much success with the 504 we have created and with nothing but full support and dedication from the staff. I have heard other schools are terrible about this, Not Walls. This school seems quite progressive with curriculum and understanding of children’s behavioral health. The guidance counselor Whitney Slater is magnificent and kids are encouraged to check in with her any time they are struggling or just need support. The principal is not extraordinarily friendly and certainly has a tendency to be a bit harsh, but the structure and philosophy at Walls are terrific, so a lot is going right under her leadership. Other parents I know also have great things to say. Both my husband and I attended Walls as Children so it’s cool to see how the little school is growing and changing.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5633353,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046553,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2021\",\"review\":\"Very disappointed in how these past few years have gone, the parking lot is a mess pickup\u002Fdrop off. They have the walkers going through the grass to leave(absolute mess during rain and winter.) no sidewalks going around back. Principal Singer doesn’t seem to care. Been going to this school for years now and she isn’t friendly. Truly disappointed in how things are going, considering homeschooling.Haven’t heard anything good about her at all. Also recess monitors truly lack in their duties, overlook bullying and playground violence. They just don’t care.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5103726,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046552,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2021\",\"review\":\"From the top down, leadership is lacking. Deliberate absence of discipline and respect for staff is seen from the principal. The school has lost a great amount of quality students and teachers due to the overall absence of control at the administrative level.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5035007,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046551,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2019\",\"review\":\"I\\u0027ve never been impressed by this school, but it\\u0027s the school closest to where my family lives for now, so my children have to go here. I\\u0027m mostly unimpressed with the principal, Mrs. Singer.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":4213356,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046550,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2019\",\"review\":\"My oldest had Dr motley awesome. The next one was a room down from bb gun. 2025\",\"review\":\"This school is horrible the teaching is not helping at all The safety of the school just walk straight in and then people are getting their lunches stolen fights are breaking out and drama is going around the whole school this place needs to be shut down\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":7259097,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051127,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2025\",\"review\":\"No support for children with disabilities, not many options and staff seems to not specialize in children with disabilities. Their whole staff works together to protect each other even when wrong instead of protecting the parents and children. The teachers are mean to the children with disabilities and the black guy i believe is assistant principal is very mean rude and nasty. Teachers need to become more educated with children with disabilities and instead of implementing more knowledge or anything of the sort to inform teachers on how to deal with the behaviors of the children with disabilities. I give this school 0\u002F10. No compassion no nothing.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":7079162,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051126,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2023\",\"review\":\"The current administration is very \\\"woke\\\" and full of soft bigotry of low expectation toward certain identity groups. Turned our straight A student into straight F\\u0027s. Continuous danger of violence toward certain identity groups. This institution is currently failing, as you can see by its rating and comments from other concerned parents.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5904275,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051125,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2023\",\"review\":\"This school has bullying problems that the administration does not address not to mention the administration is also very rude and disrespectful with there they think they know it all attitude\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5752232,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051124,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2022\",\"review\":\"the assistant principal acts like she owns the place and is horrible\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5715415,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051123,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2022\",\"review\":\"This school has some really great teachers that teach here. The food is alright, and overall, it\\u0027s a good-ish school. Sure, you can make some really great friends here, most of the students here are very nice. But there are many students here that aren\\u0027t so nice. And when I reported to one of the teachers that my friend with a disability was getting bullied, the teacher simply didn\\u0027t care. I dislike it when I walk into the bathroom and there\\u0027s a cloud of smoke, or I walk into an inappropriate scene because a school shouldn\\u0027t have that sort of thing. But thankfully the principal has tried to \\\"fix\\\" the issue with the students. But all he\\u0027s done really is just ask them not to anymore. The counselors seem nice at first, but then all they do is nothing that\\u0027s actually helpful. (In my personal experience.) But, this isn\\u0027t the same as for all the teachers, most of them are very kind, friendly, and genuinely care about their job. But a lot of the eighth-graders aren\\u0027t nice though. But I would recommend it if you\\u0027re in the 6th or 7th grade. Because then again most of the people here are really nice and helpful. And the teaching methods they used I found to be extremely helpful, and useful. They go at a pace that helps me. Especially since I have some things mentally wrong with me, I find them to be extremely useful, and helpful. They also don\\u0027t give too much homework, which is nice.\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5250078,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051122,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2019\",\"review\":\"Highly disappointed with administrators who suggested I home school my child who has had many absences d\u002Ft chronic illness. No summer school is even available unless he’s failing core classes. School work he’s brought home is full of grammatical errors \\u0026 ambiguity. One PART TIME guidance counselor for the entire school. Bullying isn’t addressed or investigated. My son is miserable so we’re moving out of Kent.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":4179833,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":178571,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"4\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178570,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. This is an amazing school with amazing staff. Teachers, and administration alike go way out of their way to help students with whatever they need. The amount of classes and opportunities offered to the students is extraordinary. This is the best school in North East Ohio by far.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":1446434,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949526,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2010\",\"review\":\"My daughter LOVES going to school! The teachers give 110% and the classes are challenging.\",\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":1014287,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949523,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"July 2007\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":329822,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949524,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2007\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":365068,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":184249,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is about the same as the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":184251,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"3\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":184248,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":184250,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":7038,\"districtName\":\"Kent City School District\",\"address\":\"321 North Depeyster Street\",\"city\":\"Kent\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44240\",\"latitude\":41.156673,\"longitude\":-81.355675,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.kentschools.net\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002Fkent-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":false,\"middle\":false,\"high\":true,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false}],\"districtsServingThisHome\":[{\"elementaryChoiceSchoolsInDistrict\":[],\"middleChoiceSchoolsInDistrict\":[],\"highChoiceSchoolsInDistrict\":[],\"hasChoiceSchools\":false,\"districtName\":\"Kent City School District\",\"districtUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.kentschools.net\u002F\",\"districtId\":7038}],\"schoolsToShowOnDP\":[{\"servesHome\":true,\"greatSchoolsRating\":7,\"parentRating\":2,\"distanceInMiles\":\"3.0\",\"gradeRanges\":\"K-5\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Walls Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F47946\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FWalls-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F47946\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002FWalls-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":47946,\"numberOfStudents\":359,\"fullAddress\":\"900 Doramor St, Kent, OH 44240\",\"numReviews\":6,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":16,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fkent.k12.oh.us\u002Fkcs\u002Fcampus\u002Fwalls.php\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46046555,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2023\",\"review\":\"We’re done with this school. Don’t buy a home in this community. The bullying was too much for my child, the curriculum wasn’t enough.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5810373,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046554,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2022\",\"review\":\"Excellent teaching staff in our experience with 2 children attending the school. Ms. Wilbur and Mr. Hawks are phenomenal just to name a couple. They will work with parents when children need support; my child has had so much success with the 504 we have created and with nothing but full support and dedication from the staff. I have heard other schools are terrible about this, Not Walls. This school seems quite progressive with curriculum and understanding of children’s behavioral health. The guidance counselor Whitney Slater is magnificent and kids are encouraged to check in with her any time they are struggling or just need support. The principal is not extraordinarily friendly and certainly has a tendency to be a bit harsh, but the structure and philosophy at Walls are terrific, so a lot is going right under her leadership. Other parents I know also have great things to say. Both my husband and I attended Walls as Children so it’s cool to see how the little school is growing and changing.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5633353,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046553,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2021\",\"review\":\"Very disappointed in how these past few years have gone, the parking lot is a mess pickup\u002Fdrop off. They have the walkers going through the grass to leave(absolute mess during rain and winter.) no sidewalks going around back. Principal Singer doesn’t seem to care. Been going to this school for years now and she isn’t friendly. Truly disappointed in how things are going, considering homeschooling.Haven’t heard anything good about her at all. Also recess monitors truly lack in their duties, overlook bullying and playground violence. They just don’t care.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5103726,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046552,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2021\",\"review\":\"From the top down, leadership is lacking. Deliberate absence of discipline and respect for staff is seen from the principal. The school has lost a great amount of quality students and teachers due to the overall absence of control at the administrative level.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":5035007,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046551,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2019\",\"review\":\"I\\u0027ve never been impressed by this school, but it\\u0027s the school closest to where my family lives for now, so my children have to go here. I\\u0027m mostly unimpressed with the principal, Mrs. Singer.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":4213356,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046550,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2019\",\"review\":\"My oldest had Dr motley awesome. The next one was a room down from bb gun. The next Mrs. Singer went from best to worst.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900931,\"maponicsId\":3946826,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F931-Walls-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":182489,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"7\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182488,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"4\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182486,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. 44240\",\"numReviews\":8,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":11,\"websiteUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.kentschools.net\u002Fstanton\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051128,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2025\",\"review\":\"This school is horrible the teaching is not helping at all The safety of the school just walk straight in and then people are getting their lunches stolen fights are breaking out and drama is going around the whole school this place needs to be shut down\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":7259097,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051127,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2025\",\"review\":\"No support for children with disabilities, not many options and staff seems to not specialize in children with disabilities. Their whole staff works together to protect each other even when wrong instead of protecting the parents and children. The teachers are mean to the children with disabilities and the black guy i believe is assistant principal is very mean rude and nasty. Teachers need to become more educated with children with disabilities and instead of implementing more knowledge or anything of the sort to inform teachers on how to deal with the behaviors of the children with disabilities. I give this school 0\u002F10. No compassion no nothing.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":7079162,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051126,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2023\",\"review\":\"The current administration is very \\\"woke\\\" and full of soft bigotry of low expectation toward certain identity groups. Turned our straight A student into straight F\\u0027s. Continuous danger of violence toward certain identity groups. This institution is currently failing, as you can see by its rating and comments from other concerned parents.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5904275,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051125,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2023\",\"review\":\"This school has bullying problems that the administration does not address not to mention the administration is also very rude and disrespectful with there they think they know it all attitude\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5752232,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051124,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2022\",\"review\":\"the assistant principal acts like she owns the place and is horrible\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5715415,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051123,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2022\",\"review\":\"This school has some really great teachers that teach here. The food is alright, and overall, it\\u0027s a good-ish school. Sure, you can make some really great friends here, most of the students here are very nice. But there are many students here that aren\\u0027t so nice. And when I reported to one of the teachers that my friend with a disability was getting bullied, the teacher simply didn\\u0027t care. I dislike it when I walk into the bathroom and there\\u0027s a cloud of smoke, or I walk into an inappropriate scene because a school shouldn\\u0027t have that sort of thing. But thankfully the principal has tried to \\\"fix\\\" the issue with the students. But all he\\u0027s done really is just ask them not to anymore. The counselors seem nice at first, but then all they do is nothing that\\u0027s actually helpful. (In my personal experience.) But, this isn\\u0027t the same as for all the teachers, most of them are very kind, friendly, and genuinely care about their job. But a lot of the eighth-graders aren\\u0027t nice though. But I would recommend it if you\\u0027re in the 6th or 7th grade. Because then again most of the people here are really nice and helpful. And the teaching methods they used I found to be extremely helpful, and useful. They go at a pace that helps me. Especially since I have some things mentally wrong with me, I find them to be extremely useful, and helpful. They also don\\u0027t give too much homework, which is nice.\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":5250078,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051122,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2019\",\"review\":\"Highly disappointed with administrators who suggested I home school my child who has had many absences d\u002Ft chronic illness. No summer school is even available unless he’s failing core classes. School work he’s brought home is full of grammatical errors \\u0026 ambiguity. One PART TIME guidance counselor for the entire school. Bullying isn’t addressed or investigated. My son is miserable so we’re moving out of Kent.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3903822,\"maponicsId\":4179833,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F3822-Stanton-Middle-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":178571,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"4\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178570,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. This is an amazing school with amazing staff. Teachers, and administration alike go way out of their way to help students with whatever they need. The amount of classes and opportunities offered to the students is extraordinary. This is the best school in North East Ohio by far.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":1446434,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949526,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2010\",\"review\":\"My daughter LOVES going to school! The teachers give 110% and the classes are challenging.\",\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":1014287,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949523,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"July 2007\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":329822,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8949524,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2007\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900930,\"maponicsId\":365068,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F930-Theodore-Roosevelt-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":184249,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is about the same as the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. 2022\",\"review\":\"My daughter has been attending Pre-K here for about a year and we\\u0027ve had zero problems. I like my daughter\\u0027s teacher, Mrs. Harvey. She seems very knowledgeable, attentive, down-to-earth, and compassionate. As a family, we\\u0027ve been having a pretty tough year, but the school has been so understanding and I haven\\u0027t had any issues. What I\\u0027m most impressed about is that the school has recognized my daughter has some physical problems. They jumped right on it and assigned her a physical therapist which she sees during class! Wow! Thank you! Also, I thought it was neat that they offer in-school dental care. I\\u0027ve been having the hardest time finding pediatric dentists around Kent that accept Medicaid, so this was a convenient way for my kiddo to get treated. My daughter doesn\\u0027t have behavioral problems, so it\\u0027s been a breeze. I\\u0027d recommend this school. I\\u0027m very happy so far!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":5688015,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046417,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2015\",\"review\":\"Whatever you do- do NOT send your children here. The principal is a joke and lacks empathy- she will dismiss all your concerns and side ALWAYS with the teachers. Kindergarten \\u0026 first grade teachers are awesome but a certain 2nd grade teacher will make a point to pick on your child... Completely disappointed in this school and I am looking to send my children else where. What a waste of our taxes.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1804033,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14735367,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2014\",\"review\":\"We moved my child to Davey this past year and could not be happier with how his year went. The faculty and teachers have all been great. I was worried how our son would transition to a new school but everyone was wonderful at making him feel welcome. It did not take him long at all to make friends and his grades and involvement improved noticeably. Would recommend to anyone moving into Kent.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1497840,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5955589,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2012\",\"review\":\"This school has horrible counseling, and does nothing to help with bullying. That is why my kids now go to private schools.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3900925,\"maponicsId\":1152862,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fkent\u002F925-Davey-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":178564,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"2\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178565,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":178566,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making average academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state.
