The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":9859,\"districtName\":\"Streetsboro City School District\",\"address\":\"9000 Kirby Lane\",\"city\":\"Streetsboro\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44241\",\"latitude\":41.236404,\"longitude\":-81.321419,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.streetsboroschools.com\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002Fstreetsboro-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4094-Streetsboro-Middle-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":false,\"middle\":true,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":2,\"distanceInMiles\":\"1.8\",\"gradeRanges\":\"9-12\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Streetsboro High School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F48004\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002FStreetsboro-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F48004\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002FStreetsboro-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":48004,\"numberOfStudents\":547,\"fullAddress\":\"8585 Ohio 14, Streetsboro, OH 44241\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":3,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":16,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051312,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2022\",\"review\":\"I moved to Ohio and this is my first year in SHS. I really love this school so much, the only thing that is not good is the students would be racist to Asians or blacks. They would say slur words in the hallways during passing period. I used to be in a diverse school so I am not used to the racism. But other than that the teachers are really nice and the students are very social! I feel safer here than my other old school!\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":5681155,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740038,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2015\",\"review\":\"The district is striving towards technology but they are doing too little way to late. 3\u002F4 of the students have technology available to them while the rest have little or none or only what they get at school. Bullying is a huge problem and the principal in the high school is too quick to judge and even though a student reports problems time and time again, as stated something is only done when the victim retaliates and then the victim is punished and informed that the student that was doing the bullying has personal problems and essentially telling you that you have to tolerate them. Then they punish your child. The new principal up there just doesn\\u0027t get it. And his personality really just doesn\\u0027t fit the district. Superintendent is pretty tech savvy and is appears to be trying to move in that direction as fast as he can but the limited awareness of technology in those who make the decision is holding the forward movement back.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":642533,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740039,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2013\",\"review\":\"I feel that the high school does not appropriately deal with bullies. They wait until the victim retaliates and then they punish the victim. Academically they are not doing what they need to do. I have a child on a 504 plan and he is failing every subject so I would say that their accommodations are not working or not being followed. Also, they wait too long to call parents to let them know there is a problem. I was notified when my son had 11 hours of detention to serve but then it was too close to the end of the school year to serve them so they suspended him for 2 days. They treat the students like they are all from the same cookie cut out. I warned them that when my child started to get detentions that it was a sign that he was having trouble emotionally \\u0026 that I needed to notified but they failed to recognize it even after I made them aware.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904093,\"maponicsId\":1320965,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstreetsboro\u002F4093-Streetsboro-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":182584,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182583,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"4\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":182585,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is about the same as the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio 2026\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":3,\"distanceInMiles\":\"4.0\",\"gradeRanges\":\"8-12\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Stow-Munroe Falls High School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F106774\u002FOH\u002FStow\u002FStow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F106774\u002FOH\u002FStow\u002FStow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":106774,\"numberOfStudents\":1445,\"fullAddress\":\"3227 Graham Rd, Stow, OH 44224\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":6,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":20,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46046966,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2025\",\"review\":\"The principal be mean to you and the police officers peak over your stall in the bathroom\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":7104781,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046965,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"February 2024\",\"review\":\"The administration is petty and biased as well as ableist. They clearly do not have the best interest of the kids at heart.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":6291390,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046964,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2022\",\"review\":\"This school leaves something to be desired. Teacher-wise there are some gems, for example, Mrs. Merrill, Mrs. Peterre, Mrs. Marcum, Mr. Hinman, and Mrs. Tichnell. I can\\u0027t speak on all of the guidance counselors, but if you have Mrs. Paul and she gets to know you, she is so incredibly helpful. Mr. Treen was the best principal, he built a great rapport with many students and you could really tell that he cared. He is now the principal at Tallmadge High School. Now for the some of the negatives of the school; a lot of their initiatives to help students felt very performative on the staff end of things, students have a good sense of who cares about them and their well-being. An incident that really stuck out was when the school did stuff for pride month. There was a student-led initiative to put up a pride flag and it was torn down. Although there were consequences for the student who tore it down, it was all very private which gave off the impression that the school was not discouraging students from doing such things. Additionally, when a gay teacher resigned from the school, the chalkboard in their classroom was vandalized with homophobic slurs and there were no messages sent out on remind to tell students that discriminatory and hateful behavior is not appropriate and that there will be repercussions for such behavior. There was nothing. That was incredibly disappointing coming from a school district that claims to be inclusive and that boasts slogans like \\\"see something, say something\\\" or that if you\\u0027re a bystander, then you\\u0027re just as bad as the people doing the wrong thing. The performative activism is something that is easy to come across in this world, but that does not mean that we should tolerate it and especially not from the place that is supposed to be modelling behavior for impressionable young students. If we allow it from our schools, then we allow it from our children. When I was a student here, I didn\\u0027t have a say in what school I attended, but I hope that we change this school into a place that students can feel safe, cared for, and that can shape them not only into educated people, but more importantly, good people.\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":5488286,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046963,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"July 2018\",\"review\":\"I\\u0027m an alumnus of SMFHS and can definitely say that I had a positive experience during my time here and was well-prepared for college. I took advantage of the many AP and Honors classes and found the teachers to be engaging and the courses challenging. Plenty of graduates matriculate at Ivy League and other competitive colleges (i.e., Northwestern, American, Carnegie Mellon) for undergraduate and graduate school, as well as excel at the local universities. The music and arts programs are excellent and the sports teams do well in the district. As long as you\\u0027re willing to work hard, take initiative with your education, and get involved, you will absolutely be successful here and prepared for college\u002Flife after high school.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":3500923,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46046962,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2017\",\"review\":\"Amazing Clubs and music programs most staff are good and has a great sports team.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":2531111,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8950568,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2014\",\"review\":\"To make this short: For your kid\\u0027s benefit, move to the Hudson, Aurora, or Brecksville-Broadview Hts. school district instead, if possible. Stow-Munroe Falls high school is full of drugs and lowlifes. They rarely clean the school and the staff are extremely mean to the students, and the guidance counselors refuse to help you with any scheduling problems. This school is so fixated on being \\\"average\\\" that they lose sight of the purpose that we are there for: academics and a great education. The regular classes are extremely easy and they refused to let me take any of the AP classes that I requested. They could care less about your future, discouraging academics and encouraging laziness (Yes, the Latin teacher played entertainment movies 3\u002F5 of the days and the other classes rarely did any work). If you are content with your kid being an extremely lazy failure, then send them to SMFHS. I would never EVER send my children to such a rancid school district like Stow. However, there are still worse schools, such as the Akron and Cuyahoga Falls districts.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3901433,\"maponicsId\":1515256,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fstow\u002F1433-Stow-Munroe-Falls-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":171730,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"3\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":171731,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is about the same as the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":171727,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"6\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are about the same as the state average, so students are likely performing at grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":171729,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"7\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":11329,\"districtName\":\"Stow-Munroe Falls City School Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Minimal risk of severe winds over next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street National Wind Model, which forecasts how hurricanes and costs from resulting wind damages to structures will change over time due to climate change.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Wind Factor indicates its likelihood to experience extreme winds over the next 30 years, from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Wind Factor scores are more likely to experience higher winds more frequently today and in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fwind?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on the likelihood and speed of hurricane, tornado, or severe storm winds reaching this property, it has minimal wind risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s wind risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows this property\\u0027s likelihood of being in a tropical storm event with 3-second wind gusts exceeding 50 mph (39 mph for 1-minute sustained winds) over the next 30 years.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{},\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390430178\u002F390430178_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#wind\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all wind data on firststreet.org\"}},\"floodDataV2\":{\"fsid\":390430178,\"climateId\":\"flood\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Flood Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Minimal risk of a flood reaching the building in the next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor® is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street Flood Model, a nationwide, probabilistic flood model that shows a location’s risk of flooding from rain, rivers, tides, and storm surge. It builds off of decades of peer-reviewed research and forecasts how flood risks will change over time due to changes in the environment. Flood Factor is not intended to include all possible risks of flood.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Flood Factor is an indicator of its comprehensive flood risk, ranging from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Flood Factors are more likely to have flooded in the past, and are more likely to flood in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fflood?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on this property’s projected likelihood and depth of flooding, it has minimal flood risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s flood risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Flood risk accumulates over time. Cumulative risk is calculated to the largest building or center of an empty lot. Raised or elevated buildings may not be as vulnerable as ground-level buildings or buildings with basements.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is unlikely to flood in the next 30 years.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":0.0,\"yMax0\":0,\"yMax5\":0,\"yMax10\":0,\"yMax15\":0,\"yMax20\":0,\"yMax25\":0,\"yMax30\":0,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390430178\u002F390430178_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#flood\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all flood data on firststreet.org\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionTitle\":{\"value\":\"FEMA zone X (unshaded)\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout\":{\"value\":\"The FEMA flood zone shown is the most probable estimated zone.\\n\\nThe Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) is a government agency that maps flood zones in communities across the US, identifying areas of varying flood risk on Flood Insurance Rate Maps (FIRMs). FEMA creates FIRMs to inform flood insurance pricing in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) and to guide floodplain management regulations for NFIP-participating communities.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"http:\u002F\u002Ffloodsmart.gov\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on floodsmart.gov\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout2\":{\"value\":\"The FEMA flood zone shown is the most probable zone as estimated by MassiveCert, Inc.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrl2\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.massivecert.com\u002F\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrlText2\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on massivecert.com\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is estimated to be in FEMA Zone X (unshaded), which is designated as a low-to-moderate risk flood area. In this zone, the risk of flooding is reduced, but not completely removed.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.floodsmart.gov\u002Fflood-map-zone\u002Ffind-yours\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on floodsmart.gov\"},\"insuranceTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood insurance\"},\"insuranceFlyout\":{\"value\":\"To help you understand what it costs to protect this home with flood insurance we\\u0027ve partnered with Neptune Flood. Redfin may receive a commission if you purchase a policy through this link. There may be other flood insurance providers in your area.\"},\"insuranceDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on your estimated FEMA zone, flood insurance is not required. However, FEMA always recommends considering insurance.\\n\\nFlood insurance for this home ranges from $507 to $1088 per year, based on information from 4 providers.\"},\"insuranceLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002F1str.ee\u002Ft\u002Fhippo\u002Fflood\u002F390430178?source\\u003dredfin\"},\"insuranceLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Get an instant quote\"}},\"fireDataV2\":{\"fsid\":390430178,\"climateId\":\"fire\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Fire Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Unlikely to be in a wildfire in next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street National Wildfire Model\\u0027s nationwide, behavioral wildfire model that shows a specific location\\u0027s probabilistic risk of wildfire based on the vegetation, topography, and fire weather in the surrounding area. Fire Factor is not intended to include all possible risks of fire.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Fire Factor indicates its cumulative wildfire risk, ranging from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Fire Factors are more likely to be in a wildfire in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Ffire?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on this property\\u0027s distance to wildfire risk areas and burnable vegetation, it has minimal wildfire risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s fire risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire risk accumulates over time, so a property with a 0.1% chance of wildfire this year would have at least a 3% chance of being affected by wildfire at least once within 30 years. Being affected by wildfire refers to any actively burning fuels coming into contact with the largest building on the property.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"Unlikely to be in a wildfire in next 30 years.\"},\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390430178\u002F390430178_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#fire\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all fire data on firststreet.org\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionTitle\":{\"value\":\"USFS relative risk rank\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout\":{\"value\":\"The Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) is a government agency that maps flood zones in communities across the US, identifying areas of varying flood risk on Flood Insurance Rate Maps (FIRMs). FEMA creates FIRMs to inform flood insurance pricing in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) and to guide floodplain management regulations for NFIP-participating communities.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is located in a county with an average wildfire risk greater than 4.70% of counties in the United States.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwildfirerisk.org\u002F\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on wildfirerisk.org\"},\"insuranceTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire insurance\"},\"insuranceFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Most homeowners insurance typically includes fire coverage but in some areas, this will need to be purchased separately. Investing in fire insurance is one way to offset the cost of wildfire damage, and can help reduce your financial risk.\"},\"insuranceDescription\":{\"value\":\"Fire insurance for this home ranges from $713 to $1323 per year, based on information from 6 providers.\"},\"insuranceLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002F1str.ee\u002Ft\u002Fhippo\u002Ffire\u002F390430178?source\\u003dredfin\"},\"insuranceLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Get a quote\"}},\"heatDataV2\":{\"fsid\":390430178,\"climateId\":\"heat\",\"expandableHeading\":\"2\u002F10 Heat Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"7 days above 96° expected this year, 17 days in 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Hot days over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. Heat Factor™ uses the First Street Extreme Heat Model to determine property-specific heat risk across the United States. The model is a spatial temperature model that determines a specific location’s exposure to extreme heat events based on the surface temperature, topography, land cover, and humidity in the surrounding area.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Heat Factor indicates its risk of extreme heat exposure over the next thirty years, ranging from 1 (minimal risk) to 10 (extreme risk). Heat Factors are based on the current average daily high temperature and humidity of a property’s specific location during the hottest month of the year, and considers how it’s expected to grow over the next 30 years.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fheat?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on current and future temperature and humidity in the area and at this specific location, this property has minor heat risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":2,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s heat risk is increasing as weather patterns change.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Hot days over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows the number of days exceeding what is considered a hot day at this property. This is defined by using the 98th percentile “feels like” temperature in this area, or the hottest 7 days in the 4km area surrounding this property for a given year and using the lowest “high” temperature from those 7 days as a base. A property may have more or less hot days than the surrounding area depending on its individual exposure to heat.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"A “hot day” in this area is considered to be any day with a “feels like” temperature of 96º. Over the next 30 years, this property is expected to see a 10% increase in the number of hot days per year.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":7.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":9.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":10.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":12.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":14.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":15.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":17.0,\"yMax0\":39,\"yMax5\":48,\"yMax10\":58,\"yMax15\":67,\"yMax20\":76,\"yMax25\":86,\"yMax30\":95,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390430178\u002F390430178_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#heat\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all heat data on firststreet.org\"}},\"airData\":{\"fsid\":390430178,\"climateId\":\"air\",\"expandableHeading\":\"3\u002F10 Air Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"2 unhealthy days expected this year, 4 days in 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Air Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Air Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Poor air quality days over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"A property\\u0027s Air Factor indicates the number of poor air quality days it will experience over the next 30 years, from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Air Factor scores are more likely to experience poor air quality days today and in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.redfin.com\u002Fguides\u002Fclimate-change-housing-impact\u002Fair-risk\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more about air quality\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on the expected number of poor air quality days where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100, this area has moderate air quality risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":3,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s air risk is increasing as weather patterns change.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Poor air quality days over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows the change in the number of poor air quality days over time, where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100. These are the expected number of poor air quality days in a bad year, which is defined as a year with higher than average wildfire activity. This increases the amount of particulate matter (PM2.5) in the air and therefore worsens air quality.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"Over the next 30 years, this area will experience a 100.0% increase in the number of poor air quality days, i.e. where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":4.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":4.0,\"yMax0\":48,\"yMax5\":48,\"yMax10\":71,\"yMax15\":71,\"yMax20\":71,\"yMax25\":95,\"yMax30\":95,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F390430178\u002F390430178_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#air\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all air data on firststreet.org\"}}},\"buyingPowerInfo\":{\"formHeaderDisclaimerTitle\":\"Disclaimer\",\"formHeaderDisclaimer\":\"This tool is for general informational purposes only. The mortgage you can afford depends on many factors, including your total monthly payment, income, debt obligations, creditworthiness, down payment amount and other factors your lender may consider. It\\u0027s not a substitute for the professional advice of a lender or financial planner. By using this tool, you\\u0027re agreeing to our \\u003ca href\\u003d\\\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.redfin.com\u002Fabout\u002Fterms-of-use\\\" target\\u003d\\\"_blank\\\"\\u003eTerms of Use\\u003c\u002Fa\\u003e and \\u003ca href\\u003d\\\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.redfin.com\u002Fabout\u002Fprivacy-policy\\\" target\\u003d\\\"_blank\\\"\\u003ePrivacy Policy\\u003c\u002Fa\\u003e.\",\"mortgageCTADisclaimerTitle\":\"Disclaimer\",\"mortgageCTADisclaimer\":\"Rocket Mortgage is an affiliate of Redfin. You aren\\u0027t required to use its lending services. Learn more at \\u003ca href\\u003d\\\"https:\u002F\u002Fredfin.com\u002Fafba\\\" target\\u003d\\\"_blank\\\"\\u003eredfin.com\u002Fafba\\u003c\u002Fa\\u003e.\\n\",\"affordabilityDisclaimerTitle\":\"How buying power is calculated\",\"affordabilityDisclaimer\":\"We use your income and monthly debt to come up with your debt-to-income ratio, or DTI. We base your buying power on your DTI. We calculate your buying power based on a DTI of 36%, which is the general rule around how much of your income should go toward debt.\\n\\nThe ranges below will help you understand if you have enough income to live comfortably for the selected home price. A general guide is to budget around 28% of your pre-tax income for your mortgage payment, and another 8% for other debts.\\n\\nAffordable: 0%-36%\\nStretch: 37%-50%\\nAmbitious: Above 50%\",\"regionName\":\"Kent\",\"regionTypeId\":2,\"regionId\":10157}}}","type":"application\u002Fjson","status":200,"statusType":2,"info":false,"ok":true,"clientError":false,"serverError":false,"error":false,"accepted":false,"noContent":false,"badRequest":false,"unauthorized":false,"notAcceptable":false,"notFound":false,"forbidden":false}},"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo":{"url":"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo","requestData":{"urlPath":"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo","method":"GET","queryParams":[{"propertyId":75381555,"accessLevel":1,"listingId":209743429,"pageType":1}],"postParams":null,"type":"json"},"requesters":1,"loaded":true,"res":{"_hasBody":true,"text":"{}&&{\"version\":631,\"errorMessage\":\"Success\",\"resultCode\":0,\"payload\":{\"mainHouseInfo\":{\"listingId\":209743429,\"openHousesDisplayLevel\":1,\"videoOpenHouses\":[],\"hotnessInfo\":{\"isHot\":false,\"hotnessMessageInfoWithTourLink\":{\"hotnessMessageAction\":\"go tour it now\"}},\"source\":{\"dataSourceId\":159,\"dataSourceDescription\":\"Northern Ohio Regional MLS (Yes MLS)\",\"dataSourceName\":\"MLSNOW\",\"shouldShowLargerLogo\":false},\"listingAgents\":[{\"agentInfo\":{\"agentName\":\"Ben Gilbert\",\"isAgentNameBlank\":false,\"isRedfinAgent\":false,\"isPartnerAgent\":false,\"isExternalAgent\":false},\"brokerName\":\"Keller Williams Elevate\",\"isOpendoor\":false}],\"buyingAgents\":[],\"lastCheckedDate\":1773175237834,\"lastUpdatedDate\":1770730952593,\"remarksDisplayLevel\":1,\"marketingRemarks\":[{\"marketingRemark\":\"Welcome home to 1799 Oak Hill Dr. located in the highly desirable Twin Hills neighborhood in Kent, OH! Conveniently located within minutes of Kent City Schools and Kent State University, Summa Health Stow-Kent Medical Center, Raccoon Hill Golf Club, all of the fine dining and shopping downtown Kent has to offer, and in close proximity of State Routes 14, 43, 303, and I-80. Updates include newer HVAC (2023), Water softener (2024), Sump pump (2021), waterproofing with a 20-year transferrable warranty. This property includes 3 parcels totaling . 78 acres. This home is ready for you to bring your finishing touches and make it your own. 2:30PM\",\"lastSaleDate\":\"\",\"lastSalePrice\":\"\"},{\"sashType\":31,\"sashTypeId\":31,\"sashTypeName\":\"3D Walkthrough\",\"sashTypeColor\":\"#7556F2\",\"isRedfin\":false,\"isActiveKeyListing\":false,\"openHouseText\":\"\",\"lastSaleDate\":\"\",\"lastSalePrice\":\"\"}],\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Welcome to a rare opportunity in Kent- a spacious and airy 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath townhome offering over 2,200 square feet of living space in a peaceful, wooded setting. Tucked away on Pine Drive, this home welcomes you through a private courtyard entry into a bright and open main level designed for comfortable living and entertaining. The living, dining, and kitchen areas flow seamlessly together, highlighted by vaulted ceilings, skylights, and a stunning wall of sliding glass doors that bring in loads of natural light and connect the indoors to the surrounding nature. a native of Northeast Ohio, I have an extensive dedication and understanding of the place and people I’ve grown up with. With real estate being a family trait passed down to me I carry an abundance of energy and excitement in finding the perfect home for you. With there being so many agents out there I would like to be one you trust. Agent\",\"numReviews\":12,\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F42292\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_67.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+13306900060\",\"quote\":\"As a third-generation Realtor, real estate is in my blood! Growing up in this industry has allowed me the opportunity to learn the many different facets of it. It has given me the skillset and experience it takes to guide my clients through the home selling and buying process at the highest level. Born and raised in Northeast Ohio, I specialize in Residential Real Estate in Medina and Summit Counties and surrounding areas. I understand that buying or selling a home can be a very emotional process. Whether you\\u0027re buying your very first home, or trying to avoid foreclosure, I\\u0027m here to help ease the emotional burden and advise you every step of the way. You can be confident in my ability to negotiate the most money for your home, and the most home for your money!\",\"__g_id\":\"845886679\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1773152850355,true,\"nicole-frantz\",null,2,true,\"Wadsworth\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As a third-generation Realtor, real estate is in my blood! Growing up in this industry has allowed me the opportunity to learn the many different facets of it. It has given me the skillset and experience it takes to guide my clients through the home selling and buying process at the highest level. Born and raised in Northeast Ohio, I specialize in Residential Real Estate in Medina and Summit Counties and surrounding areas. I understand that buying or selling a home can be a very emotional process. Whether you\\u0027re buying your very first home, or trying to avoid foreclosure, I\\u0027m here to help ease the emotional burden and advise you every step of the way. You can be confident in my ability to negotiate the most money for your home, and the most home for your money!\",\"OH - Wayne Team\",\"agentType\":2,\"photoUrl74x110\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F53533\u002F500x500\u002Fgen74x110\u002F8_5.jpg\",\"photoUrl120x120\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F53533\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_5.jpg\",\"gender\":4,\"hasPhotos\":true,\"jobTitle\":\"Partner Agent\",\"numReviews\":7,\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F53533\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_5.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+13304178578\",\"quote\":\"Introducing \\\"Powered By Holmes Group\\\" – a remarkable force in the world of real estate. Comprised of highly skilled and dedicated professionals with over 28 years of experience. Our team is committed to turning your real estate dreams into reality.\\r\\n\\r\\nWhat sets The Holmes Group apart is their unwavering passion for finding the perfect home for every client. With an extensive knowledge of the local market and a keen eye for detail, they excel in matching buyers with their ideal properties. Their commitment to excellence is not only reflected in their sales record but also in the long-lasting relationships they build with their clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe Holmes Group understands that selling a home is often an emotional journey, and they approach this process with empathy, expertise, and innovative marketing strategies. Their ability to showcase properties in the best light ensures that sellers receive top value for their investments.\\r\\n\\r\\nFurthermore, our team operates with the utmost integrity and professionalism, earning them the trust of both clients and industry peers. Whether you\\u0027re buying, selling, or investing in real estate, The Holmes Group is your dedicated partner, making the entire process seamless and successful. With their passion, knowledge, and commitment to excellence, The Holmes Group truly makes dreams come true in the world of real estate.\",\"__g_id\":\"1898257795\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1773145983967,true,\"powered-by-holmes-group\",null,2,true,\"Canton\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"Introducing \\\"Powered By Holmes Group\\\" – a remarkable force in the world of real estate. Comprised of highly skilled and dedicated professionals with over 28 years of experience. Our team is committed to turning your real estate dreams into reality.\\r\\n\\r\\nWhat sets The Holmes Group apart is their unwavering passion for finding the perfect home for every client. With an extensive knowledge of the local market and a keen eye for detail, they excel in matching buyers with their ideal properties. Their commitment to excellence is not only reflected in their sales record but also in the long-lasting relationships they build with their clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe Holmes Group understands that selling a home is often an emotional journey, and they approach this process with empathy, expertise, and innovative marketing strategies. Their ability to showcase properties in the best light ensures that sellers receive top value for their investments.\\r\\n\\r\\nFurthermore, our team operates with the utmost integrity and professionalism, earning them the trust of both clients and industry peers. Whether you\\u0027re buying, selling, or investing in real estate, The Holmes Group is your dedicated partner, making the entire process seamless and successful. With their passion, knowledge, and commitment to excellence, The Holmes Group truly makes dreams come true in the world of real estate.\",\"Canton-Massillon\",0,173,10.00,7,\"2023006024 \\u0026 Agent\",\"numReviews\":7,\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F53533\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_5.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+13304178578\",\"quote\":\"Introducing \\\"Powered By Holmes Group\\\" – a remarkable force in the world of real estate. Comprised of highly skilled and dedicated professionals with over 28 years of experience. Our team is committed to turning your real estate dreams into reality.\\r\\n\\r\\nWhat sets The Holmes Group apart is their unwavering passion for finding the perfect home for every client. With an extensive knowledge of the local market and a keen eye for detail, they excel in matching buyers with their ideal properties. Their commitment to excellence is not only reflected in their sales record but also in the long-lasting relationships they build with their clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe Holmes Group understands that selling a home is often an emotional journey, and they approach this process with empathy, expertise, and innovative marketing strategies. Their ability to showcase properties in the best light ensures that sellers receive top value for their investments.\\r\\n\\r\\nFurthermore, our team operates with the utmost integrity and professionalism, earning them the trust of both clients and industry peers. Whether you\\u0027re buying, selling, or investing in real estate, The Holmes Group is your dedicated partner, making the entire process seamless and successful. With their passion, knowledge, and commitment to excellence, The Holmes Group truly makes dreams come true in the world of real estate.\",\"__g_id\":\"1276215111\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1773145983967,true,\"powered-by-holmes-group\",null,2,true,\"Canton\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"Introducing \\\"Powered By Holmes Group\\\" – a remarkable force in the world of real estate. living. Need more room? The finished basement, complete with a full bath, adds valuable additional living space. Whether you envision a home theater, a playroom, or a private guest suite, the possibilities are endless in this versatile area. This home isn't just about looks, it's about smart living. Equipped with energy-efficient features, you can enjoy lower utility bills and a more sustainable lifestyle. Double-pane casement windows on the first floor provide excellent insulation. A 95% efficient furnace ensures consistent, comfortable heating while reducing energy waste. The 14 SEER AC unit offers efficient cooling, keeping you comfortable even during the hottest summer months. The tank-less water heater heats water on-demand, providing instant hot water while eliminating the need for a bulky storage tank. LED lighting throughout the home significantly reduces energy consumption. These features work together to keep your home running efficiently and comfortably, while also helping you save on energy costs. Don't miss out on the opportunity to make this home yours. Schedule a tour today and see for yourself why this home is an ideal choice for your next move!
