2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":9,\"parentRating\":5,\"distanceInMiles\":\"1.3\",\"gradeRanges\":\"2-3\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Samuel Bissell Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51963\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FSamuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51963\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FSamuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":51963,\"numberOfStudents\":581,\"fullAddress\":\"1811 Glenwood Dr, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":11,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":12,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051537,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2020\",\"review\":\"We have only been in the district for 2 years, but very impressed and extremely thankful we landed in Twinsburg CSD. The teachers are amazing. I do not know how they are able to accommodate the differences in children, but they do a tremendous job. My child feels safe, loved and is eager to go to school each day.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":4369899,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970369,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2012\",\"review\":\"Bissell elem. has aa very caring staff.When you enter the building you can feel the warmness! They are also very serious about the students education. Each child is treated as an individual. The children there are wonderful as well :)\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1259549,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740266,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2012\",\"review\":\"An amazing School with Staff that really cares about the students and their education. Major improvements with new Principal!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1209730,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8960172,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"I see HUGE improvements over last year - just proves it begins at the top and trickles down! My child has been at Bissell for 2 years. Mrs. Johnson, the new principal on many occasions has gone out of her way to make my child feel special and important. Its nice to have a principal who is visible and approachable - what a refreshing change! Overall, the teachers have been wonderful. You can tell they truly care about each child. My child requires extra help in some subjects and the teachers have been very proactive getting extra help before my child falls so far behind that catching up is impossible. I can see consistent technology updates in the classrooms, the school is kept very clean and the play ground area is nice. We have lots of friends who live in neighboring school systems and after hearing horror stories from them, I think we have it really good in Twinsburg! There is no perfect school, teacher or student - but we are very lucky we live a nice community!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1190193,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740265,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"Overall, I am very pleased with Bissell. My child has a looping teacher \\u0026 she has definitely challanged him with extra work \\u0026 books above his reading level. The extra school work keeps him busy \\u0026 focused in class which in turn keeps him from getting bored \\u0026 into trouble. My child has come home with a few choice words he has picked up on the playground but that will happen anywhere. I\\u0027m just grateful that my child is comfortable enough to tell me what he hears \\u0026 who said it so I can report it to the teachers for them to correct the issue.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1189782,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8960166,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"Our son is in his second year at Bissell and we love it! The new Principal and her focus on Respect has only added to the positive culture in this building. Our son is receiving a quality education, participates in the student counsel, and will make a bitter sweet move to a new building next year. Kudos to Bissell as being another of the excellent schools in the Twinsburg District!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1072752,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970364,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"We have two third graders and a graduate of Bissell. Of the 6 teachers that they have had, 5 of them have been exemplary and one has been good. I think that is a great record. I really like the new principal at Dodge and the school works hard to push the students while at the same time, building their self esteem. We have been very happy so far in Wilcox, Bissell and Dodge and are happy with our choice to send our kids to public schools in Twinsburg.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1189402,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":173926,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school are performing about as well as other students in the state, but this school may still have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173924,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"9\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":3240,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg City School District\",\"address\":\"11136 Ravenna Road\",\"city\":\"Twinsburg\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44087\",\"latitude\":41.338581,\"longitude\":-81.476059,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.twinsburg.k12.oh.us\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002Ftwinsburg-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":true,\"middle\":false,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":5,\"distanceInMiles\":\"2.5\",\"gradeRanges\":\"7-8\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"R B Chamberlin Middle School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F120902\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FR-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F120902\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FR-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F\",\"id\":120902,\"numberOfStudents\":565,\"fullAddress\":\"10270 Ravenna Rd, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":2,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":17,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051539,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"April 2016\",\"review\":\"I am a student here. The overall school is fine, however the start time is a little bit too early. I mean, come on 7 a.m is not a good time to start. I have to wake up a 6 a.m to get there which is awful. I tend to have trouble falling asleep at night, so I don\\u0027t end up getting enough sleep; therefor, my days are always a struggle, I still get straight A\\u0027s but it is very exhausting.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904357,\"maponicsId\":2055974,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8960175,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2008\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904357,\"maponicsId\":470759,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":180270,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"3\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school may be falling behind other students in the state, and this school may have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":180273,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"3\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making less academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":180269,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"9\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":3240,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg City School District\",\"address\":\"11136 Ravenna Road\",\"city\":\"Twinsburg\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44087\",\"latitude\":41.338581,\"longitude\":-81.476059,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.twinsburg.k12.oh.us\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002Ftwinsburg-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":false,\"middle\":true,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":8,\"parentRating\":3,\"distanceInMiles\":\"2.7\",\"gradeRanges\":\"9-12\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Twinsburg High School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51962\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FTwinsburg-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51962\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FTwinsburg-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":51962,\"numberOfStudents\":1106,\"fullAddress\":\"10084 Ravenna Rd, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":7,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":15,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051544,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"April 2024\",\"review\":\"My child was abducted by this school.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":6418345,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051543,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2023\",\"review\":\"Twinsburg High School is honestly not that great. Everyone in this school can get away with almost everything and nobody has any respect or honesty towards one another. If I had the choice I would have went to a different high school or at least a school that has staff caring more then just their ranking in education, and that is pretty much every public school in Twinsburg. At least 3\u002F4 of the students here are abusing vapes and exposure to things they should not be exposed to. Their overall education is good, but that seems to be all that they are caring about. Even if a student gets in trouble for example, assaulting someone, all they get is a slap in the wrist and nothing else. Almost none of the students respect the teachers here and use various ways to break the rules or to cheat. A ton of rumors can be easily spread around in Twinsburg High School and it can really hurt someone. I am afraid that somebody will over react and do something terrible. So, overall, if you don\\u0027t mind your child feeling like they can\\u0027t trust anyone at school, then Twinsburg is a great place to have an education at.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":6144976,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051542,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"April 2021\",\"review\":\"They do nothing for bullying and the curriculum is horrible unless you\\u0027re an honors student. I give the entire school system a solid 1\u002F10.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":4940969,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051541,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2020\",\"review\":\"This is such a great place for learning and growing! This school doesn\\u0027t just teach the basics, it sets you up with success! Very diverse classes and a large selection for each individual. The teachers there are really understanding and helpful, they also focus a lot on emotional support for students. Also, there are classes (Health) that really motivates students to take a stand against bullying, drug use, etc. I\\u0027m a sophomore at the high school, but I\\u0027m mostly doing CCP (College Credit Plus) classes, and I\\u0027m so glad that they have this option!!! Also, I\\u0027m also planning on taking some CVCC (Cuyahoga Valley Career Center) classes, which is a vocational school option for Twinsburg High School and many other schools. So, far I hear a lot of great things from CVCC, it provides practical help for preparing students for the workplace and it has so many awesome different programs! So excited! Hope this helps... :D --Age 15 (16 in March)\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":4772668,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051540,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2017\",\"review\":\"The school is very segregated not by race, but in intelligence in that you have a small group of motivated, mainly STEM-oriented individuals contrasted by a large mob of average and under achieving students. Although this phenomenon is common in most high schools, the stark differences between these groups of people just happen to be more severe here and the effect results with a student body that is unable to cooperate or support each other fully towards a shared ideal. Bullying and teasing among students can occur on a daily basis but fights, however, sparsely dot the school year but all of this, of course, depends on which group a student associates with; if the student is a member of that small, intellectual group mentioned earlier, then obviously he\u002Fshe is going to experience less teasing and see less fights than if he\u002Fshe were to associate with the larger group. The school administration is great at employing disciplinary measures when needed. Of course, there are the occasional slip-ups such as not caring whether a student serves an administrative detention and some punishments can be excessive. Overall the school is peaceful. The athletic department is well-funded; the football and boy\\u0027s bowling team need some improvement in performance.The fine-arts department is excellent. The high school is often represented at regional and state-level art competitions and the band as well as the orchestra routinely earn high ratings at their state performances.Teachers that cannot teach or do not teach well, as some students complain, pepper the school. Note, however, that the more rigorous the course is (honors and AP) the more teachers there are that are not only in-tune with the course, but also willing to actively teach their students. The most important thing to remember or take note about this school is that it has resources. Although it does not perform as well as surrounding schools in state standardized testing, the school perennially graduates students who were accepted to ivy-league schools, top-tier colleges, performing arts schools, and well-known universities in and outside Ohio. The resources are here, but it is up to students to actually use them. Once they take advantage of those resources, the administration will support them 100% towards whatever goal they pursue.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":2651021,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970384,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2013\",\"review\":\"I decided to send my son to Twinsburg HS after his Catholic School closed. I read the good reviews; the community was appealing and felt it would be a good fit for him. Well, sadly to say I was disappointed. I did not appreciate the block scheduling for high schoolers. I understand it s a tool for college prep but I feel as though core classes such as the sciences and mathematics need to be taught on a daily basis (at open house 2 teachers agreed with me). The teachers offered tutoring however, their schedules were very limited. I called the board of education and the library and to my astonishment, neither facility was able to offer assistance. Needless to say, I ended up finding a great tutor online. I was also unimpressed with the varsity coach, I felt he showed favoritism and just frankly wasn t a good coach (obviously judging by the schools track record). Regarding the principal s capability in leading the school, I will say that I was impressed by some disciplinary system however; I found it to be a bit biased. My child is quite intelligent, outgoing, and I felt this school lacked in a few areas. Transferring him was the best thing I could have done...\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":1425006,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740271,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2013\",\"review\":\"This Highschool is Amazing! sure some of the teachers are a little boring but what school has all exciting teachers. They have a lot of stuff for you to participate in and the majority of the staff there is amazing. Also we have these resource officers, so i always feel safe in case something was to happen and they always break up the few fights that happen. Also, there are a variety of electives you can take like foods, art, orchestra, sociology, drama and so much more. The people there are very friendly too and if you have any problems they have a wonderful guidance office. The school is also pretty laided back about dress code too. They don\\u0027t really care what you wear as long as it\\u0027s appropriate. In a lot of classes students can use their phones and calculators and stop watches but we often use phones a lot for taking tests where the teacher puts a question on the board and you answer it by texting in and then it shows everyone\\u0027s responses. I like taking tests this way,because it takes away the stress of regular ones. Also many teachers use celly which is this thing that allows you to text students the homework and they can text back and ask questions. I recommend this school.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":1277055,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":173920,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"10\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is above the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\\n\\nEven at schools with strong college and career readiness, there may be students who are not getting the opportunities they need to succeed.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173922,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173923,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"7\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173919,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school are performing about as well as other students in the state, but this school may still have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. years\"},\"yMax0\":42,\"yMax5\":51,\"yMax10\":60,\"yMax15\":69,\"yMax20\":77,\"yMax25\":86,\"yMax30\":95},\"windData\":{\"fsid\":395444397,\"climateId\":\"wind\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Wind Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Minimal risk of severe winds over next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street National Wind Model, which forecasts how hurricanes and costs from resulting wind damages to structures will change over time due to climate change.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Wind Factor indicates its likelihood to experience extreme winds over the next 30 years, from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Wind Factor scores are more likely to experience higher winds more frequently today and in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fwind?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on the likelihood and speed of hurricane, tornado, or severe storm winds reaching this property, it has minimal wind risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s wind risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows this property\\u0027s likelihood of being in a tropical storm event with 3-second wind gusts exceeding 50 mph (39 mph for 1-minute sustained winds) over the next 30 years.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{},\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F395444397\u002F395444397_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#wind\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all wind data on firststreet.org\"}},\"floodDataV2\":{\"fsid\":395444397,\"climateId\":\"flood\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Flood Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Minimal risk of a flood reaching the building in the next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor® is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street Flood Model, a nationwide, probabilistic flood model that shows a location’s risk of flooding from rain, rivers, tides, and storm surge. It builds off of decades of peer-reviewed research and forecasts how flood risks will change over time due to changes in the environment. Flood Factor is not intended to include all possible risks of flood.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Flood Factor is an indicator of its comprehensive flood risk, ranging from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Flood Factors are more likely to have flooded in the past, and are more likely to flood in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fflood?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on this property’s projected likelihood and depth of flooding, it has minimal flood risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s flood risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Flood risk accumulates over time. Cumulative risk is calculated to the largest building or center of an empty lot. Raised or elevated buildings may not be as vulnerable as ground-level buildings or buildings with basements.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is unlikely to flood in the next 30 years.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":0.0,\"yMax0\":0,\"yMax5\":0,\"yMax10\":0,\"yMax15\":0,\"yMax20\":0,\"yMax25\":0,\"yMax30\":0,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F395444397\u002F395444397_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#flood\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all flood data on firststreet.org\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionTitle\":{\"value\":\"FEMA zone X (unshaded)\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout\":{\"value\":\"The FEMA flood zone shown is the most probable estimated zone.\\n\\nThe Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) is a government agency that maps flood zones in communities across the US, identifying areas of varying flood risk on Flood Insurance Rate Maps (FIRMs). FEMA creates FIRMs to inform flood insurance pricing in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) and to guide floodplain management regulations for NFIP-participating communities.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"http:\u002F\u002Ffloodsmart.gov\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on floodsmart.gov\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout2\":{\"value\":\"The FEMA flood zone shown is the most probable zone as estimated by MassiveCert, Inc.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrl2\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.massivecert.com\u002F\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrlText2\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on massivecert.com\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is estimated to be in FEMA Zone X (unshaded), which is designated as a low-to-moderate risk flood area. In this zone, the risk of flooding is reduced, but not completely removed.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.floodsmart.gov\u002Fflood-map-zone\u002Ffind-yours\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on floodsmart.gov\"},\"insuranceTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood insurance\"},\"insuranceFlyout\":{\"value\":\"To help you understand what it costs to protect this home with flood insurance we\\u0027ve partnered with Neptune Flood. Redfin may receive a commission if you purchase a policy through this link. There may be other flood insurance providers in your area.\"},\"insuranceDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on your estimated FEMA zone, flood insurance is not required. However, FEMA always recommends considering insurance.\\n\\nFlood insurance for this home ranges from $473 to $860 per year, based on information from 4 providers.\"},\"insuranceLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002F1str.ee\u002Ft\u002Fhippo\u002Fflood\u002F395444397?source\\u003dredfin\"},\"insuranceLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Get an instant quote\"}},\"fireDataV2\":{\"fsid\":395444397,\"climateId\":\"fire\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Fire Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Unlikely to be in a wildfire in next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street National Wildfire Model\\u0027s nationwide, behavioral wildfire model that shows a specific location\\u0027s probabilistic risk of wildfire based on the vegetation, topography, and fire weather in the surrounding area. Fire Factor is not intended to include all possible risks of fire.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Fire Factor indicates its cumulative wildfire risk, ranging from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Fire Factors are more likely to be in a wildfire in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Ffire?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on this property\\u0027s distance to wildfire risk areas and burnable vegetation, it has minimal wildfire risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s fire risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire risk accumulates over time, so a property with a 0.1% chance of wildfire this year would have at least a 3% chance of being affected by wildfire at least once within 30 years. Being affected by wildfire refers to any actively burning fuels coming into contact with the largest building on the property.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"Unlikely to be in a wildfire in next 30 years.\"},\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F395444397\u002F395444397_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#fire\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all fire data on firststreet.org\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionTitle\":{\"value\":\"USFS relative risk rank\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout\":{\"value\":\"The Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) is a government agency that maps flood zones in communities across the US, identifying areas of varying flood risk on Flood Insurance Rate Maps (FIRMs). FEMA creates FIRMs to inform flood insurance pricing in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) and to guide floodplain management regulations for NFIP-participating communities.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is located in a county with an average wildfire risk greater than 7.50% of counties in the United States.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwildfirerisk.org\u002F\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on wildfirerisk.org\"},\"insuranceTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire insurance\"},\"insuranceFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Most homeowners insurance typically includes fire coverage but in some areas, this will need to be purchased separately. Investing in fire insurance is one way to offset the cost of wildfire damage, and can help reduce your financial risk.\"},\"insuranceDescription\":{\"value\":\"Fire insurance for this home ranges from $713 to $1323 per year, based on information from 6 providers.\"},\"insuranceLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002F1str.ee\u002Ft\u002Fhippo\u002Ffire\u002F395444397?source\\u003dredfin\"},\"insuranceLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Get a quote\"}},\"heatDataV2\":{\"fsid\":395444397,\"climateId\":\"heat\",\"expandableHeading\":\"2\u002F10 Heat Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"7 days above 96° expected this year, 16 days in 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Hot days over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. Heat Factor™ uses the First Street Extreme Heat Model to determine property-specific heat risk across the United States. The model is a spatial temperature model that determines a specific location’s exposure to extreme heat events based on the surface temperature, topography, land cover, and humidity in the surrounding area.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Heat Factor indicates its risk of extreme heat exposure over the next thirty years, ranging from 1 (minimal risk) to 10 (extreme risk). Heat Factors are based on the current average daily high temperature and humidity of a property’s specific location during the hottest month of the year, and considers how it’s expected to grow over the next 30 years.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fheat?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on current and future temperature and humidity in the area and at this specific location, this property has minor heat risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":2,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s heat risk is increasing as weather patterns change.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Hot days over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows the number of days exceeding what is considered a hot day at this property. This is defined by using the 98th percentile “feels like” temperature in this area, or the hottest 7 days in the 4km area surrounding this property for a given year and using the lowest “high” temperature from those 7 days as a base. A property may have more or less hot days than the surrounding area depending on its individual exposure to heat.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"A “hot day” in this area is considered to be any day with a “feels like” temperature of 96º. Over the next 30 years, this property is expected to see a 9% increase in the number of hot days per year.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":7.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":9.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":10.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":12.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":13.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":15.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":16.0,\"yMax0\":42,\"yMax5\":51,\"yMax10\":60,\"yMax15\":69,\"yMax20\":77,\"yMax25\":86,\"yMax30\":95,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F395444397\u002F395444397_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#heat\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all heat data on firststreet.org\"}},\"airData\":{\"fsid\":395444397,\"climateId\":\"air\",\"expandableHeading\":\"3\u002F10 Air Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"2 unhealthy days expected this year, 4 days in 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Air Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Air Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Poor air quality days over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"A property\\u0027s Air Factor indicates the number of poor air quality days it will experience over the next 30 years, from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Air Factor scores are more likely to experience poor air quality days today and in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.redfin.com\u002Fguides\u002Fclimate-change-housing-impact\u002Fair-risk\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more about air quality\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on the expected number of poor air quality days where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100, this area has moderate air quality risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":3,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s air risk is increasing as weather patterns change.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Poor air quality days over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows the change in the number of poor air quality days over time, where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100. These are the expected number of poor air quality days in a bad year, which is defined as a year with higher than average wildfire activity. This increases the amount of particulate matter (PM2.5) in the air and therefore worsens air quality.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"Over the next 30 years, this area will experience a 100.0% increase in the number of poor air quality days, i.e. where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":4.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":4.0,\"yMax0\":48,\"yMax5\":48,\"yMax10\":71,\"yMax15\":71,\"yMax20\":71,\"yMax25\":95,\"yMax30\":95,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F395444397\u002F395444397_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#air\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all air data on firststreet.org\"}}},\"homeHighlightsTagsInfo\":[\"LAUNDRY ON FIRST FLOOR\",\"LARGE LIVING ROOM\",\"EXTRA-LARGE DETACHED GARAGE\",\"RAISED DECK\",\"STAINLESS STEEL APPLIANCES\",\"PRIVATE WOODED ACRE LOT\"],\"buyingPowerInfo\":{\"formHeaderDisclaimerTitle\":\"Disclaimer\",\"formHeaderDisclaimer\":\"This tool is for general informational purposes only. The mortgage you can afford depends on many factors, including your total monthly payment, income, debt obligations, creditworthiness, down payment amount and other factors your lender may consider. Learn more at \\u003ca href\\u003d\\\"https:\u002F\u002Fredfin.com\u002Fafba\\\" target\\u003d\\\"_blank\\\"\\u003eredfin.com\u002Fafba\\u003c\u002Fa\\u003e.\\n\",\"affordabilityDisclaimerTitle\":\"How buying power is calculated\",\"affordabilityDisclaimer\":\"We use your income and monthly debt to come up with your debt-to-income ratio, or DTI. We base your buying power on your DTI. We calculate your buying power based on a DTI of 36%, which is the general rule around how much of your income should go toward debt.\\n\\nThe ranges below will help you understand if you have enough income to live comfortably for the selected home price. A general guide is to budget around 28% of your pre-tax income for your mortgage payment, and another 8% for other debts.\\n\\nAffordable: 0%-36%\\nStretch: 37%-50%\\nAmbitious: Above this Cozy house in the highly desired Solon School District. When you walk in the front, you will be greeted with a large living room and step up dining room. This is a wonderful home with 3 Bedrooms, and 2 Full baths partially updated eat-in kitchen with stainless steel Appliances. Laundry is on first floor. Private wooded acre lot waiting for you to expand. Extra-large detached garage that can store a large boat or anything else. Raised deck along the side of the house overlooking the garden just waiting for your personal touch. Enclosed porch and a partially fenced in backyard. This home is waiting for its new owner with plenty of value-add options. Upon entering, you are greeted by a two-story foyer that leads to a first floor that features 9 ft ceilings, newer elegant wood flooring and crown molding throughout. The family room flows effortlessly from the kitchen and features a gas fireplace, while the formal dining room showcases wainscoting and a tray ceiling. Fresh, Bright, and Ready for You! The interior boasts new fresh neutral paint and plush new carpeting throughout, providing a clean and inviting canvas for your personal style. Three nice size bedrooms and a full bath are on the main floor. A large kitchen over looking a dining area and front room top off the upper level. The lower level has an additional bedroom, rec room or office. Just outside the bedroom is an additional bathroom and laundry area. The lower level does have a walkout to the back yard. over two decades of real estate experience, I provide my clients with the knowledge, guidance, and confidence they need to succeed in today’s market. I’ve built a reputation for delivering results through strong negotiation skills, clear communication, and a hands-on, client-first approach. Whether working with buyers, sellers, or investors, I focus on maximizing value and creating a smooth, stress-free experience from start to finish. My deep understanding of the local market and commitment to going the extra mile ensure that my clients feel supported every step of the way. When you work with me, you’re choosing a trusted partner who’s invested in your success.\",\"__g_id\":\"1876111305\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772575905245,true,\"daniel-zembiak\",null,2,true,\"Solon\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"With over two decades of real estate experience, I provide my clients with the knowledge, guidance, and confidence they need to succeed in today’s market. over two decades of real estate experience, I provide my clients with the knowledge, guidance, and confidence they need to succeed in today’s market. I’ve built a reputation for delivering results through strong negotiation skills, clear communication, and a hands-on, client-first approach. Whether working with buyers, sellers, or investors, I focus on maximizing value and creating a smooth, stress-free experience from start to finish. My deep understanding of the local market and commitment to going the extra mile ensure that my clients feel supported every step of the way. Being sold AS IS\",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5191675\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":440000,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":2492,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":177,\"level\":1},\"beds\":4,\"baths\":2.5,\"fullBaths\":2,\"partialBaths\":1,\"stories\":2.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"1678 Duncan Way\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"value\":\" \",\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Streetsboro\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44241\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44241\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"soldDate\":1649401200000,\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":176204876,\"listingId\":212829041,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":3,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":249024338,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-36:0\",\"level\":1},\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002F1678-Duncan-Way-44241\u002Fhome\u002F176204876\",\"sashes\":[{\"sashType\":31,\"sashTypeId\":31,\"sashTypeName\":\"3D Walkthrough\",\"sashTypeColor\":\"#7556F2\",\"isRedfin\":false,\"isActiveKeyListing\":false,\"openHouseText\":\"\",\"lastSaleDate\":\"\",\"lastSalePrice\":\"\"}],\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Your Peaceful Family Retreat in Streetsboro! Tucked away on a premium wooded lot in one of Streetsboro\\u0026rsquo;s most sought-after neighborhoods, this newer 2022-built home blends modern comfort with peaceful, family-friendly living. Step inside and you\\u0027ll immediately notice the versatile bonus room near the entry\\u0026mdash;perfect as a playroom, home office, or cozy reading nook. From there, the open-concept layout unfolds into a spacious living room and stunning kitchen that\\u0026rsquo;s made for gathering. Whether you\\u0027re entertaining friends or helping with homework while dinner simmers, this space keeps everyone connected. The kitchen features an oversized breakfast bar, gleaming granite countertop\",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5191527\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":283000,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":2272,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":125,\"level\":1},\"beds\":3,\"baths\":2.5,\"fullBaths\":2,\"partialBaths\":1,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"1939 Pine Dr\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"value\":\" \",\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Kent\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44240\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44240\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"soldDate\":1718348400000,\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":3,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":66359378,\"listingId\":212820319,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":4,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":282102542,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-36:3,37-41:2\",\"level\":1},\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FKent\u002F1939-Pine-Dr-44240\u002Fhome\u002F66359378\",\"sashes\":[{\"sashType\":10,\"sashTypeId\":10,\"sashTypeName\":\"Open House\",\"sashTypeColor\":\"#73BB3C\",\"isRedfin\":false,\"isActiveKeyListing\":false,\"openHouseText\":\"OPEN SUN, 1PM TO 2:30PM\",\"lastSaleDate\":\"\",\"lastSalePrice\":\"\"},{\"sashType\":31,\"sashTypeId\":31,\"sashTypeName\":\"3D Walkthrough\",\"sashTypeColor\":\"#7556F2\",\"isRedfin\":false,\"isActiveKeyListing\":false,\"openHouseText\":\"\",\"lastSaleDate\":\"\",\"lastSalePrice\":\"\"}],\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Welcome to a rare opportunity in Kent- a spacious and airy 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath townhome offering over 2,200 square feet of living space in a peaceful, wooded setting. Tucked away on Pine Drive, this home welcomes you through a private courtyard entry into a bright and open main level designed for comfortable living and entertaining. The living, dining, and kitchen areas flow seamlessly together, highlighted by vaulted ceilings, skylights, and a stunning wall of sliding glass doors that bring in loads of natural light and connect the indoors to the surrounding nature. The main living area features a cozy wood-burning fireplace, while newer flooring and neutral finishes create a clean, move-in\",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5189537\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":258800,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":1092,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":237,\"level\":1},\"beds\":3,\"baths\":1.0,\"fullBaths\":1,\"stories\":1.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"9345 Briar Dr\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"value\":\" \",\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Streetsboro\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44241\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44241\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"soldDate\":1706169600000,\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":75385358,\"listingId\":212790980,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":5,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":357785960,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-23:1\",\"level\":1},\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FStreetsboro\u002F9345-Briar-Dr-44241\u002Fhome\u002F75385358\",\"sashes\":[],\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Your new home awaits! Inside, you will find a perfect mix of modern updates and cozy vibes. All major items have been updated within the last 5 years, for worry free living for many years to come. Updates include, roof, furnace, AC, hot water tank, appliances, full kitchen remodel, all flooring, and paint. A large entry way is ready for your imagination. Great as a mud room, office space or additional living space. Outside you will enjoy a large corner lot, on a quiet street that features a fenced in yard and a spacious 2 car garage with shelving for additional storage. Conveniently located near shopping, restaurants, Ohio Turnpike, I-480, KSU, and NeoMed. Our mission is to make your real estate dreams a reality, providing exceptional service and expertise every step of the way.\\r\\nWhy Choose Us?\\r\\n\\r\\nLocal Expertise: Born and raised in Northeastern Ohio, our team has an in-depth understanding of the local market trends, neighborhoods, and hidden gems. Contact us anytime as we look forward to helping you achieve your real estate goals! Team\",\"agentType\":2,\"photoUrl74x110\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F65469\u002F500x500\u002Fgen74x110\u002F8_32.jpg\",\"photoUrl120x120\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F65469\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_32.jpg\",\"gender\":4,\"hasPhotos\":true,\"jobTitle\":\"Partner Agent\",\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F65469\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_32.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+12169731402\",\"quote\":\"As an experienced REALTOR and Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist with an intimate knowledge of the Chagrin Valley and Cleveland\\u0027s suburbs, Mike enjoys putting his knowledge and professionalism to work for his clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nAs one of the areas top producing REALTORS, Mike’s driving purpose is to help you reach your real estate goals. Whether that means outperforming the market in the sale of your home or getting you into a new one, he is ready to become your trusted adviser, negotiate on your behalf, and reach a win-win agreement as quickly and painlessly as possible.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe mission of Advantage Group is first and foremost, to help clients buy low and sell high, and to exceed their expectations on every level along the way. Their belief that long-term client relationships built on integrity and trust are the key to success. The Advantage Group\\u0027s customized approach is tailored to the clients\\u0027 needs, but it always includes an unwavering commitment to accountability and superior customer service.\\r\\n\\r\\nMike holds a B.A. in Economics from John Carroll University and lives in South Russell with his wife, Michaela, and their three children.\",\"__g_id\":\"1298490070\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772485500621,true,\"advantage-group-exp\",null,2,true,\"Westlake\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As an experienced REALTOR and Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist with an intimate knowledge of the Chagrin Valley and Cleveland\\u0027s suburbs, Mike enjoys putting his knowledge and professionalism to work for his clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nAs one of the areas top producing REALTORS, Mike’s driving purpose is to help you reach your real estate goals. Whether that means outperforming the market in the sale of your home or getting you into a new one, he is ready to become your trusted adviser, negotiate on your behalf, and reach a win-win agreement as quickly and painlessly as possible.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe mission of Advantage Group is first and foremost, to help clients buy low and sell high, and to exceed their expectations on every level along the way. Their belief that long-term client relationships built on integrity and trust are the key to success. The Advantage Group\\u0027s customized approach is tailored to the clients\\u0027 needs, but it always includes an unwavering commitment to accountability and superior customer service.\\r\\n\\r\\nMike holds a B.A. in Economics from John Carroll University and lives in South Russell with his wife, Michaela, and their three children.\",\"Rural East Team\",\"lastName\":\"Schikowski\",\"agentType\":2,\"photoUrl74x110\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen74x110\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"photoUrl120x120\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"gender\":1,\"hasPhotos\":true,\"jobTitle\":\"Partner Agent\",\"numReviews\":1,\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+14402797309\",\"quote\":\"Kayla Schikowski began her real estate career in 2019 and has been a dedicated agent ever since. Initially, the complexities of real estate transactions presented a challenge, but through diligent self-education, she has developed an exceptional understanding of the industry, successfully navigating over 100 transactions totaling over $20,000,000. Her six years of experience enable her to provide clients with expert-level service. She remains keenly aware of the initial uncertainties that often accompany real estate transactions, ensuring clients feel comfortable and confident throughout the process. Building strong client relationships is of paramount importance to Kayla. She is committed to providing the best possible experience and takes great pride in the high percentage of her business generated through referrals. For those seeking a knowledgeable, personable agent who prioritizes their interests and offers comprehensive real estate education, Kayla Schikowski is an ideal choice.\",\"__g_id\":\"1799193257\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772578707152,true,\"kayla-schikowski\",null,2,true,\"Mason\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"Kayla Schikowski began her real estate career in 2019 and has been a dedicated agent ever since. She is committed to providing the best possible experience and takes great pride in the high percentage of her business generated through referrals. living and entertaining. One of the largest homes on the street in recent sales, this property offers a rare combination of space, style, and extensive renovations—a true turnkey opportunity. Whether you are looking to downsize or simply prefer a functional, flowing layout, this home delivers. Situated on a generous and picturesque . 3-acre lot with a storage shed, this home offers a unique sense of openness and privacy. The home is centrally located between Graham and Kent Roads and near Route 8 and all of Stow\\u0027s shopping and dining options. Northport Park and its playground is also just a short two blocks away, making it convenient to enjoy outdoor recreation and green space. Tour\",\"sashTypeColor\":\"#7556F2\",\"isRedfin\":false,\"isActiveKeyListing\":false,\"openHouseText\":\"\",\"lastSaleDate\":\"\",\"lastSalePrice\":\"\"}],\"isHot\":false,\"hasVirtualTour\":true,\"hasVideoTour\":true,\"has3DTour\":false,\"newConstructionCommunityInfo\":{},\"isRedfin\":false,\"isNewConstruction\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Every home tells a story, and this timeless Silver Lake Tudor Revival tells one rooted in architecture \\u0026 local history. Designed in 1939 by Akron architect Melville Peck for Mabel Graham, who was instrumental in founding the Akron Symphony Orchestra, this 4 bedroom, 3.5 bath brick residence is rich in character, distinctive period craftsmanship \\u0026 enduring detail. Arched doorway w solid wood front door \\u0026 leaded glass insert creates a warm, lasting first impression. Original hardwood floors carry throughout the home \\u0026 into the main living room, where the orig fireplace showcases high-relief Dickensian story tiles, an extraordinary period detail rarely found today. a native of Northeast Ohio, I have an extensive dedication and understanding of the place and people I’ve grown up with. With real estate being a family trait passed down to me I carry an abundance of energy and excitement in finding the perfect home for you. With there being so many agents out there I would like to be one you trust. Whether you’re buying, listing, or looking to rent I don’t hope to just be a realtor involved in a transaction but to be a lifelong friend you can rely on in the crazy world of real estate!\",\"__g_id\":\"1004314860\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772240160765,true,\"vir-maharaj\",null,2,true,\"Wadsworth\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As a native of Northeast Ohio, I have an extensive dedication and understanding of the place and people I’ve grown up with. With real estate being a family trait passed down to me I carry an abundance of energy and excitement in finding the perfect home for you. With there being so many agents out there I would like to be one you trust. Whether you’re buying, listing, or looking to rent I don’t hope to just be a realtor involved in a transaction but to be a lifelong friend you can rely on in the crazy world of real estate!\",\"OH - Agent\",\"numReviews\":12,\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F42292\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_67.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+13306900060\",\"quote\":\"As a third-generation Realtor, real estate is in my blood! Growing up in this industry has allowed me the opportunity to learn the many different facets of it. It has given me the skillset and experience it takes to guide my clients through the home selling and buying process at the highest level. Born and raised in Northeast Ohio, I specialize in Residential Real Estate in Medina and Summit Counties and surrounding areas. I understand that buying or selling a home can be a very emotional process. Whether you\\u0027re buying your very first home, or trying to avoid foreclosure, I\\u0027m here to help ease the emotional burden and advise you every step of the way. You can be confident in my ability to negotiate the most money for your home, and the most home for your money!\",\"__g_id\":\"1214294179\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1773152850355,true,\"nicole-frantz\",null,2,true,\"Wadsworth\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As a third-generation Realtor, real estate is in my blood! Growing up in this industry has allowed me the opportunity to learn the many different facets of it. It has given me the skillset and experience it takes to guide my clients through the home selling and buying process at the highest level. Born and raised in Northeast Ohio, I specialize in Residential Real Estate in Medina and Summit Counties and surrounding areas. I understand that buying or selling a home can be a very emotional process. Whether you\\u0027re buying your very first home, or trying to avoid foreclosure, I\\u0027m here to help ease the emotional burden and advise you every step of the way. You can be confident in my ability to negotiate the most money for your home, and the most home for your money!\",\"OH - Wayne \\\"Powered By Holmes Group\\\" – a remarkable force in the world of real estate. Comprised of highly skilled and dedicated professionals with over 28 years of experience. Our team is committed to turning your real estate dreams into reality.\\r\\n\\r\\nWhat sets The Holmes Group apart is their unwavering passion for finding the perfect home for every client. With an extensive knowledge of the local market and a keen eye for detail, they excel in matching buyers with their ideal properties. Their commitment to excellence is not only reflected in their sales record but also in the long-lasting relationships they build with their clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe Holmes Group understands that selling a home is often an emotional journey, and they approach this process with empathy, expertise, and innovative marketing strategies. Their ability to showcase properties in the best light ensures that sellers receive top value for their investments.\\r\\n\\r\\nFurthermore, our team operates with the utmost integrity and professionalism, earning them the trust of both clients and industry peers. Whether you\\u0027re buying, selling, or investing in real estate, The Holmes Group is your dedicated partner, making the entire process seamless and successful. With their passion, knowledge, and commitment to excellence, The Holmes Group truly makes dreams come true in the world of real estate.\",\"__g_id\":\"123668067\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1773145983967,true,\"powered-by-holmes-group\",null,2,true,\"Canton\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"Introducing \\\"Powered By Holmes Group\\\" – a remarkable force in the world of real estate. Heating / Cooling
Forced Air, Gas / Central Air
Roof
Asphalt, Fiberglass
Exterior
Features
Outdoor
recreation and green space. Inside, wood-look laminate flooring runs throughout the living and dining rooms, creating a warm and cohesive feel. The spacious, fully applianced kitchen serves as the true heart of the home and houses the washer and dryer (included) for added convenience. At the rear of the home, a welcoming family room with a wood-burning fireplace provides a cozy retreat and features views of the backyard along with direct access to the large patio, making it ideal for relaxing or entertaining. You will appreciate the oversized two-car garage, complete with a dedicated work area, large storage closet and additional storage in the attic above. The home offers three bedrooms and a beautifully updated full bath with vinyl plank flooring, a newer vanity, and a walk-in shower with glass doors. Additional highlights include a whole-house fan, giving you an energy-efficient alternative to the air conditioner in the summer months and newer siding and gutters (within the last 5 years). Seller is providing a 1-year Home Warranty for the Buyer's peace of mind. Homes like this do not come on the market often, and this one is sure to please. It is ready for the next owner to add their own touches and truly make it their own. Come see! recreation. Inside, this 3-bedroom, 1.5-bath bi-level home features an updated kitchen and bathroom and a partially finished lower level offering additional flexible living space. Dr\",\"city\":\"Twinsburg\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44087\",\"countryCode\":\"US\"},\"isFMLS\":false,\"historyHasHiddenRows\":true,\"priceEstimates\":{\"displayLevel\":5,\"priceHomeUrl\":\"\u002Fwhat-is-my-home-worth?estPropertyId\\u003d66288976\\u0026src\\u003dldp-estimates\"},\"sectionPreviewText\":\"Price
