$294,900\",\"timelineDisplayLevel\":1},\"schoolsAndDistrictsInfo\":{\"servingThisHomeSchools\":[{\"servesHome\":false,\"parentRating\":2,\"distanceInMiles\":\"1.5\",\"gradeRanges\":\"PreK-1\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Wilcox Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51988\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FWilcox-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51988\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FWilcox-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":51988,\"numberOfStudents\":669,\"fullAddress\":\"9198 Darrow Rd, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":9,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":13,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051525,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2025\",\"review\":\"Went to school today for a Veterans Day celebration. The kids were so enthusiastic and spent so much time decorating for us veterans. There were four lunches. Both my great-niece and great nephew are attending the school and they are flourishing. Their parents could not be happier.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":7252602,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051524,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"July 2024\",\"review\":\"My daughter went to Wilcox PK-1 and we had a very good experience with the school and faculty. I am a teacher myself. I understand why schools have the policy’s they do and how things work behind the scenes. These children today - God love ‘em - are more out of control and unsure of themselves post-Covid than they were before. Adults are just as unsure about it and kids have seen how poorly we’ve managed ourselves during a crisis. It is not the teachers job to mother or parent your children - that’s your job. Please stop putting unrealistic and unwarranted expectations on teachers - parent your own children. Teach them to not fall to pieces if they’re bullyed because news flash - they’re going to get bullied in EVERY school you put them in. That’s what children do, Covid or not. The teachers and staff at Wilcox have bent over backwards for my child so many times I’ve lost count. Did she mess around on the playground a few times and get yelled at by the aids - yes! Big deal! She probably deserved it! Those aids are human too. Also to accuse a teacher or school employee of “not caring” is absolutely ludicrous. EVERY staff member there cares otherwise they wouldn’t be there - it’s not like they’re getting rich working at a school, they have many other options as far as careers go but they chose to be there. If you want to raise your child to be a sheltered wilting flower then by all means that’s your prerogative, but from what you’ve witnessed in this country over the last 4 years - do you really think that serves them long term? Teaching students discipline is a huge part of academic rigor. Academic rigor is a standard of excellence that professors and administrators expect of their students. “It is a fine line between challenging and frustrating a student, as it means that students are challenged to think, perform and grow to a level that they were not at previously” (wiki) Academic rigor is introduced at every stage of your child’s life starting in pre-k. Yes kids should feel safe at school, yes they should feel loved and cared for, but that’s 1 child among 100’s and they’re not going to treat your child any different than the next just because you think they’re “special”. I love the one comment left by the woman who said she was glad she listened to the fb comments and not the reviews on this site - she’s right! Anyone reading this - Wilcox is an amazing school, and we’re looking forward to a new chapter at Samuel Bissell next school year.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":6519275,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051523,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"February 2024\",\"review\":\"The principal and vice principal are sleepers. Teachers that should retire can\\u0027t, they are just waiting for the tenure and our children are suffering at their hands.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":6298598,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051522,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2024\",\"review\":\"Terrible school! We have had so many issues with the administration that I don’t even know where to begin. Bullying is a big problem that is just not dealt with. The lunch and recess aids are overwhelmed and treat the children terribly. I had to pull my child out one year because he was having nightmares and panic attacks about having to see the mean “lunch ladies” and yes I met with the principal about the issue and there was nothing but broken promises made to resolve the issue. The next year we had the same problem. “Mean and scary” staff again I had meetings with the principal even wrote emails to the superintendent and nothing changed. They just don’t care about the well being of the children. So once again I’m pulling my child out. I feel bad for the parents who don’t have the option to homeschool their kids and have to send their child to Wilcox. If your considering sending your kid their my advice to you would be to move somewhere closer to a different school district!! Bissel and Dodge aren’t much better! I’ve had kids in those aswell!!\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":6246199,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051521,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2021\",\"review\":\"We started kindergarten in the pandemic year and boy was it a struggle. We did virtual half and in-person the second half. While virtual didn’t work it for us, on-campus was amazing. They took proper precautions and still had fun. My daughter came home happy and excited everyday. Superb teachers. We almost didn’t move here because of the ratings on this site and glad I didn’t heed them and listened to parents on the Facebook group instead. Very pleased with how the year was handled and how much my daughter learned.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":4996241,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051520,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2019\",\"review\":\"Wish I could change schools but it\\u0027s the only one in the area\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":4061377,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051519,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2017\",\"review\":\"Only the first few weeks at this place and I am very unimpressed with the staff, structure, and the dictatorship-like policies!! And if your child is like mine with a food allergy you can forget it! I\\u0027ve found NOONE to be helpful and the \\\"Open House\\\" was an absolute joke as you are not allowed to engage with the teachers?!?!! The bus manages to be so late that my child can\\u0027t even eat breakfast at school, thus resulting having to get the child much earlier to eat breakfast at home, but the expectation is that children know the \\\"routine\\\" by week 4, BUT THE TRANSPORTATION SYSTEM\u002FADULTS STILL DONT KNOW THE ROUTINE!!!! Counting down the days to leave this school district!!\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":2899639,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":3240,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg City School District\",\"address\":\"11136 Ravenna Road\",\"city\":\"Twinsburg\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44087\",\"latitude\":41.338581,\"longitude\":-81.476059,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.twinsburg.k12.oh.us\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002Ftwinsburg-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":true,\"middle\":false,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":true,\"greatSchoolsRating\":9,\"parentRating\":5,\"distanceInMiles\":\"0.9\",\"gradeRanges\":\"2-3\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Samuel Bissell Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51963\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FSamuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51963\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FSamuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":51963,\"numberOfStudents\":581,\"fullAddress\":\"1811 Glenwood Dr, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"numReviews\":11,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":12,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051537,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2020\",\"review\":\"We have only been in the district for 2 years, but very impressed and extremely thankful we landed in Twinsburg CSD. The teachers are amazing. I do not know how they are able to accommodate the differences in children, but they do a tremendous job. My child feels safe, loved and is eager to go to school each day.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":4369899,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970369,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2012\",\"review\":\"Bissell elem. has aa very caring staff.When you enter the building you can feel the warmness! They are also very serious about the students education. Each child is treated as an individual. The children there are wonderful as well :)\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1259549,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740266,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2012\",\"review\":\"An amazing School with Staff that really cares about the students and their education. Major improvements with new Principal!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1209730,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8960172,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"I see HUGE improvements over last year - just proves it begins at the top and trickles down! My child has been at Bissell for 2 years. Mrs. Johnson, the new principal on many occasions has gone out of her way to make my child feel special and important. Its nice to have a principal who is visible and approachable - what a refreshing change! Overall, the teachers have been wonderful. You can tell they truly care about each child. My child requires extra help in some subjects and the teachers have been very proactive getting extra help before my child falls so far behind that catching up is impossible. I can see consistent technology updates in the classrooms, the school is kept very clean and the play ground area is nice. We have lots of friends who live in neighboring school systems and after hearing horror stories from them, I think we have it really good in Twinsburg! There is no perfect school, teacher or student - but we are very lucky we live a nice community!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1190193,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740265,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"Overall, I am very pleased with Bissell. My child has a looping teacher \\u0026 she has definitely challanged him with extra work \\u0026 books above his reading level. The extra school work keeps him busy \\u0026 focused in class which in turn keeps him from getting bored \\u0026 into trouble. My child has come home with a few choice words he has picked up on the playground but that will happen anywhere. I\\u0027m just grateful that my child is comfortable enough to tell me what he hears \\u0026 who said it so I can report it to the teachers for them to correct the issue.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1189782,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8960166,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"Our son is in his second year at Bissell and we love it! The new Principal and her focus on Respect has only added to the positive culture in this building. Our son is receiving a quality education, participates in the student counsel, and will make a bitter sweet move to a new building next year. Kudos to Bissell as being another of the excellent schools in the Twinsburg District!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1072752,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970364,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"We have two third graders and a graduate of Bissell. Of the 6 teachers that they have had, 5 of them have been exemplary and one has been good. I think that is a great record. I really like the new principal at Dodge and the school works hard to push the students while at the same time, building their self esteem. We have been very happy so far in Wilcox, Bissell and Dodge and are happy with our choice to send our kids to public schools in Twinsburg.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1189402,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":173924,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"9\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173926,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school are performing about as well as other students in the state, but this school may still have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":3240,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg City School District\",\"address\":\"11136 Ravenna Road\",\"city\":\"Twinsburg\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44087\",\"latitude\":41.338581,\"longitude\":-81.476059,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.twinsburg.k12.oh.us\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002Ftwinsburg-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":true,\"middle\":false,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":1,\"distanceInMiles\":\"1.0\",\"gradeRanges\":\"4-6\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Geo G Dodge Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F74017\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FGeo-G-Dodge-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F74017\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FGeo-G-Dodge-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4358-Geo-G-Dodge-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":74017,\"numberOfStudents\":857,\"fullAddress\":\"10225 Ravenna Rd, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":1,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":13,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051538,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2024\",\"review\":\"My 4th grader is constantly stressed and feels pressure from his teachers. They put too much focus on doing well on and preparing for state tests. Whenever a test is coming up my son has terrible anxiety about it the night before because his teachers tell the class how important it is that they do well. I’ve watched my child lose his love for learning after he started attending this school in September and it’s heartbreaking. He’s an extremely social child and has made a few very close friends that he loves seeing everyday which is the only reason I have not pulled him out. But, he has 2 younger brothers who will definitely not be going to Dodge.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904358,\"maponicsId\":6246168,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4358-Geo-G-Dodge-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":171733,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making average academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":171734,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The overall school is fine, however the start time is a little bit too early. I mean, come on 7 a.m is not a good time to start. I have to wake up a 6 a.m to get there which is awful. I tend to have trouble falling asleep at night, so I don\\u0027t end up getting enough sleep; therefor, my days are always a struggle, I still get straight A\\u0027s but it is very exhausting.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904357,\"maponicsId\":2055974,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8960175,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2008\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904357,\"maponicsId\":470759,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":180269,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"9\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":3240,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg City School District\",\"address\":\"11136 Ravenna Road\",\"city\":\"Twinsburg\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44087\",\"latitude\":41.338581,\"longitude\":-81.476059,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.twinsburg.k12.oh.us\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002Ftwinsburg-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":false,\"middle\":true,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":true,\"greatSchoolsRating\":8,\"parentRating\":3,\"distanceInMiles\":\"1.5\",\"gradeRanges\":\"9-12\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Twinsburg High School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51962\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FTwinsburg-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51962\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FTwinsburg-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":51962,\"numberOfStudents\":1106,\"fullAddress\":\"10084 Ravenna Rd, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"numReviews\":7,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":15,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051544,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"April 2024\",\"review\":\"My child was abducted by this school.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":6418345,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051543,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2023\",\"review\":\"Twinsburg High School is honestly not that great. Everyone in this school can get away with almost everything and nobody has any respect or honesty towards one another. If I had the choice I would have went to a different high school or at least a school that has staff caring more then just their ranking in education, and that is pretty much every public school in Twinsburg. At least 3\u002F4 of the students here are abusing vapes and exposure to things they should not be exposed to. Their overall education is good, but that seems to be all that they are caring about. Even if a student gets in trouble for example, assaulting someone, all they get is a slap in the wrist and nothing else. Almost none of the students respect the teachers here and use various ways to break the rules or to cheat. A ton of rumors can be easily spread around in Twinsburg High School and it can really hurt someone. I am afraid that somebody will over react and do something terrible. So, overall, if you don\\u0027t mind your child feeling like they can\\u0027t trust anyone at school, then Twinsburg is a great place to have an education at.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":6144976,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051542,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"April 2021\",\"review\":\"They do nothing for bullying and the curriculum is horrible unless you\\u0027re an honors student. I give the entire school system a solid 1\u002F10.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":4940969,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051541,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2020\",\"review\":\"This is such a great place for learning and growing! This school doesn\\u0027t just teach the basics, it sets you up with success! Very diverse classes and a large selection for each individual. The teachers there are really understanding and helpful, they also focus a lot on emotional support for students. Also, there are classes (Health) that really motivates students to take a stand against bullying, drug use, etc. I\\u0027m a sophomore at the high school, but I\\u0027m mostly doing CCP (College Credit Plus) classes, and I\\u0027m so glad that they have this option!!! Also, I\\u0027m also planning on taking some CVCC (Cuyahoga Valley Career Center) classes, which is a vocational school option for Twinsburg High School and many other schools. So, far I hear a lot of great things from CVCC, it provides practical help for preparing students for the workplace and it has so many awesome different programs! So excited! Hope this helps... :D --Age 15 (16 in March)\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":4772668,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051540,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2017\",\"review\":\"The school is very segregated not by race, but in intelligence in that you have a small group of motivated, mainly STEM-oriented individuals contrasted by a large mob of average and under achieving students. Although this phenomenon is common in most high schools, the stark differences between these groups of people just happen to be more severe here and the effect results with a student body that is unable to cooperate or support each other fully towards a shared ideal. Bullying and teasing among students can occur on a daily basis but fights, however, sparsely dot the school year but all of this, of course, depends on which group a student associates with; if the student is a member of that small, intellectual group mentioned earlier, then obviously he\u002Fshe is going to experience less teasing and see less fights than if he\u002Fshe were to associate with the larger group. The school administration is great at employing disciplinary measures when needed. Of course, there are the occasional slip-ups such as not caring whether a student serves an administrative detention and some punishments can be excessive. Overall the school is peaceful. The athletic department is well-funded; the football and boy\\u0027s bowling team need some improvement in performance.The fine-arts department is excellent. The high school is often represented at regional and state-level art competitions and the band as well as the orchestra routinely earn high ratings at their state performances.Teachers that cannot teach or do not teach well, as some students complain, pepper the school. Note, however, that the more rigorous the course is (honors and AP) the more teachers there are that are not only in-tune with the course, but also willing to actively teach their students. The most important thing to remember or take note about this school is that it has resources. Although it does not perform as well as surrounding schools in state standardized testing, the school perennially graduates students who were accepted to ivy-league schools, top-tier colleges, performing arts schools, and well-known universities in and outside Ohio. The resources are here, but it is up to students to actually use them. Once they take advantage of those resources, the administration will support them 100% towards whatever goal they pursue.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":2651021,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970384,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2013\",\"review\":\"I decided to send my son to Twinsburg HS after his Catholic School closed. I read the good reviews; the community was appealing and felt it would be a good fit for him. Well, sadly to say I was disappointed. I did not appreciate the block scheduling for high schoolers. I understand it s a tool for college prep but I feel as though core classes such as the sciences and mathematics need to be taught on a daily basis (at open house 2 teachers agreed with me). The teachers offered tutoring however, their schedules were very limited. I called the board of education and the library and to my astonishment, neither facility was able to offer assistance. Needless to say, I ended up finding a great tutor online. I was also unimpressed with the varsity coach, I felt he showed favoritism and just frankly wasn t a good coach (obviously judging by the schools track record). Regarding the principal s capability in leading the school, I will say that I was impressed by some disciplinary system however; I found it to be a bit biased. My child is quite intelligent, outgoing, and I felt this school lacked in a few areas. Transferring him was the best thing I could have done...\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":1425006,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740271,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2013\",\"review\":\"This Highschool is Amazing! sure some of the teachers are a little boring but what school has all exciting teachers. They have a lot of stuff for you to participate in and the majority of the staff there is amazing. Also we have these resource officers, so i always feel safe in case something was to happen and they always break up the few fights that happen. Also, there are a variety of electives you can take like foods, art, orchestra, sociology, drama and so much more. The people there are very friendly too and if you have any problems they have a wonderful guidance office. The school is also pretty laided back about dress code too. They don\\u0027t really care what you wear as long as it\\u0027s appropriate. In a lot of classes students can use their phones and calculators and stop watches but we often use phones a lot for taking tests where the teacher puts a question on the board and you answer it by texting in and then it shows everyone\\u0027s responses. I like taking tests this way,because it takes away the stress of regular ones. Also many teachers use celly which is this thing that allows you to text students the homework and they can text back and ask questions. I recommend this school.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":1277055,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":173923,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"7\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173922,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173920,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"10\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is above the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\\n\\nEven at schools with strong college and career readiness, there may be students who are not getting the opportunities they need to succeed.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173919,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school are performing about as well as other students in the state, but this school may still have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":3240,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg City School District\",\"address\":\"11136 Ravenna 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false}],\"districtsServingThisHome\":[{\"elementaryChoiceSchoolsInDistrict\":[],\"middleChoiceSchoolsInDistrict\":[],\"highChoiceSchoolsInDistrict\":[],\"hasChoiceSchools\":false,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg City School District\",\"districtUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.twinsburg.k12.oh.us\u002F\",\"districtId\":3240}],\"schoolsToShowOnDP\":[{\"servesHome\":true,\"greatSchoolsRating\":9,\"parentRating\":5,\"distanceInMiles\":\"0.9\",\"gradeRanges\":\"2-3\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Samuel Bissell Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51963\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FSamuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51963\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FSamuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":51963,\"numberOfStudents\":581,\"fullAddress\":\"1811 Glenwood Dr, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"numReviews\":11,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":12,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051537,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2020\",\"review\":\"We have only been in the district for 2 years, but very impressed and extremely thankful we landed in Twinsburg CSD. The teachers are amazing. I do not know how they are able to accommodate the differences in children, but they do a tremendous job. My child feels safe, loved and is eager to go to school each day.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":4369899,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970369,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2012\",\"review\":\"Bissell elem. has aa very caring staff.When you enter the building you can feel the warmness! They are also very serious about the students education. Each child is treated as an individual. The children there are wonderful as well :)\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1259549,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740266,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2012\",\"review\":\"An amazing School with Staff that really cares about the students and their education. Major improvements with new Principal!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1209730,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8960172,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"I see HUGE improvements over last year - just proves it begins at the top and trickles down! My child has been at Bissell for 2 years. Mrs. Johnson, the new principal on many occasions has gone out of her way to make my child feel special and important. Its nice to have a principal who is visible and approachable - what a refreshing change! Overall, the teachers have been wonderful. You can tell they truly care about each child. My child requires extra help in some subjects and the teachers have been very proactive getting extra help before my child falls so far behind that catching up is impossible. I can see consistent technology updates in the classrooms, the school is kept very clean and the play ground area is nice. We have lots of friends who live in neighboring school systems and after hearing horror stories from them, I think we have it really good in Twinsburg! There is no perfect school, teacher or student - but we are very lucky we live a nice community!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1190193,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740265,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"Overall, I am very pleased with Bissell. My child has a looping teacher \\u0026 she has definitely challanged him with extra work \\u0026 books above his reading level. The extra school work keeps him busy \\u0026 focused in class which in turn keeps him from getting bored \\u0026 into trouble. My child has come home with a few choice words he has picked up on the playground but that will happen anywhere. I\\u0027m just grateful that my child is comfortable enough to tell me what he hears \\u0026 who said it so I can report it to the teachers for them to correct the issue.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1189782,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8960166,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"Our son is in his second year at Bissell and we love it! The new Principal and her focus on Respect has only added to the positive culture in this building. Our son is receiving a quality education, participates in the student counsel, and will make a bitter sweet move to a new building next year. Kudos to Bissell as being another of the excellent schools in the Twinsburg District!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1072752,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970364,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"March 2012\",\"review\":\"We have two third graders and a graduate of Bissell. Of the 6 teachers that they have had, 5 of them have been exemplary and one has been good. I think that is a great record. I really like the new principal at Dodge and the school works hard to push the students while at the same time, building their self esteem. We have been very happy so far in Wilcox, Bissell and Dodge and are happy with our choice to send our kids to public schools in Twinsburg.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904359,\"maponicsId\":1189402,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":173924,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"9\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":3240,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg City School District\",\"address\":\"11136 Ravenna Road\",\"city\":\"Twinsburg\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44087\",\"latitude\":41.338581,\"longitude\":-81.476059,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.twinsburg.k12.oh.us\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002Ftwinsburg-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4359-Samuel-Bissell-Elementary-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":true,\"middle\":false,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":true,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":5,\"distanceInMiles\":\"1.3\",\"gradeRanges\":\"7-8\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"R B Chamberlin Middle School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F120902\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FR-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F120902\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FR-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F\",\"id\":120902,\"numberOfStudents\":565,\"fullAddress\":\"10270 Ravenna Rd, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"numReviews\":2,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":17,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051539,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"April 2016\",\"review\":\"I am a student here. The overall school is fine, however the start time is a little bit too early. I mean, come on 7 a.m is not a good time to start. I have to wake up a 6 a.m to get there which is awful. I tend to have trouble falling asleep at night, so I don\\u0027t end up getting enough sleep; therefor, my days are always a struggle, I still get straight A\\u0027s but it is very exhausting.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904357,\"maponicsId\":2055974,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":8960175,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2008\",\"review\":\"N\u002FA\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904357,\"maponicsId\":470759,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":180269,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"9\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":3240,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg Road\",\"city\":\"Twinsburg\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44087\",\"latitude\":41.338581,\"longitude\":-81.476059,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.twinsburg.k12.oh.us\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002Ftwinsburg-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4357-R-B-Chamberlin-Middle-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":false,\"middle\":true,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":true,\"greatSchoolsRating\":8,\"parentRating\":3,\"distanceInMiles\":\"1.5\",\"gradeRanges\":\"9-12\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Twinsburg High School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51962\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FTwinsburg-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51962\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FTwinsburg-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":51962,\"numberOfStudents\":1106,\"fullAddress\":\"10084 Ravenna Rd, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"numReviews\":7,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":15,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051544,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"April 2024\",\"review\":\"My child was abducted by this school.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":6418345,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051543,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"October 2023\",\"review\":\"Twinsburg High School is honestly not that great. Everyone in this school can get away with almost everything and nobody has any respect or honesty towards one another. If I had the choice I would have went to a different high school or at least a school that has staff caring more then just their ranking in education, and that is pretty much every public school in Twinsburg. At least 3\u002F4 of the students here are abusing vapes and exposure to things they should not be exposed to. Their overall education is good, but that seems to be all that they are caring about. Even if a student gets in trouble for example, assaulting someone, all they get is a slap in the wrist and nothing else. Almost none of the students respect the teachers here and use various ways to break the rules or to cheat. A ton of rumors can be easily spread around in Twinsburg High School and it can really hurt someone. I am afraid that somebody will over react and do something terrible. So, overall, if you don\\u0027t mind your child feeling like they can\\u0027t trust anyone at school, then Twinsburg is a great place to have an education at.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":6144976,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051542,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"April 2021\",\"review\":\"They do nothing for bullying and the curriculum is horrible unless you\\u0027re an honors student. I give the entire school system a solid 1\u002F10.\",\"reviewerRating\":2,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":4940969,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051541,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2020\",\"review\":\"This is such a great place for learning and growing! This school doesn\\u0027t just teach the basics, it sets you up with success! Very diverse classes and a large selection for each individual. The teachers there are really understanding and helpful, they also focus a lot on emotional support for students. Also, there are classes (Health) that really motivates students to take a stand against bullying, drug use, etc. I\\u0027m a sophomore at the high school, but I\\u0027m mostly doing CCP (College Credit Plus) classes, and I\\u0027m so glad that they have this option!!! Also, I\\u0027m also planning on taking some CVCC (Cuyahoga Valley Career Center) classes, which is a vocational school option for Twinsburg High School and many other schools. So, far I hear a lot of great things from CVCC, it provides practical help for preparing students for the workplace and it has so many awesome different programs! So excited! Hope this helps... :D --Age 15 (16 in March)\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":4772668,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051540,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2017\",\"review\":\"The school is very segregated not by race, but in intelligence in that you have a small group of motivated, mainly STEM-oriented individuals contrasted by a large mob of average and under achieving students. Although this phenomenon is common in most high schools, the stark differences between these groups of people just happen to be more severe here and the effect results with a student body that is unable to cooperate or support each other fully towards a shared ideal. Bullying and teasing among students can occur on a daily basis but fights, however, sparsely dot the school year but all of this, of course, depends on which group a student associates with; if the student is a member of that small, intellectual group mentioned earlier, then obviously he\u002Fshe is going to experience less teasing and see less fights than if he\u002Fshe were to associate with the larger group. The school administration is great at employing disciplinary measures when needed. Of course, there are the occasional slip-ups such as not caring whether a student serves an administrative detention and some punishments can be excessive. Overall the school is peaceful. The athletic department is well-funded; the football and boy\\u0027s bowling team need some improvement in performance.The fine-arts department is excellent. The high school is often represented at regional and state-level art competitions and the band as well as the orchestra routinely earn high ratings at their state performances.Teachers that cannot teach or do not teach well, as some students complain, pepper the school. Note, however, that the more rigorous the course is (honors and AP) the more teachers there are that are not only in-tune with the course, but also willing to actively teach their students. The most important thing to remember or take note about this school is that it has resources. Although it does not perform as well as surrounding schools in state standardized testing, the school perennially graduates students who were accepted to ivy-league schools, top-tier colleges, performing arts schools, and well-known universities in and outside Ohio. The resources are here, but it is up to students to actually use them. Once they take advantage of those resources, the administration will support them 100% towards whatever goal they pursue.\",\"reviewerRating\":4,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":2651021,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5970384,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2013\",\"review\":\"I decided to send my son to Twinsburg HS after his Catholic School closed. I read the good reviews; the community was appealing and felt it would be a good fit for him. Well, sadly to say I was disappointed. I did not appreciate the block scheduling for high schoolers. I understand it s a tool for college prep but I feel as though core classes such as the sciences and mathematics need to be taught on a daily basis (at open house 2 teachers agreed with me). The teachers offered tutoring however, their schedules were very limited. I called the board of education and the library and to my astonishment, neither facility was able to offer assistance. Needless to say, I ended up finding a great tutor online. I was also unimpressed with the varsity coach, I felt he showed favoritism and just frankly wasn t a good coach (obviously judging by the schools track record). Regarding the principal s capability in leading the school, I will say that I was impressed by some disciplinary system however; I found it to be a bit biased. My child is quite intelligent, outgoing, and I felt this school lacked in a few areas. Transferring him was the best thing I could have done...\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":1425006,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":14740271,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2013\",\"review\":\"This Highschool is Amazing! sure some of the teachers are a little boring but what school has all exciting teachers. They have a lot of stuff for you to participate in and the majority of the staff there is amazing. Also we have these resource officers, so i always feel safe in case something was to happen and they always break up the few fights that happen. Also, there are a variety of electives you can take like foods, art, orchestra, sociology, drama and so much more. The people there are very friendly too and if you have any problems they have a wonderful guidance office. The school is also pretty laided back about dress code too. They don\\u0027t really care what you wear as long as it\\u0027s appropriate. In a lot of classes students can use their phones and calculators and stop watches but we often use phones a lot for taking tests where the teacher puts a question on the board and you answer it by texting in and then it shows everyone\\u0027s responses. I like taking tests this way,because it takes away the stress of regular ones. Also many teachers use celly which is this thing that allows you to text students the homework and they can text back and ask questions. I recommend this school.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904356,\"maponicsId\":1277055,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":173923,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"7\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173922,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173920,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"10\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is above the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\\n\\nEven at schools with strong college and career readiness, there may be students who are not getting the opportunities they need to succeed.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond. The College Readiness Rating was created using the following data from the 2021 Civil Rights Data Collection: percentage of students enrolled in IB, AP or Dual Enrollment classes in grades 9-12, using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent participation data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 SAT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 ACT percent college ready data from Ohio Department of Education, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":173919,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school are performing about as well as other students in the state, but this school may still have achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":3240,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg City School District\",\"address\":\"11136 Ravenna Road\",\"city\":\"Twinsburg\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44087\",\"latitude\":41.338581,\"longitude\":-81.476059,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.twinsburg.k12.oh.us\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002Ftwinsburg-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4356-Twinsburg-High-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":false,\"middle\":false,\"high\":true,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":6,\"parentRating\":1,\"distanceInMiles\":\"1.0\",\"gradeRanges\":\"4-6\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Geo G Dodge Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F74017\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FGeo-G-Dodge-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F74017\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FGeo-G-Dodge-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4358-Geo-G-Dodge-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":74017,\"numberOfStudents\":857,\"fullAddress\":\"10225 Ravenna Rd, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":1,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":13,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051538,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2024\",\"review\":\"My 4th grader is constantly stressed and feels pressure from his teachers. They put too much focus on doing well on and preparing for state tests. Whenever a test is coming up my son has terrible anxiety about it the night before because his teachers tell the class how important it is that they do well. I’ve watched my child lose his love for learning after he started attending this school in September and it’s heartbreaking. He’s an extremely social child and has made a few very close friends that he loves seeing everyday which is the only reason I have not pulled him out. But, he has 2 younger brothers who will definitely not be going to Dodge.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904358,\"maponicsId\":6246168,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4358-Geo-G-Dodge-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":171733,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"5\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making average academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":171734,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F74611\u002FOH\u002FSolon\u002FSolon-High-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F74611\u002FOH\u002FSolon\u002FSolon-High-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2214-Solon-High-School\u002F\",\"id\":74611,\"numberOfStudents\":1450,\"fullAddress\":\"33600 Inwood Dr, Solon, OH 44139\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":10,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":16,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.solonschools.org\u002Fshs\",\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46048397,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"December 2025\",\"review\":\"I didn\\u0027t go to this high school. And I\\u0027m glad I didn\\u0027t. But the reason I was no stranger to this school was because I used to be on swim team. And on swim meets, there was a mean and rude lady who accused me of playing in the water in the diving pool when I was not! She even threatened to ban me from the diving pool! So I lap swim again and she disallowed me from swimming in the diving pool! She is not the boss of me! I want that lady fired for the way she treated me!\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3902214,\"maponicsId\":7296514,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2214-Solon-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46048396,\"reviewedBy\":\"Student\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2024\",\"review\":\"This school is one of the best schools in ohio, and it lives up to that name.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3902214,\"maponicsId\":6256586,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2214-Solon-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46048395,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2022\",\"review\":\"The school purposefully hid diversity and inclusion materials being taught to the students from the parents. Parents contacted the high school principal and the superintendent asking to see these materials after they heard concerning comments from their children; both claimed that the materials were best to be seen AFTER the presentation in order to have \\\"organic conversations\\\" with the students. They claimed parents could always opt their children out of the lessons, yet they refused to share with the parents when the lesson would be taking place; it was only communicated after the lesson was presented to the students. A definition of controversial terms were also never sent to or posted on their website; these were emailed directly to the student only. The principal also sent an email to parents recommending controversial reading and stated they needed to be mindful of their privilege. Lastly, the superintendent claimed he reviewed and approved all of the material, so one has to wonder about the HS principal and the superintendent\\u0027s judgement. When the school board was contacted, they just sent the parents back to the superintendent, who then sends you back to the principal, who then sends you back to the superintendent. Requested feedback after the lessons from both teachers and students were that the lessons were highly inappropriate to be in a public school setting; the materials were political in nature, were not based on fact, and was put together by the PTA. Several students felt like it was saying that only certain ethnic groups were capable of racism. In addition, the PTA insisted the materials needed to be kept a secret from parents unless you paid to be a PTA member, yet PTA parents were also refused the material. It wasn\\u0027t until the community came together to share their frustration and disappointment, which included showing samples of the material, at the school board meeting to finally end the secrecy.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3902214,\"maponicsId\":5467013,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2214-Solon-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46048394,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"April 2021\",\"review\":\"school is not the greatest they over give work and expect for you to do it the next day also not very supportive\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3902214,\"maponicsId\":4937450,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2214-Solon-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46048393,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2016\",\"review\":\"Solon Schools are public schools. If you think that you are getting \\\"quality\\\" education at solon schools and the food that solon schools serve in their cafeterias is \\\"healthy\\\", then you should consider yourself as ignorant and brainwashed. Read the details.\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3902214,\"maponicsId\":2244955,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2214-Solon-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46048392,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"June 2015\",\"review\":\"I read the reviews on this site 6 years back. Now my child is out of school and its time to provide my take. School district\\u003dCorporation. Superintendent\\u003dCEO. Principals\\u003dDeputy Sheriffs. Assistant Principals\\u003dAssistant Sheriffs, Teachers\\u003dEmployees, Students\\u003dClients. School Board members give an illusion that residents have a say in the functioning of the school. They don\\u0027t. Curriculum made in Columbus. Solon schools are good, not too good, not too bad. Enjoy the entertainment. Just be glad that its tax free, so far. GLTA.\",\"reviewerRating\":3,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3902214,\"maponicsId\":1631762,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2214-Solon-High-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":4949200,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2013\",\"review\":\"Needs to get rid of some rotten teachers that are old, tired, fumpy, and stuck.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3902214,\"maponicsId\":1384658,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2214-Solon-High-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":172372,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"College Readiness\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"10\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"This school is above the state average in key measures of college and career readiness, such as graduation rates, college entrance exams, and advanced courses.\\n\\nEven at schools with strong college and career readiness, there may be students who are not getting the opportunities they need to succeed.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The College Readiness Rating uses this high school\\u0027s graduation rates, college entrance exam participation and performance, or AP, IB, or Dual Enrollment participation to determine how well schools are preparing students for success in college and beyond.
