The Test Rating was created using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":172371,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"9\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school are performing better than other students in the state, and this school is likely closing achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":172370,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"10\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"}],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":8108,\"districtName\":\"Solon City School District\",\"address\":\"33800 Inwood Drive\",\"city\":\"Solon\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44139\",\"latitude\":41.377995,\"longitude\":-81.43895,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fsolonschools.org\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002Fsolon-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2214-Solon-High-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":false,\"middle\":false,\"high\":true,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"parentRating\":2,\"distanceInMiles\":\"1.5\",\"gradeRanges\":\"PreK-1\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Wilcox Elementary School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51988\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FWilcox-Elementary-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F51988\u002FOH\u002FTwinsburg\u002FWilcox-Elementary-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\",\"id\":51988,\"numberOfStudents\":669,\"fullAddress\":\"9198 Darrow Rd, Twinsburg, OH 44087\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":9,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":13,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46051525,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2025\",\"review\":\"Went to school today for a Veterans Day celebration. The kids were so enthusiastic and spent so much time decorating for us veterans. There were four lunches. Both my great-niece and great nephew are attending the school and they are flourishing. Their parents could not be happier.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":7252602,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051524,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"July 2024\",\"review\":\"My daughter went to Wilcox PK-1 and we had a very good experience with the school and faculty. I am a teacher myself. I understand why schools have the policy’s they do and how things work behind the scenes. These children today - God love ‘em - are more out of control and unsure of themselves post-Covid than they were before. Adults are just as unsure about it and kids have seen how poorly we’ve managed ourselves during a crisis. It is not the teachers job to mother or parent your children - that’s your job. Please stop putting unrealistic and unwarranted expectations on teachers - parent your own children. Teach them to not fall to pieces if they’re bullyed because news flash - they’re going to get bullied in EVERY school you put them in. That’s what children do, Covid or not. The teachers and staff at Wilcox have bent over backwards for my child so many times I’ve lost count. Did she mess around on the playground a few times and get yelled at by the aids - yes! Big deal! She probably deserved it! Those aids are human too. Also to accuse a teacher or school employee of “not caring” is absolutely ludicrous. EVERY staff member there cares otherwise they wouldn’t be there - it’s not like they’re getting rich working at a school, they have many other options as far as careers go but they chose to be there. If you want to raise your child to be a sheltered wilting flower then by all means that’s your prerogative, but from what you’ve witnessed in this country over the last 4 years - do you really think that serves them long term? Teaching students discipline is a huge part of academic rigor. Academic rigor is a standard of excellence that professors and administrators expect of their students. “It is a fine line between challenging and frustrating a student, as it means that students are challenged to think, perform and grow to a level that they were not at previously” (wiki) Academic rigor is introduced at every stage of your child’s life starting in pre-k. Yes kids should feel safe at school, yes they should feel loved and cared for, but that’s 1 child among 100’s and they’re not going to treat your child any different than the next just because you think they’re “special”. I love the one comment left by the woman who said she was glad she listened to the fb comments and not the reviews on this site - she’s right! Anyone reading this - Wilcox is an amazing school, and we’re looking forward to a new chapter at Samuel Bissell next school year.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":6519275,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051523,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"February 2024\",\"review\":\"The principal and vice principal are sleepers. Teachers that should retire can\\u0027t, they are just waiting for the tenure and our children are suffering at their hands.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":6298598,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051522,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2024\",\"review\":\"Terrible school! We have had so many issues with the administration that I don’t even know where to begin. Bullying is a big problem that is just not dealt with. The lunch and recess aids are overwhelmed and treat the children terribly. I had to pull my child out one year because he was having nightmares and panic attacks about having to see the mean “lunch ladies” and yes I met with the principal about the issue and there was nothing but broken promises made to resolve the issue. The next year we had the same problem. “Mean and scary” staff again I had meetings with the principal even wrote emails to the superintendent and nothing changed. They just don’t care about the well being of the children. So once again I’m pulling my child out. I feel bad for the parents who don’t have the option to homeschool their kids and have to send their child to Wilcox. If your considering sending your kid their my advice to you would be to move somewhere closer to a different school district!! Bissel and Dodge aren’t much better! I’ve had kids in those aswell!!\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":6246199,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051521,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2021\",\"review\":\"We started kindergarten in the pandemic year and boy was it a struggle. We did virtual half and in-person the second half. While virtual didn’t work it for us, on-campus was amazing. They took proper precautions and still had fun. My daughter came home happy and excited everyday. Superb teachers. We almost didn’t move here because of the ratings on this site and glad I didn’t heed them and listened to parents on the Facebook group instead. Very pleased with how the year was handled and how much my daughter learned.\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":4996241,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051520,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"May 2019\",\"review\":\"Wish I could change schools but it\\u0027s the only one in the area\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":4061377,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46051519,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"September 2017\",\"review\":\"Only the first few weeks at this place and I am very unimpressed with the staff, structure, and the dictatorship-like policies!! And if your child is like mine with a food allergy you can forget it! I\\u0027ve found NOONE to be helpful and the \\\"Open House\\\" was an absolute joke as you are not allowed to engage with the teachers?!?!! The bus manages to be so late that my child can\\u0027t even eat breakfast at school, thus resulting having to get the child much earlier to eat breakfast at home, but the expectation is that children know the \\\"routine\\\" by week 4, BUT THE TRANSPORTATION SYSTEM\u002FADULTS STILL DONT KNOW THE ROUTINE!!!! Counting down the days to leave this school district!!\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3904360,\"maponicsId\":2899639,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[],\"schoolDistrict\":{\"id\":3240,\"districtName\":\"Twinsburg City School District\",\"address\":\"11136 Ravenna Road\",\"city\":\"Twinsburg\",\"stateCode\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44087\",\"latitude\":41.338581,\"longitude\":-81.476059,\"websiteUrl\":\"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.twinsburg.k12.oh.us\u002F\",\"greatschoolDistrictOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002Ftwinsburg-city-school-district\u002F\"},\"greatschoolParentReviewsUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Ftwinsburg\u002F4360-Wilcox-Elementary-School\u002F#Reviews\",\"elementary\":true,\"middle\":false,\"high\":false,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"December 2025\",\"hasMultipleCatchmentAreas\":false},{\"servesHome\":false,\"greatSchoolsRating\":9,\"parentRating\":2,\"distanceInMiles\":\"2.5\",\"gradeRanges\":\"5-7\",\"institutionType\":\"Public\",\"name\":\"Orchard Middle School\",\"schoolUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F131213\u002FOH\u002FSolon\u002FOrchard-Middle-School\",\"searchUrl\":\"\u002Fschool\u002F131213\u002FOH\u002FSolon\u002FOrchard-Middle-School\",\"greatSchoolOverviewUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2212-Orchard-Middle-School\u002F\",\"id\":131213,\"numberOfStudents\":733,\"fullAddress\":\"6800 SOM Center Rd, Solon, OH 44139\",\"isNearby\":true,\"numReviews\":3,\"studentToTeacherRatio\":15,\"schoolReviews\":[{\"schoolId\":46048399,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"January 2026\",\"review\":\"The principal violated my child’s fourth amendment rights by searching his backpack claiming that she was looking for a lighter that someone told her he had which he didn’t . She then looked through his papers and claimed to “clean his backpack” upon which she discovered that he had post it notes rolled up like a you know what. I was appalled. She never apologized to my son either when I asked her too. When they put you on some list it’s like anything that your child does, then they don’t even talk to them they just report it to the principal and will give them a detention. It’s like a prison.\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3902212,\"maponicsId\":7346517,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2212-Orchard-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":46048398,\"reviewedBy\":\"Other\",\"datePosted\":\"November 2025\",\"review\":\"This school is excessively punitive! Excessively! Operates more like a prison! Do yourself a favor and transfer your child before they get to this place!\",\"reviewerRating\":1,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"February 2026\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3902212,\"maponicsId\":7282391,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2212-Orchard-Middle-School\u002F\"},{\"schoolId\":5961257,\"reviewedBy\":\"Parent\",\"datePosted\":\"August 2013\",\"review\":\"I agree with one of the previous posters about the math program not being tweaked for gifted students. My son was in an excel program in Cuyahoga Falls and when we told the school that they kind of brushed us off, but I assumed because Solon held their schools to a higher standard and most schools excel programs was the norm for Solon. But now that he is a 7th grader at Solon Middle school they saw his test scores and NOW they are advancing him to 8th grade algebra. But with that being said...Solon schools have so much more to offer and the communication between the school, the staff and the parents is awesome! We get emails about upcoming events and if there was a disruption at the school (ie...electricity went out one time and they sent an email stating the problem and another when it was back up). I LOVE SOLON!!!\",\"reviewerRating\":5,\"lastUpdatedDate\":\"September 2024\",\"institutionGreatschoolId\":3902212,\"maponicsId\":1373235,\"url\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.greatschools.org\u002Fohio\u002Fsolon\u002F2212-Orchard-Middle-School\u002F\"}],\"schoolGranularRatings\":[{\"schoolId\":171612,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Student Growth\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"8\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Students at this school are making more academic progress from one grade to the next compared to similar students in the state.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Student Progress Rating measures whether students at this school are making academic progress over time based on student growth data provided by the Department of Education. Specifically, this rating looks at how much progress individual students have made on state assessments during the past year or more, how this performance aligns with expected progress based on a student growth model established by the state Department of Education, and how this school\\u0027s growth data compares to other schools in the state. The Growth Rating was created using 2025 Student growth data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":171615,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Equity\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"10\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"Underserved students at this school are performing better than other students in the state, and this school is likely closing achievement gaps between different student groups.\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"Using the state’s Department of Education data, the Equity Overview Rating compares this school to other schools in the state by looking at how well this school serves the needs of disadvantaged students relative to all students using state proficiency tests, student growth or academic progress data, and college readiness data. The Equity Rating was created using 2024 4-year high school graduation rate data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2025 Ohio State Test data from Ohio Department of Education, using 2023 demographic data from the National Center for Education Statistics, and using 2025 demographic data from Ohio Department of Education.\"},{\"schoolId\":171613,\"dataSourceId\":633,\"schoolGranularRatingType\":\"Test Scores\",\"schoolGranularRatingValue\":\"10\",\"schoolGranularRatingCopyText\":\"State test results at this school are above the state average, so students are likely performing at or above grade level.\\n\\nBecause state averages can be low, some students at this school may still not be performing at grade level.\\n\",\"schoolGranularRatingsDescription\":\"The Test Score Rating examines how students at this school performed on standardized tests compared with other schools in the state. Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Minimal risk of severe winds over next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Wind Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street National Wind Model, which forecasts how hurricanes and costs from resulting wind damages to structures will change over time due to climate change.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Wind Factor indicates its likelihood to experience extreme winds over the next 30 years, from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Wind Factor scores are more likely to experience higher winds more frequently today and in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fwind?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on the likelihood and speed of hurricane, tornado, or severe storm winds reaching this property, it has minimal wind risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s wind risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wind likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows this property\\u0027s likelihood of being in a tropical storm event with 3-second wind gusts exceeding 50 mph (39 mph for 1-minute sustained winds) over the next 30 years.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{},\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F395814856\u002F395814856_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#wind\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all wind data on firststreet.org\"}},\"floodDataV2\":{\"fsid\":395814856,\"climateId\":\"flood\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Flood Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Minimal risk of a flood reaching the building in the next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Flood Factor® is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street Flood Model, a nationwide, probabilistic flood model that shows a location’s risk of flooding from rain, rivers, tides, and storm surge. It builds off of decades of peer-reviewed research and forecasts how flood risks will change over time due to changes in the environment. Flood Factor is not intended to include all possible risks of flood.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Flood Factor is an indicator of its comprehensive flood risk, ranging from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Flood Factors are more likely to have flooded in the past, and are more likely to flood in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fflood?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on this property’s projected likelihood and depth of flooding, it has minimal flood risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s flood risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Flood risk accumulates over time. Cumulative risk is calculated to the largest building or center of an empty lot. Raised or elevated buildings may not be as vulnerable as ground-level buildings or buildings with basements.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is unlikely to flood in the next 30 years.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":0.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":0.0,\"yMax0\":0,\"yMax5\":0,\"yMax10\":0,\"yMax15\":0,\"yMax20\":0,\"yMax25\":0,\"yMax30\":0,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F395814856\u002F395814856_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#flood\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all flood data on firststreet.org\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionTitle\":{\"value\":\"FEMA zone X (unshaded)\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout\":{\"value\":\"The FEMA flood zone shown is the most probable estimated zone.\\n\\nThe Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) is a government agency that maps flood zones in communities across the US, identifying areas of varying flood risk on Flood Insurance Rate Maps (FIRMs). FEMA creates FIRMs to inform flood insurance pricing in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) and to guide floodplain management regulations for NFIP-participating communities.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"http:\u002F\u002Ffloodsmart.gov\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on floodsmart.gov\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout2\":{\"value\":\"The FEMA flood zone shown is the most probable zone as estimated by MassiveCert, Inc.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrl2\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.massivecert.com\u002F\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyoutUrlText2\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on massivecert.com\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is estimated to be in FEMA Zone X (unshaded), which is designated as a low-to-moderate risk flood area. In this zone, the risk of flooding is reduced, but not completely removed.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.floodsmart.gov\u002Fflood-map-zone\u002Ffind-yours\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on floodsmart.gov\"},\"insuranceTitle\":{\"value\":\"Flood insurance\"},\"insuranceFlyout\":{\"value\":\"To help you understand what it costs to protect this home with flood insurance we\\u0027ve partnered with Neptune Flood. Redfin may receive a commission if you purchase a policy through this link. There may be other flood insurance providers in your area.\"},\"insuranceDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on your estimated FEMA zone, flood insurance is not required. However, FEMA always recommends considering insurance.\\n\\nFlood insurance for this home ranges from $473 to $860 per year, based on information from 4 providers.\"},\"insuranceLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002F1str.ee\u002Ft\u002Fhippo\u002Fflood\u002F395814856?source\\u003dredfin\"},\"insuranceLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Get an instant quote\"}},\"fireDataV2\":{\"fsid\":395814856,\"climateId\":\"fire\",\"expandableHeading\":\"1\u002F10 Fire Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"Unlikely to be in a wildfire in next 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire likelihood over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Fire Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. It uses the First Street National Wildfire Model\\u0027s nationwide, behavioral wildfire model that shows a specific location\\u0027s probabilistic risk of wildfire based on the vegetation, topography, and fire weather in the surrounding area. Fire Factor is not intended to include all possible risks of fire.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Fire Factor indicates its cumulative wildfire risk, ranging from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Fire Factors are more likely to be in a wildfire in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Ffire?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on this property\\u0027s distance to wildfire risk areas and burnable vegetation, it has minimal wildfire risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":1,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s fire risk is not significantly changing over time.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire likelihood over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Wildfire risk accumulates over time, so a property with a 0.1% chance of wildfire this year would have at least a 3% chance of being affected by wildfire at least once within 30 years. Being affected by wildfire refers to any actively burning fuels coming into contact with the largest building on the property.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"Unlikely to be in a wildfire in next 30 years.\"},\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F395814856\u002F395814856_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#fire\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all fire data on firststreet.org\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionTitle\":{\"value\":\"USFS relative risk rank\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionFlyout\":{\"value\":\"The Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) is a government agency that maps flood zones in communities across the US, identifying areas of varying flood risk on Flood Insurance Rate Maps (FIRMs). FEMA creates FIRMs to inform flood insurance pricing in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) and to guide floodplain management regulations for NFIP-participating communities.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property is located in a county with an average wildfire risk greater than 3.20% of counties in the United States.\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwildfirerisk.org\u002F\"},\"riskSpecificSubsectionLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on wildfirerisk.org\"},\"insuranceTitle\":{\"value\":\"Fire insurance\"},\"insuranceFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Most homeowners insurance typically includes fire coverage but in some areas, this will need to be purchased separately. Investing in fire insurance is one way to offset the cost of wildfire damage, and can help reduce your financial risk.\"},\"insuranceDescription\":{\"value\":\"Fire insurance for this home ranges from $713 to $1323 per year, based on information from 6 providers.\"},\"insuranceLink\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002F1str.ee\u002Ft\u002Fhippo\u002Ffire\u002F395814856?source\\u003dredfin\"},\"insuranceLinkText\":{\"value\":\"Get a quote\"}},\"heatDataV2\":{\"fsid\":395814856,\"climateId\":\"heat\",\"expandableHeading\":\"2\u002F10 Heat Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"7 days above 96° expected this year, 17 days in 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Hot days over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"Heat Factor is a tool created by the nonprofit First Street. Heat Factor™ uses the First Street Extreme Heat Model to determine property-specific heat risk across the United States. The model is a spatial temperature model that determines a specific location’s exposure to extreme heat events based on the surface temperature, topography, land cover, and humidity in the surrounding area.\\n\\nA property\\u0027s Heat Factor indicates its risk of extreme heat exposure over the next thirty years, ranging from 1 (minimal risk) to 10 (extreme risk). Heat Factors are based on the current average daily high temperature and humidity of a property’s specific location during the hottest month of the year, and considers how it’s expected to grow over the next 30 years.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fmethodology\u002Fheat?utm_source\\u003dredfin\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more on firststreet.org\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on current and future temperature and humidity in the area and at this specific location, this property has minor heat risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":2,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s heat risk is increasing as weather patterns change.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Hot days over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows the number of days exceeding what is considered a hot day at this property. This is defined by using the 98th percentile “feels like” temperature in this area, or the hottest 7 days in the 4km area surrounding this property for a given year and using the lowest “high” temperature from those 7 days as a base. A property may have more or less hot days than the surrounding area depending on its individual exposure to heat.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"A “hot day” in this area is considered to be any day with a “feels like” temperature of 96º. Over the next 30 years, this property is expected to see a 10% increase in the number of hot days per year.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":7.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":9.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":10.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":12.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":14.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":15.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":17.0,\"yMax0\":39,\"yMax5\":48,\"yMax10\":58,\"yMax15\":67,\"yMax20\":76,\"yMax25\":86,\"yMax30\":95,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F395814856\u002F395814856_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#heat\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all heat data on firststreet.org\"}},\"airData\":{\"fsid\":395814856,\"climateId\":\"air\",\"expandableHeading\":\"3\u002F10 Air Factor\",\"expandableSummary\":{\"value\":\"2 unhealthy days expected this year, 3 days in 30 years\"},\"entryPointTitle\":{\"value\":\"Air Factor\"},\"entryPointFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Air Factor\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyoutTitle\":{\"value\":\"Poor air quality days over time\"},\"entryPointFlyout\":{\"value\":\"A property\\u0027s Air Factor indicates the number of poor air quality days it will experience over the next 30 years, from 1 (minimal) to 10 (extreme). Properties with higher Air Factor scores are more likely to experience poor air quality days today and in the future.\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.redfin.com\u002Fguides\u002Fclimate-change-housing-impact\u002Fair-risk\"},\"entryPointFlyoutUrlText\":{\"value\":\"Learn more about air quality\"},\"entryPointDescription\":{\"value\":\"Based on the expected number of poor air quality days where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100, this area has moderate air quality risk.\"},\"riskFactorScore\":3,\"scoreDescription\":{\"value\":\"This property\\u0027s air risk is increasing as weather patterns change.\"},\"entrypointGraphTitle\":{\"value\":\"Poor air quality days over time\"},\"entrypointGraphFlyout\":{\"value\":\"This chart shows the change in the number of poor air quality days over time, where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100. These are the expected number of poor air quality days in a bad year, which is defined as a year with higher than average wildfire activity. This increases the amount of particulate matter (PM2.5) in the air and therefore worsens air quality.\"},\"entrypointGraphDescription\":{\"value\":\"Over the next 30 years, this area will experience a 50.0% increase in the number of poor air quality days, i.e. where the Air Quality Index (AQI) exceeds 100.\"},\"graphRiskYear0\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear5\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear10\":2.0,\"graphRiskYear15\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear20\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear25\":3.0,\"graphRiskYear30\":3.0,\"yMax0\":63,\"yMax5\":63,\"yMax10\":63,\"yMax15\":95,\"yMax20\":95,\"yMax25\":95,\"yMax30\":95,\"riskFactorHomeUrl\":{\"value\":\"https:\u002F\u002Ffirststreet.org\u002Fproperty\u002F395814856\u002F395814856_fsid\u002F0?utm_source\\u003dredfin#air\"},\"riskFactorHomeURLText\":{\"value\":\"See all air data on firststreet.org\"}}},\"homeHighlightsTagsInfo\":[\"LARGE KITCHEN\",\"CLOSE TO SHOPPING\",\"DINING AREA\",\"REC ROOM\",\"WALKOUT TO BACK YARD\",\"CLOSE TO PARKS\"],\"buyingPowerInfo\":{\"formHeaderDisclaimerTitle\":\"Disclaimer\",\"formHeaderDisclaimer\":\"This tool is for general informational purposes only. We base your buying power on your DTI. We calculate your buying power based on a DTI of 36%, which is the general rule around how much of your income should go toward debt.\\n\\nThe ranges below will help you understand if you have enough income to live comfortably for the selected home price. A general guide is to budget around 28% of your pre-tax income for your mortgage payment, and another 8% for other debts.\\n\\nAffordable: 0%-36%\\nStretch: 37%-50%\\nAmbitious: Above 50%\",\"regionName\":\"Twinsburg\",\"regionTypeId\":2,\"regionId\":19685}}}","type":"application\u002Fjson","status":200,"statusType":2,"info":false,"ok":true,"clientError":false,"serverError":false,"error":false,"accepted":false,"noContent":false,"badRequest":false,"unauthorized":false,"notAcceptable":false,"notFound":false,"forbidden":false}},"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo":{"url":"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo","requestData":{"urlPath":"\u002Fstingray\u002Fapi\u002Fhome\u002Fdetails\u002FmainHouseInfoPanelInfo","method":"GET","queryParams":[{"propertyId":66288976,"accessLevel":1,"listingId":211863926,"pageType":1}],"postParams":null,"type":"json"},"requesters":1,"loaded":true,"res":{"_hasBody":true,"text":"{}&&{\"version\":631,\"errorMessage\":\"Success\",\"resultCode\":0,\"payload\":{\"mainHouseInfo\":{\"listingId\":211863926,\"openHousesDisplayLevel\":1,\"videoOpenHouses\":[],\"hotnessInfo\":{\"isHot\":false,\"hotnessMessageInfoWithTourLink\":{\"hotnessMessageAction\":\"go tour it now\"}},\"source\":{\"dataSourceId\":159,\"dataSourceDescription\":\"Northern Ohio Regional MLS (Yes MLS)\",\"dataSourceName\":\"MLSNOW\",\"shouldShowLargerLogo\":false},\"listingAgents\":[{\"agentInfo\":{\"agentName\":\"Jeremy Fennell\",\"isAgentNameBlank\":false,\"isRedfinAgent\":false,\"isPartnerAgent\":false,\"isExternalAgent\":false},\"brokerName\":\"EXP Realty, LLC.\",\"isOpendoor\":false}],\"buyingAgents\":[],\"lastCheckedDate\":1773175103163,\"lastUpdatedDate\":1773072902550,\"remarksDisplayLevel\":1,\"marketingRemarks\":[{\"marketingRemark\":\"Welcome to this move-in-ready, 4-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom bi-level in the heart of Twinsburg. Fresh, Bright, and Ready for You! The interior boasts new fresh neutral paint and plush new carpeting throughout, providing a clean and inviting canvas for your personal style. Three nice size bedrooms and a full bath are on the main floor. A large kitchen over looking a dining area and front room top off the upper level. The lower level has an additional bedroom, rec room or office. Just outside the bedroom is an additional bathroom and laundry area. The lower level does have a walkout to the back yard. The home is situated close to parks, shopping and entertainment. Furnace\u002F AC (2008) Roof (2007) Siding (2021). \",\"displayLevel\":1}],\"selectedAmenities\":[{\"header\":\"Stories\",\"content\":\"Two, to 1887 Hillsdale in the highly desirable city of Twinsburg! This well-maintained 4-bedroom, 2-bath home offers comfort, modern updates, and a fantastic location in one of Northeast Ohio’s most sought-after communities. Recent improvements include a newer driveway, patio, flooring, kitchen, bathrooms, and windows, providing both style and peace of mind for the next owner. The updated kitchen features modern finishes and functional space for everyday living and entertaining, while the renovated bathrooms and newer flooring throughout add a fresh, move-in-ready feel. Step outside to enjoy the updated patio and outdoor space—perfect for relaxing evenings or hosting friends Agent\",\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F66692\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_96.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+13303293274\",\"quote\":\"As a lifelong resident of the Greater Akron area and a full-time real estate professional with over 16 years of experience, I’ve had the privilege of assisting buyers \\u0026 sellers in more than 35 local markets. Throughout my career, I’ve developed extensive expertise in a wide range of Real Estate sectors, including condo sales, investment properties, luxury homes, new construction, residential resale, and vacant land development. Since earning my Ohio sales license, I’ve consistently been a top producing Agent - earning recognition year after year with the OAR President’s Sales Club Award, Multi Million Dollar Club, and various RE\u002FMAX milestones. I also hold the Accredited Buyer’s Representative (ABR) and Seniors Real Estate Specialist (SRES) designations, further enhancing the level of service I provide. I pride myself on delivering prompt, responsive, and dedicated service to every one of my clients. As a result, I’ve built a strong sphere and referral network. My drive to succeed, coupled with a commitment to integrity, makes me a trusted and reliable choice to serve as your REALTOR®.\",\"__g_id\":\"1035294788\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772299340092,true,\"david-montoney\",null,2,true,\"Strongsville\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As a lifelong resident of the Greater Akron area and a full-time real estate professional with over 16 years of experience, I’ve had the privilege of assisting buyers \\u0026 sellers in more than 35 local markets. Outdoor
living space. Generously sized bedrooms offer flexibility and comfort. A perfect combination of functional space and peaceful surroundings. This home has a first floor master bedroom with en suite, and walk in closet. First floor laundry. The second floor has two bedrooms, one with a walk in closet, and full bath. The upstairs loft area could be easily converted into another bedroom. The smaller unfinished area in the basement could be conveyed into a media room or bedroom, as well. The basement is \",\"businessMarketId\":73},{\"mlsId\":{\"label\":\"MLS#\",\"value\":\"5191363\"},\"showMlsId\":false,\"showDatasourceLogo\":false,\"price\":{\"value\":960000,\"level\":1},\"hideSalePrice\":false,\"sqFt\":{\"value\":4224,\"level\":1},\"pricePerSqFt\":{\"value\":227,\"level\":1},\"beds\":5,\"baths\":5.5,\"fullBaths\":5,\"partialBaths\":1,\"stories\":2.0,\"streetLine\":{\"value\":\"7370 Stockwood Dr\",\"level\":1},\"unitNumber\":{\"value\":\" \",\"level\":1},\"city\":\"Solon\",\"state\":\"OH\",\"zip\":\"44139\",\"postalCode\":{\"value\":\"44139\",\"level\":1},\"countryCode\":\"US\",\"soldDate\":1733299200000,\"searchStatus\":1,\"propertyType\":6,\"listingType\":1,\"propertyId\":71138568,\"listingId\":212820385,\"dataSourceId\":159,\"marketId\":64,\"dom\":{\"value\":4,\"level\":1},\"timeOnRedfin\":{\"value\":281532713,\"level\":1},\"timeZone\":\"US\u002FEastern\",\"primaryPhotoDisplayLevel\":1,\"photos\":{\"value\":\"0-48:0\",\"level\":1},\"url\":\"\u002FOH\u002FSolon\u002F7370-Stockwood-Dr-44139\u002Fhome\u002F71138568\",\"sashes\":[],\"isRedfin\":false,\"listingRemarks\":\"Welcome to this colonial home, where stunning curb appeal greets you at every turn. Thoughtfully landscaped grounds ensure seasonal blooms for homeowners to enjoy. Expansive windows fill each room with natural light. As you enter the grand two-story foyer, you\\u0027ll appreciate the elegant hardwood flooring. The dining room features floor-to-ceiling windows, exquisite millwork, and a tray ceiling. The versatile floor plan includes a living room or office space just off the foyer. The family room captivates with soaring windows and a gas fireplace surrounded by marble. The sun-drenched kitchen boasts tall cabinetry, granite countertops, an island, Miele ovens, and ample storage with a walk-in Team\",\"lastName\":\"Montoney\",\"agentType\":2,\"photoUrl74x110\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F66692\u002F500x500\u002Fgen74x110\u002F8_96.jpg\",\"photoUrl120x120\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F66692\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_96.jpg\",\"gender\":1,\"hasPhotos\":true,\"jobTitle\":\"Partner Agent\",\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F66692\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_96.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+13303293274\",\"quote\":\"As a lifelong resident of the Greater Akron area and a full-time real estate professional with over 16 years of experience, I’ve had the privilege of assisting buyers \\u0026 sellers in more than 35 local markets. Throughout my career, I’ve developed extensive expertise in a wide range of Real Estate sectors, including condo sales, investment properties, luxury homes, new construction, residential resale, and vacant land development. Since earning my Ohio sales license, I’ve consistently been a top producing Agent - earning recognition year after year with the OAR President’s Sales Club Award, Multi Million Dollar Club, and various RE\u002FMAX milestones. I also hold the Accredited Buyer’s Representative (ABR) and Seniors Real Estate Specialist (SRES) designations, further enhancing the level of service I provide. I pride myself on delivering prompt, responsive, and dedicated service to every one of my clients. As a result, I’ve built a strong sphere and referral network. My drive to succeed, coupled with a commitment to integrity, makes me a trusted and reliable choice to serve as your REALTOR®.\",\"__g_id\":\"1035294788\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772299340092,true,\"david-montoney\",null,2,true,\"Strongsville\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As a lifelong resident of the Greater Akron area and a full-time real estate professional with over 16 years of experience, I’ve had the privilege of assisting buyers \\u0026 sellers in more than 35 local markets. Throughout my career, I’ve developed extensive expertise in a wide range of Real Estate sectors, including condo sales, investment properties, luxury homes, new construction, residential resale, and vacant land development. Since earning my Ohio sales license, I’ve consistently been a top producing Agent - earning recognition year after year with the OAR President’s Sales Club Award, Multi Million Dollar Club, and various RE\u002FMAX milestones. I also hold the Accredited Buyer’s Representative (ABR) and Seniors Real Estate Specialist (SRES) designations, further enhancing the level of service I provide. I pride myself on delivering prompt, responsive, and dedicated service to every one of my clients. As a result, I’ve built a strong sphere and referral network. My drive to succeed, coupled with a commitment to integrity, makes me a trusted and reliable choice to serve as your Team\",\"lastName\":\"Montoney\",\"agentType\":2,\"photoUrl74x110\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F66692\u002F500x500\u002Fgen74x110\u002F8_96.jpg\",\"photoUrl120x120\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F66692\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_96.jpg\",\"gender\":1,\"hasPhotos\":true,\"jobTitle\":\"Partner Agent\",\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F66692\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_96.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+13303293274\",\"quote\":\"As a lifelong resident of the Greater Akron area and a full-time real estate professional with over 16 years of experience, I’ve had the privilege of assisting buyers \\u0026 sellers in more than 35 local markets. Throughout my career, I’ve developed extensive expertise in a wide range of Real Estate sectors, including condo sales, investment properties, luxury homes, new construction, residential resale, and vacant land development. Since earning my Ohio sales license, I’ve consistently been a top producing Agent - earning recognition year after year with the OAR President’s Sales Club Award, Multi Million Dollar Club, and various RE\u002FMAX milestones. I also hold the Accredited Buyer’s Representative (ABR) and Seniors Real Estate Specialist (SRES) designations, further enhancing the level of service I provide. I pride myself on delivering prompt, responsive, and dedicated service to every one of my clients. As a result, I’ve built a strong sphere and referral network. My drive to succeed, coupled with a commitment to integrity, makes me a trusted and reliable choice to serve as your REALTOR®.\",\"__g_id\":\"614307741\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772299340092,true,\"david-montoney\",null,2,true,\"Strongsville\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As a lifelong resident of the Greater Akron area and a full-time real estate professional with over 16 years of experience, I’ve had the privilege of assisting buyers \\u0026 sellers in more than 35 local markets. Throughout my career, I’ve developed extensive expertise in a wide range of Real Estate sectors, including condo sales, investment properties, luxury homes, new construction, residential resale, and vacant land development. Since earning my Ohio sales license, I’ve consistently been a top producing Agent - earning recognition year after year with the OAR President’s Sales Club Award, Multi Million Dollar Club, and various RE\u002FMAX milestones. I also hold the Accredited Buyer’s Representative (ABR) and Seniors Real Estate Specialist (SRES) designations, further enhancing the level of service I provide. I pride myself on delivering prompt, responsive, and dedicated service to every one of my clients. As a result, I’ve built a strong sphere and referral network. My drive to succeed, coupled with a commitment to integrity, makes me a trusted and reliable choice to serve as your dining, entertaining, or simply enjoying the peaceful outdoor setting. All three bedrooms and two full bathrooms are conveniently located down the hallway, offering privacy from the main living areas. The home also features a full basement, providing abundant storage space and endless possibilities for a workshop, hobby area, or future finished living space. The basement includes a laundry area and built-in workbench. Additional highlights include professionally installed custom hickory hardwood flooring throughout the main level, ceramic tile in both bathrooms, a new roof and gutters (2022), and a newer hot water tank. The home also offers the convenience of an attached 2-car garage. With its functional layout, inviting living spaces, and generous half-acre lot, this charming ranch offers comfort, space, and great potential. upgrades include new siding (4/15/25), new windows (4/15/25), all new interior and exterior doors, a new garage roof (8/25/25), and a new stone driveway. Twin Lakes Park offers maintained common areas, a community clubhouse, and exclusive access for eligible properties to both lakes, which are stocked. HOA dues are affordable and annual. This supports the upkeep of shared spaces and lake areas. This specific address is part of the limited section of the subdivision with direct access to the water amenities. Located near Kent State University, local shops, trails, and major routes, this home combines modern updates with a highly sought-after lake community lifestyle. to the Jones Group with Keller Williams, your premier real estate team in Northeastern Ohio! Our mission is to make your real estate dreams a reality, providing exceptional service and expertise every step of the way.\\r\\nWhy Choose Us?\\r\\n\\r\\nLocal Expertise: Born and raised in Northeastern Ohio, our team has an in-depth understanding of the local market trends, neighborhoods, and hidden gems. We leverage this knowledge to help our clients make informed decisions.\\r\\n\\r\\nClient-Centric Approach: Your satisfaction is our top priority. We take the time to understand your unique needs and tailor our services to exceed your expectations. Team\",\"agentType\":2,\"photoUrl74x110\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F65469\u002F500x500\u002Fgen74x110\u002F8_32.jpg\",\"photoUrl120x120\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F65469\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_32.jpg\",\"gender\":4,\"hasPhotos\":true,\"jobTitle\":\"Partner Agent\",\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F65469\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_32.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+12169731402\",\"quote\":\"As an experienced REALTOR and Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist with an intimate knowledge of the Chagrin Valley and Cleveland\\u0027s suburbs, Mike enjoys putting his knowledge and professionalism to work for his clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nAs one of the areas top producing REALTORS, Mike’s driving purpose is to help you reach your real estate goals. Whether that means outperforming the market in the sale of your home or getting you into a new one, he is ready to become your trusted adviser, negotiate on your behalf, and reach a win-win agreement as quickly and painlessly as possible.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe mission of Advantage Group is first and foremost, to help clients buy low and sell high, and to exceed their expectations on every level along the way. Their belief that long-term client relationships built on integrity and trust are the key to success. The Advantage Group\\u0027s customized approach is tailored to the clients\\u0027 needs, but it always includes an unwavering commitment to accountability and superior customer service.\\r\\n\\r\\nMike holds a B.A. in Economics from John Carroll University and lives in South Russell with his wife, Michaela, and their three children.\",\"__g_id\":\"1561859741\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772485500621,true,\"advantage-group-exp\",null,2,true,\"Westlake\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"As an experienced REALTOR and Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist with an intimate knowledge of the Chagrin Valley and Cleveland\\u0027s suburbs, Mike enjoys putting his knowledge and professionalism to work for his clients.\\r\\n\\r\\nAs one of the areas top producing REALTORS, Mike’s driving purpose is to help you reach your real estate goals. Whether that means outperforming the market in the sale of your home or getting you into a new one, he is ready to become your trusted adviser, negotiate on your behalf, and reach a win-win agreement as quickly and painlessly as possible.\\r\\n\\r\\nThe mission of Advantage Group is first and foremost, to help clients buy low and sell high, and to exceed their expectations on every level along the way. Their belief that long-term client relationships built on integrity and trust are the key to success. The Advantage Group\\u0027s customized approach is tailored to the clients\\u0027 needs, but it always includes an unwavering commitment to accountability and superior customer service.\\r\\n\\r\\nMike holds a B.A. in Economics from John Carroll University and lives in South Russell with his wife, Michaela, and their three children.\",\"Rural East Team\",\"lastName\":\"Schikowski\",\"agentType\":2,\"photoUrl74x110\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen74x110\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"photoUrl120x120\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"gender\":1,\"hasPhotos\":true,\"jobTitle\":\"Partner Agent\",\"numReviews\":1,\"__t_idx\":0,\"businessMarketId\":73,\"photoUrl\":\"https:\u002F\u002Fssl.cdn-redfin.com\u002Fsystem_files\u002Fimages\u002F67813\u002F500x500\u002Fgen120x120\u002F8_14.jpg\",\"phoneUrl\":\"tel:+14402797309\",\"quote\":\"Kayla Schikowski began her real estate career in 2019 and has been a dedicated agent ever since. Initially, the complexities of real estate transactions presented a challenge, but through diligent self-education, she has developed an exceptional understanding of the industry, successfully navigating over 100 transactions totaling over $20,000,000. Her six years of experience enable her to provide clients with expert-level service. She remains keenly aware of the initial uncertainties that often accompany real estate transactions, ensuring clients feel comfortable and confident throughout the process. Building strong client relationships is of paramount importance to Kayla. She is committed to providing the best possible experience and takes great pride in the high percentage of her business generated through referrals. For those seeking a knowledgeable, personable agent who prioritizes their interests and offers comprehensive real estate education, Kayla Schikowski is an ideal choice.\",\"__g_id\":\"263679638\",\"isAgentTakingAutoSchedulingRequests\":true,\"__atts\":[1,1772578707152,true,\"kayla-schikowski\",null,2,true,\"Mason\",\"OH\",null,null,null,null,null,null,\"Kayla Schikowski began her real estate career in 2019 and has been a dedicated agent ever since.
